figures.caption_en: Figure 1: NIR Mg and Si absorption line strengths in NGC 1277 and massive ETGs. Top: Zoomed-in view of the spectra of NGC 1277 (pink line) and the stacked massive ETGs (cyan) around the MgI1.18, SiI1.20, and SiI1.59 features, with their corresponding error spectra. Yellow bands highlight these key absorption features, and light blue regions show the pseudo-continuum bands used for their index measurements. As reference, we show in grey an E-MILES model spectrum for an old, metal-rich, dwarf-enhanced population. Bottom: Measured line-strength indices of MgI1.18, SiI1.20, and SiI1.59 plotted as a function of stellar population ages. Model predictions are shown for E-MILES assuming different IMF shapes (Milky Way-like in black, bottom-heavy in grey) and metallicities (solar as solid lines, super-solar as dotted lines). Arrows show index responses to + + 0.3 dex enhancements in [Mg/Fe] (blue) and [Si/Fe] (orange) using response functions from Conroy et al. ( 2018 ) , attached to models representing the average stellar population of massive galaxy centres. The observed values are overlaid as pink circles (NGC 1277) and cyan diamonds (local massive ETGs). The Mg enhancement in NGC 1277 confirms previous results in the optical, while the stronger Si absorption ( ∼ \sim 25% higher than in typical ETGs) cannot be matched by current models, even when varying IMF or metallicity, suggesting a distinct chemical enrichment.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：NGC 1277和大质量ETG中的近红外Mg和Si吸收线强度。上图：NGC 1277（粉色线）和堆叠大质量ETG（青色）在MgI1.18、SiI1.20和SiI1.59特征附近的光谱放大视图，及其对应的误差光谱。黄色带突出显示这些关键吸收特征，浅蓝色区域显示用于其指数测量的伪连续谱带。作为参考，灰色显示了一个年老、富金属、矮星增强的E-MILES模型光谱。下图：测量的MgI1.18、SiI1.20和SiI1.59线强度指数作为恒星群体年龄的函数。模型预测显示为E-MILES，假设不同的IMF形状（银河系型为黑色，底部重型为灰色）和金属丰度（太阳丰度为实线，超太阳丰度为虚线）。箭头显示了使用Conroy等人（2018）的响应函数，对代表大质量星系中心平均恒星群体的模型附加+0.3 dex增强的[Mg/Fe]（蓝色）和[Si/Fe]（橙色）的指数响应。观测值叠加为粉色圆圈（NGC 1277）和青色菱形（本地大质量ETG）。NGC 1277中的Mg增强证实了光学中的先前结果，而更强的Si吸收（比典型ETG高约25%）无法被当前模型匹配，即使改变IMF或金属丰度，表明存在独特的化学增丰。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: [Si/Mg] as a function of SN progenitor mass.The measured [Si/Mg] abundance ratios are compared to theoretical nucleosynthetic yields from SN models across a range of progenitor masses. Circles, squares, and diamonds denote the predicted yields for CCSNe, HNe, and PISNe, respectively, based on Nomoto et al. ( 2013 ) . The shaded bands represent the 68% credible intervals of the inferred [Si/Mg] ratios for NGC 1277 (pink) and the sample of local massive ETGs (cyan), derived from the Bayesian hierarchical analysis (Table 2 ). The solid lines mark the corresponding posterior medians.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：[Si/Mg]作为超新星前身星质量的函数。测量的[Si/Mg]丰度比与来自超新星模型的理论核合成产额在不同前身星质量范围内进行比较。圆圈、方块和菱形分别表示基于Nomoto等人（2013）的CCSNe、HNe和PISNe的预测产额。阴影带表示从贝叶斯层次分析（表2）推断的NGC 1277（粉色）和本地大质量ETG样本（青色）的[Si/Mg]比的68%可信区间。实线标记相应的后验中位值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Schematic illustration of early chemical enrichment and galaxy evolution under the two-phase formation scenario. In the early Universe (top left), metal-free stars, including both massive Pop III stars (large stars) and less massive ones (smaller stars), form from pristine gas. Pop III stars end as PISNe (orange bursts), while lower-mass metal-free stars produce CCSNe (blue bursts). The stars that form from this enriched material inherit the colour of the enriching SN type. They populate an early compact massive galaxy, or ‘red nugget’ (pink background), with high [Si/Mg]. In normal massive galaxies, a second phase brings mergers and accretion, together with additional enrichment by CCSNe and SNe Ia (blue and green bursts), significantly diluting [Si/Mg]; they then evolve into massive ETGs (greenish background). In contrast, relic galaxies like NGC 1277 do not experience significant mergers over the second phase, passively evolving with only minor additional enrichment (the lighter pink background exemplifies such a minimal dilution). The bottom-middle tracks show the schematic [Si/Mg] evolution for each formation pathway.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在两阶段形成情景下早期化学增丰和星系演化的示意图。在早期宇宙（左上），无金属恒星，包括大质量Pop III恒星（大星）和较小质量恒星（小星），从原始气体中形成。Pop III恒星以PISNe（橙色爆发）结束，而较低质量的无金属恒星产生CCSNe（蓝色爆发）。从这种增丰物质中形成的恒星继承了增丰超新星类型的颜色。它们填充了一个早期致密大质量星系，或称为“红核”（粉色背景），具有高[Si/Mg]。在正常大质量星系中，第二阶段带来并合和吸积，以及CCSNe和SNe Ia（蓝色和绿色爆发）的额外增丰，显著稀释了[Si/Mg]；然后它们演化成大质量ETG（绿色背景）。相比之下，像NGC 1277这样的遗迹星系在第二阶段没有经历显著的并合，被动演化，只有微小的额外增丰（较浅的粉色背景示例了这种最小稀释）。底部中间轨迹显示了每种形成路径的示意性[Si/Mg]演化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Line-strength measurements for MgI1.18, SiI1.20, and SiI1.58 index dependences across the E-IRTF stellar library as functions of stellar effective temperature (T eff ), surface gravity (log( g g )), and metallicity ([Fe/H]). Different stellar types are colour-coded (see the legend).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：MgI1.18、SiI1.20和SiI1.58指数在E-IRTF恒星库中作为恒星有效温度（T_eff）、表面重力（log(g)）和金属丰度（[Fe/H]）函数的线强度测量。不同恒星类型用颜色编码（见图例）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Illustration of alternative IMF parameterisations used in the stellar population modelling. The standard Salpeter IMF is shown in orange. Solid black and grey lines represent bimodal IMFs with logarithmic slopes of 1.3 and 3.0, respectively. Dotted versions of these lines modify the low-mass slope below 0.2 M ⊙ \odot to 0.3, mimicking the Kroupa IMF in that regime. The dashed red line corresponds to a bimodal IMF (slope = 3.0) with a reduced turning point mass range of 0.4–0.6 M ⊙ \odot . Finally, the solid orange line also doubles as a unimodal IMF with slope = 1.3 for comparison.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：恒星群体建模中使用的替代IMF参数化示意图。标准Salpeter IMF以橙色显示。实心黑线和灰线表示对数斜率分别为1.3和3.0的双峰IMF。这些线的虚线版本将低于0.2 M⊙的低质量斜率修改为0.3，模拟该区域的Kroupa IMF。红色虚线对应一个双峰IMF（斜率=3.0），转折点质量范围减小到0.4–0.6 M⊙。最后，实心橙色线也作为斜率为1.3的单峰IMF用于比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Si and Mg line-strength indices as a function of stellar population age for different IMF shapes and stellar metallicity components. Each curve represents a SSP built using the IMF shapes from Fig. 5 , with line styles and colours matched. Star symbols denote two-component SSP models that include a metal-rich population ([M/H] = + + 0.26 dex) combined with a varying fraction of a metal-poor component ([M/H] = − - 1.49 dex). Star sizes increase with the metal-poor fraction: 0%, 5%, 10%, and 20% by mass. We also show the impact of different aperture effects, with the two aperture extractions from massive ETGs shown as filled circles for central (1.2 kpc) apertures and open squares for spectra extracted within 1R e .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：对于不同IMF形状和恒星金属丰度成分，Si和Mg线强度指数作为恒星群体年龄的函数。每条曲线代表使用图5中的IMF形状构建的SSP，线型和颜色匹配。星号表示双成分SSP模型，包括一个富金属群体（[M/H]=+0.26 dex）与不同比例的贫金属成分（[M/H]=-1.49 dex）的组合。星号大小随贫金属比例增加：按质量计0%、5%、10%和20%。我们还展示了不同孔径效应的影响，大质量ETG的两次孔径提取显示为实心圆圈（中心1.2 kpc孔径）和空心方块（在1R_e内提取的光谱）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们研究了一种由阻尼谐振子方程控制的暗能量状态方程，该方程允许欠阻尼、临界阻尼和过阻尼解。将该模型与普朗克宇宙微波背景、暗能量光谱巡天重子声学振荡、大爆炸核合成、宇宙计时器以及三个Ia型超新星数据集进行对比，我们发现欠阻尼解给出的哈勃常数H0 = 70.9 ± 1.1 km/s/Mpc（使用DESY5）和H0 = 72.0^{+1.4}_{-2.1} km/s/Mpc（使用Union3），将与SH0ES的张力降低至约1.4σ；而Pantheon+数据集则强烈偏好一个接近临界阻尼的解，其w0为正，H0 = 66.23 ± 0.85 km/s/Mpc，揭示了超新星数据集之间存在显著的系统性张力。相对于ΛCDM模型的贝叶斯证据对于DES和Union3数据而言尚无定论，这表明在不牺牲标准模型统计显著性的前提下，可以缓解H0张力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 我们研究了一种由阻尼谐振子方程描述的暗能量状态方程，并将其与普朗克宇宙微波背景、暗能量光谱巡天重子声学振荡、大爆炸核合成、宇宙计时器以及三个超新星数据集进行了对比。模型I（w_m=1）对DESY5和Union3数据给出H0 > 70 km/s/Mpc，将SH0ES张力降低至约1.4σ，且相对于ΛCDM模型的证据尚无定论，表明在振荡框架内可以在不牺牲贝叶斯统计显著性的前提下缓解H0张力。加入R19先验后，该模型相对于基线模型给出强证据（BASE+DES+R19和BASE+PP+R19的ΔlnZ分别为+6.12和+7.66）。相反，Pantheon+数据集偏好一个接近临界阻尼的解，其w0为正，且模型I–III均给出正的状态方程当前值，对该数据集具有中等到强的贝叶斯证据，这表明超新星数据集之间存在系统性差异，而非真实的宇宙学信号。关键的是，阻尼项至关重要：移除它（模型IV）会使H0降低约2.4 km/s/Mpc，证实H0的提升是由阻尼机制而非单纯振荡驱动的。有趣的是，在Pantheon+分析中，对较大的正w0当前值（对应正减速参数q0>0）的偏好，与该数据集中最近发现的与 progenitor-age-dependent 光度系统误差一致，这些误差会偏置低红移距离模量，并使推断的减速参数偏向正值。这为特定数据集的系统误差提供了独立的基于模型的证据，其最终解决有待于即将开展的巡天项目（如南希·格雷斯·罗马太空望远镜和欧几里得）改进标准化程序。数据自然选择了一个在低红移下欠阻尼振荡的状态方程，该方程渐近趋向于w→-1，与早期宇宙的宇宙学常数一致。这种行为原则上可以通过标量-张量理论中适当的势和耦合选择来实现，暗示了低曲率引力修正。即将开展的巡天项目——南希·格雷斯·罗马太空望远镜和欧几里得——将提供具有更小系统误差的独立超新星数据集，直接检验Pantheon+差异是否源于系统误差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Numerical evolution of w ​ ( N ) w(N) and the corresponding dark-energy density Ω de ∝ ρ de \Omega_{\rm de}\propto\rho_{\rm de} for different combinations of model parameters with w m = 1.0 w_{m}=1.0 . The figure shows representative choices of the oscillation frequency and damping factor, illustrating underdamped and near-critically damped scenarios in which oscillations emerge at low redshift and are progressively suppressed toward higher redshifts, with the EoS asymptotically approaching w → − 1 w\to-1 for b > 0 b>0 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：对于不同模型参数组合（w_m=1.0），w(N)及相应暗能量密度Ω_de ∝ ρ_de的数值演化。图中展示了振荡频率和阻尼因子的代表性选择，说明了欠阻尼和近临界阻尼情景，其中振荡在低红移出现并随红移增加逐渐被抑制，状态方程在b>0时渐近趋向于w→-1。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Uniform priors have been adopted for the all the model parameters. Here h ≡ H 0 / 100 h\equiv H_{0}/100 .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：所有模型参数均采用均匀先验。此处h ≡ H0/100。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Marginalized constraints at 68% CL for Model I ( w m = 1.0 w_{m}=1.0 ). Δ ​ ln ⁡ Z ≡ ln ⁡ Z model − ln ⁡ Z Λ ​ CDM \Delta\ln Z\equiv\ln Z_{\rm model}-\ln Z_{\Lambda\rm CDM} is computed within each dataset block. Full parameter constraints for Models I–IV are provided in Appendix A .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：模型I（w_m=1.0）在68%置信水平下的边缘化约束。ΔlnZ ≡ ln Z_model − ln Z_ΛCDM在每个数据集块内计算。模型I–IV的完整参数约束见附录A。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The evolution of w ​ ( N ) w(N) (left) and E ​ ( z ) ≡ H / H 0 E(z)\equiv H/H_{0} (right) for Model I across distinct dataset combinations. The CC data are normalized with H 0 = 67.0 H_{0}=67.0 km/s/Mpc for visualization purposes.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：模型I在不同数据集组合下w(N)（左）和E(z) ≡ H/H0（右）的演化。为可视化目的，宇宙计时器数据以H0=67.0 km/s/Mpc归一化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The best fit values of H 0 H_{0} (left) and the difference in log evidence, Δ ​ ln ⁡ Z ≡ ln ⁡ Z Model − ln ⁡ Z Λ ​ CDM \Delta\ln Z\equiv\ln Z_{\rm Model}-\ln Z_{\Lambda{\rm CDM}} (right).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：H0的最佳拟合值（左）及对数证据差ΔlnZ ≡ ln Z_Model − ln Z_ΛCDM（右）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Marginalized 1D-2D posterior distributions for Model I, II and III in top row read from left to right respectively. In the bottom panel Model IV, Model I and Model IV from left to right. The corresponding dataset combinations are indicated in the legends of each panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：模型I、II和III的边缘化一维-二维后验分布（从上到下依次为左、中、右）。底部面板从左到右依次为模型IV、模型I和模型IV。每个面板的图例中标注了相应的数据集组合。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Marginalized constraints on the model parameters at the 68 % 68\% confidence level for the different observational dataset combinations. Dashed entries indicate parameters that are not constrained by the corresponding dataset.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：不同观测数据集组合下模型参数在68%置信水平下的边缘化约束。虚线条目表示相应数据集未约束的参数。

figures.caption_en: Table 4: Marginalized constraints on the model parameters at the 68 % 68\% confidence level for the different observational dataset combinations (includes f ​ σ 8 f\sigma_{8} ). Dashed entries indicate parameters that are not constrained by the corresponding dataset.
figures.caption_zh: 表4：不同观测数据集组合（包括fσ8）下模型参数在68%置信水平下的边缘化约束。虚线条目表示相应数据集未约束的参数。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 超轻轴子（ULAs）是暗物质候选者，旨在解决标准宇宙学模型的小尺度异常。由于其固有的量子压力，ULAs会在物质功率谱上产生明显的、尺度依赖的抑制，这可能在未来的观测中留下印记。我们通过预测后电离时期的大尺度结构（LSS）巡天和下一代宇宙微波背景（CMB）任务来探索这种可能性。利用21厘米强度映射（SKA1-MID和PUMA）与莱曼α森林（类DESI）之间的互相关，我们在减轻仪器特定系统误差的同时，探索了后电离时期巡天中ULAs的可能信号。Fisher矩阵分析在广泛的ULA质量范围（10^{-30} eV ≤ m_a ≤ 10^{-20} eV）内预测了ULA丰度分数的误差，揭示了在中间质量（m_a ~ 10^{-25} eV）附近的最佳探测灵敏度。此外，尽管与未来的LSS任务相比，单独的下一代CMB任务可以对ULA分数产生较小的投影误差，但类DESI和PUMA互相关谱与类CMB-S4任务的联合分析估计，对于m_a ≤ 10^{-28} eV，ULA分数的误差为O(10^{-4})，这突显了相对于单独的LSS和CMB任务的显著改进。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：联合后电离时期的大尺度结构巡天与下一代CMB任务能显著提升对超轻轴子暗物质的探测精度，为未来暗物质研究提供了可行的观测策略。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Illustration of the ratio of ULA matter power spectrum to the standard Λ \Lambda CDM prediction. Each panel showcases the impact of a single ULA parameter while keeping the other fixed. Left panel presents the variation of the axion mass ( m a m_{a} ) for Ω a / Ω dm = 0.2 \Omega_{a}/\Omega_{\rm dm}=0.2 , showing suppressions at the small scale. The suppressions shift to the smaller k k for lighter masses. Right panel presents the variation of the axion fractional abundance ( Ω a / Ω dm \Omega_{a}/\Omega_{\rm dm} ) for m a = 10 − 27 m_{a}=10^{-27} eV. A larger axion fraction have a more significant small scale suppression, beginning the suppression at the same k k .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：ULA物质功率谱与标准ΛCDM预测之比的示意图。每个面板展示了在保持其他参数固定时，单个ULA参数的影响。左面板显示了轴子质量（m_a）的变化（Ω_a/Ω_dm = 0.2），展示了小尺度上的抑制。对于较轻的质量，抑制向较小的k移动。右面板显示了轴子丰度分数（Ω_a/Ω_dm）的变化（m_a = 10^{-27} eV）。较大的轴子分数具有更显著的小尺度抑制，且抑制从相同的k开始。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Illustration of CMB TT power spectrum for ULAs. Black dashed line presents the Λ \Lambda CDM prediction. Each panel showcases the impact of a single ULA parameter while keeping the other fixed. Left panel presents the variation of m a m_{a} for Ω a / Ω dm = 0.2 \Omega_{a}/\Omega_{\rm dm}=0.2 , whereas right panel shows the variation of Ω a / Ω dm \Omega_{a}/\Omega_{\rm dm} for fixed m a = 10 − 27 m_{a}=10^{-27} eV. A smaller axion mass or larger axion fraction systematically alters the acoustic peaks. In both scenarios, the deviations are driven by non-zero sound speed of the ULAs, while the horizontal positions of the peaks remain largely unchanged.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：ULAs的CMB TT功率谱示意图。黑色虚线表示ΛCDM预测。每个面板展示了在保持其他参数固定时，单个ULA参数的影响。左面板显示了m_a的变化（Ω_a/Ω_dm = 0.2），而右面板显示了Ω_a/Ω_dm的变化（m_a = 10^{-27} eV）。较小的轴子质量或较大的轴子分数会系统地改变声学峰。在这两种情况下，偏差由ULAs的非零声速驱动，而峰的水平位置基本保持不变。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Illustration of SNR as a function of k k at z = 2.33 z=2.33 for the Ly α \alpha auto-spectrum ( left panel ), the 21-cm auto-spectrum ( middle panel ) and the cross-spectrum ( right panel ), for various fractional abundances of ULAs, considering m a = 10 − 24 m_{a}=10^{-24} eV. Ly α \alpha auto-spectrum assumes DESI-like surveys, while 21-cm auto-spectra are based on SKA1-MID . Solid and dashed lines correspond to different line-of-sight angles ( μ \mu ), highlighting the angular dependence of the signal.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在z=2.33时，对于不同ULA丰度分数（m_a = 10^{-24} eV），信噪比作为k函数的示意图：Lyα自谱（左面板）、21厘米自谱（中面板）和互相关谱（右面板）。Lyα自谱假设类DESI巡天，而21厘米自谱基于SKA1-MID。实线和虚线对应不同的视线角度（μ），突出了信号的角依赖性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Similar representation as Fig. 3 , but this time for PUMA instead of SKA1-MID.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：与图3类似的表示，但这次使用PUMA代替SKA1-MID。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Illustration of SNR as a function of z z for various wavenumbers k k and fractional ULA abundances, assuming a fixed axion mass of m a = 10 − 24 m_{a}=10^{-24} eV and a line-of-sight angle of μ = 0.36 \mu=0.36 . In both rows, the left panels display the Ly α \alpha auto-spectrum (DESI-like), the middle panels show the 21-cm auto-spectrum, and the right panels present the cross-spectrum. The top row utilizes SKA1-MID for the 21-cm observations, while the bottom row utilizes the PUMA interferometer.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：对于不同波数k和ULA丰度分数（固定轴子质量m_a = 10^{-24} eV，视线角度μ = 0.36），信噪比作为z函数的示意图。两行中，左面板显示Lyα自谱（类DESI），中面板显示21厘米自谱，右面板显示互相关谱。顶行使用SKA1-MID进行21厘米观测，底行使用PUMA干涉仪。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Fiducial values of the cosmological and ULA parameters used for the Fisher matrix analysis. The standard cosmological parameters are set to the best-fit values from Planck-18 TT,TE,EE+lowP+lensing+BAO [ 40 ] , while the fiducial value for Ω a / Ω dm \Omega_{a}/\Omega_{\rm dm} is motivated by Refs. [ 10 , 9 ] .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：用于Fisher矩阵分析的宇宙学和ULA参数的基准值。标准宇宙学参数设置为Planck-18 TT,TE,EE+lowP+lensing+BAO [40]的最佳拟合值，而Ω_a/Ω_dm的基准值参考了文献[10, 9]。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Marginalised 2D Fisher contours of fractional abundance of ULAs with other cosmological parameters for four different m a m_{a} . SKA1-MID is utilized for 21-cm observations. Each row presents the 1 ​ σ 1\sigma and 2 ​ σ 2\sigma contours for different axion masses.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：对于四种不同m_a，ULA丰度分数与其他宇宙学参数的边际化二维Fisher轮廓。使用SKA1-MID进行21厘米观测。每行显示不同轴子质量的1σ和2σ轮廓。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : Same level of information as in Fig. 6 but this time PUMA instead of SKA1-MID.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：与图6相同的信息级别，但这次使用PUMA代替SKA1-MID。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种名为Λ_{ω_s}CDM的ΛCDM模型的新扩展，其中我们考虑了早期的一个额外项以缓解哈勃张力。这个额外成分被称为“具有压力的物质”，表示一种随着宇宙膨胀而次于尘埃和辐射的压性流体，从而在晚期恢复ΛCDM范式。我们通过使用Planck 2018 CMB、DESI DR2和Pantheon+SH0ES数据进行马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛分析来约束Λ_{ω_s}CDM宇宙学。结果表明，新流体的压性因子和归一化密度分别为ω_s=0.294_{-0.004(0.023)}^{+0.014(0.015)}和10^{5}Ω_s=1.62_{-0.56(0.91)}^{+0.36(1.02)}。通过这两个额外参数，哈勃常数增加到H_0 = 71.51^{+0.72(1.43)}_{-0.74(1.46)} km/s/Mpc，从而实际上缓解了哈勃张力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，Λ_{ω_s}CDM模型能够有效缓解哈勃张力，将H_0提升至约71.5 km/s/Mpc，同时保持与现有宇宙学观测数据的一致性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Posteriors for the Λ ω s \Lambda_{\omega_{s}} CDM and Λ \Lambda CDM models with respect to the Planck 2018 CMB, DESI DR2, and Pantheon+ SH0ES data.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：Λ_{ω_s}CDM和ΛCDM模型相对于Planck 2018 CMB、DESI DR2和Pantheon+SH0ES数据的后验分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Evolution of the energy densities in the Λ ω s \Lambda_{\omega_{s}} CDM cosmology: Λ \Lambda (dotted gray), dust (dashed blue), radiation (solid red), and matter with pressure (dot–dashed green). Vertical black lines indicate, from left to right, recombination, dust–radiation equality, and dust–matter with pressure equality.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：Λ_{ω_s}CDM宇宙学中能量密度的演化：Λ（灰色虚线）、尘埃（蓝色虚线）、辐射（红色实线）和具有压力的物质（绿色点划线）。垂直黑线从左到右分别表示复合、尘埃-辐射相等和尘埃-具有压力的物质相等。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系盘具有有限的范围，但其中性原子氢（HI）成分如何以及在哪里结束尚未完全理解。自对旋涡星系NGC 3198的早期21厘米观测以来，HI盘在柱密度约10^19 cm^{-2}处存在断裂的观点一直存在争议。我们展示了来自MeerKAT HI观测邻近星系目标：观测南天天体（MHONGOOSE）巡天的16个恒星形成、晚型星系的HI径向轮廓，其HI质量范围从10^7 M_⊙到10^10 M_⊙。通过光谱叠加，我们探测了它们的HI盘，在千秒差距分辨率下，倾角校正后的柱密度低至几次10^17 cm^{-2}。高质量（M_HI > 10^9 M_⊙）星系的HI径向轮廓特征为内部平台，随后在柱密度约5×10^20 cm^{-2}处出现拐点，但未明确识别出边缘。低质量（M_HI < 10^9 M_⊙）星系的HI径向轮廓显示出更陡的下降，也未发现边缘。我们发现，当轮廓归一化到质量面密度达到0.01 M_⊙ pc^{-2}的半径时，它们具有自相似性，这与近期文献结果一致，但我们也发现归一化半径与环境之间可能存在相关性，表明环境对星系中HI分布的塑造有贡献。总体情况是，HI径向轮廓的多样性难以解释，未来需要更大样本的研究来量化不同星系中内部和外部过程在不同水平上的贡献。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：HI径向轮廓的多样性难以解释，未来需要更大样本的研究来量化不同星系中内部和外部过程在不同水平上的贡献。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Basic properties of the MHONGOOSE galaxies in our sample 1 1 1 The inclination angles refer to the optical disc. For further details see Table 1 of de Blok et al. ( 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：我们样本中MHONGOOSE星系的基本性质 1 1 1 倾角指光学盘。更多细节见de Blok等人（2024）的表1。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Extension of the J0459-26 velocity field. The left-side panel shows the moment 1 map derived from SoFiA-2 as part of the MHONGOOSE pipeline. Dashed contours refer to the approaching side, whereas solid lines correspond to receding velocities. In the right-side panel the extended velocity field is shown which is used to spectrally align the cube for stacking.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：J0459-26速度场的延伸。左侧面板显示来自SoFiA-2作为MHONGOOSE流程一部分的矩1图。虚线轮廓指接近侧，而实线对应后退速度。右侧面板显示用于光谱对齐立方体以进行叠加的延伸速度场。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Kinematical centre, position and inclination angle of the rings used to compute the H i radial profiles. 3 3 3 The angles are the medians over all rings as determined from the tilted-ring fit, while the uncertainties are the standard deviation. Values for J0335-24 and J1318-21 were taken from Veronese et al. ( 2025a ) and Healy et al. ( 2024 ) , respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：用于计算HI径向轮廓的环的运动学中心、位置和倾角。3 3 3 角度是来自倾斜环拟合的所有环的中位数，不确定性为标准差。J0335-24和J1318-21的值分别取自Veronese等人（2025a）和Healy等人（2024）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Elliptical regions used to derive the H i radial profile for J0309-41. In all panels, the moment 0 map of the galaxy is overlaid with the 30 ∘ 30^{\circ} -wide conical sectors, indicated with magenta lines, used to filter out the disturbances in the disc. In the central panel we overlay also the initial rings (in blue), whereas in the right-side panel we show only the parts of the annuli used to derive the clean H i radial profile.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：用于推导J0309-41的HI径向轮廓的椭圆区域。在所有面板中，星系的矩0图叠加了30°宽的锥形扇区（用洋红色线表示），用于过滤盘中的扰动。在中间面板中，我们还叠加了初始环（蓝色），而在右侧面板中，我们仅显示了用于推导干净HI径向轮廓的环的部分。

figures.caption_en: Table 3 : Azimuthal angles, with respect to the position angle of the receding side measured in the plane of the sky, excluded from the computation of the H i radial profile.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：从HI径向轮廓计算中排除的方位角（相对于在天平面测量的后退侧位置角）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : H i radial profile (top row) and its slope (bottom row) for each azimuthal sector for galaxies J1106-14 (left) and J0309-41 (right). The H i radial profile derived from the entire galaxy via stacking is reported with gray points. The points colour-coded with the ring filling factor refer to the H i radial profile derived for the moment 0 map. The coloured lines are the radial profile of each azimuthal sector as recovered via stacking only (see text for further details). The black dashed line is the 3 ​ σ 3\sigma noise level in the cube over 16 km s -1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：星系J1106-14（左）和J0309-41（右）每个方位角扇区的HI径向轮廓（上行）及其斜率（下行）。通过叠加从整个星系推导的HI径向轮廓用灰色点表示。颜色编码为环填充因子的点指从矩0图推导的HI径向轮廓。彩色线是仅通过叠加恢复的每个方位角扇区的径向轮廓（详见正文）。黑色虚线是立方体在16 km s^{-1}上的3σ噪声水平。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : H i radial profile (top row) and its slope (bottom row) for galaxies J1106-14 (left) and J0309-41 (right) after excluding disturbed sectors (only applies to J0309-41). The H i radial profile derived from stacking and from the moment 0 map is given with red and coloured points. The colour coding reflects the ring filling factor for the moment 0 map. The black and red shaded areas are the uncertainty from the moment 0 and stacking, respectively, derived from Monte Carlo simulations. The black dashed line is the 3 ​ σ 3\sigma noise level in the cube over 16 km s -1 and the black dotted line is the noise level achieved via stacking using the same definition.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：排除扰动扇区后（仅适用于J0309-41）星系J1106-14（左）和J0309-41（右）的HI径向轮廓（上行）及其斜率（下行）。从叠加和矩0图推导的HI径向轮廓分别用红色和彩色点表示。颜色编码反映矩0图的环填充因子。黑色和红色阴影区域分别是来自矩0图和叠加的不确定性，通过蒙特卡洛模拟推导。黑色虚线是立方体在16 km s^{-1}上的3σ噪声水平，黑色点线是使用相同定义通过叠加实现的噪声水平。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Clean H i radial profiles (top panel) and their slope (bottom panel) on the same radial scale for the 16 MHONGOOSE galaxies studied in this work. The coloured shaded areas are the uncertainty derived from Monte Carlo simulations.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：本研究中16个MHONGOOSE星系的干净HI径向轮廓（上方面板）及其斜率（下方面板）在同一径向尺度上。彩色阴影区域是通过蒙特卡洛模拟推导的不确定性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用兹威基瞬变设施第二次数据发布（ZTF DR2）中体积有限的样本（迄今为止最大的无选择偏倚的Ia型超新星数据集），约束了Ia型超新星的内在性质、消光以及超新星与宿主星系的概率性关联。我们采用贝叶斯分层模型，联合分析了SALT2光变曲线参数和宿主星系的全局性质（恒星质量及静止系g-z颜色）。所采用的模型是一个混合分布，代表对应于拉伸参数分布两种不同模式的两种超新星种群，以及对应于宿主星系参数空间两种模式（红色/大质量与蓝色/小质量）的两种宿主星系种群。受观测启发，高拉伸超新星被允许分布于两种宿主星系种群中，而低拉伸超新星则假定仅与红色/大质量宿主星系种群相关联。超新星星等-拉伸关系的明显非线性意味着超新星种群之间存在光度差距：在x1=0处，低拉伸种群更亮ΔMB=0.14±0.03星等，且斜率不同（Δα=0.064±0.023，低拉伸种群更陡）。在蓝色/小质量宿主星系种群中，平均消光系数为RB=3.89±0.29（与典型银河系值一致），该种群包含68%的高拉伸超新星；在红色/大质量宿主星系种群中，RB=3.08±0.08。宿主星系的阶梯校正（无论是恒星质量还是颜色）自然源于两种具有不同内在光度和消光的超新星种群在宿主星系种群中的分布方式。所采用的超新星种群与超新星-宿主关联建模框架使得宿主星系阶梯校正变得多余。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 宿主星系阶梯校正（恒星质量与颜色）自然源于两类超新星种群在不同宿主星系种群中的分布差异，所采用的建模框架使得此类校正变得冗余。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Supernova and host-galaxy populations observed as bimodalities in the stretch parameter distribution ( left panel ) and the joint distribution of the global host galaxy stellar masses and rest-frame ( g − z ) (g-z) colours ( right panel ). The light blue data points and histogram show the data from the ZTF DR2 volume-limited supernova sample used in this study. The dark blue and red lines show the Gaussian components of mixture models (orange dashed lines) fitted to the data. The directed graph represents the basic structure of the prior probability used in our modelling in which the low- x 1 x_{1} supernova population is fully associated with the red/massive host galaxy population, whereas the high- x 1 x_{1} supernovae are linked to either red or blue host galaxy populations.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：超新星和宿主星系种群表现为拉伸参数分布（左图）以及全局宿主星系恒星质量与静止系(g−z)颜色联合分布（右图）中的双峰性。浅蓝色数据点和直方图显示了本研究中使用的ZTF DR2体积有限超新星样本的数据。深蓝色和红色线条显示了拟合数据的混合模型（橙色虚线）的高斯分量。有向图表示我们建模中使用的先验概率的基本结构，其中低x1超新星种群完全与红色/大质量宿主星系种群相关联，而高x1超新星则与红色或蓝色宿主星系种群相关联。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Best-fit parameters of the prior probability distribution for the two supernova populations and their host galaxies. 3 3 3 Best-fit results are summarised as the posterior mean values and errors given by credible intervals containing 68 per cent of the marginalised probabilities. The uppermost part of the table shows the results for supernova intrinsic latent variables ( { M B , c int , x 1 , α , β } \{M_{\rm B},c_{\rm int},x_{1},\alpha,\beta\} ), the middle part for supernova extrinsic variables ( { E ​ ( B − V ) , R B } \{E(B-V),R_{\rm B}\} ) and the global host galaxy properties ( { M ⋆ , g − z } \{M_{\star},g-z\} ), the bottom part for the global parameters including correction due to pocket effect. The low-stretch SN population is associated only with the red, massive host galaxies, whereas the high-stretch SN population contributes to both host galaxy populations.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：两个超新星种群及其宿主星系的先验概率分布的最佳拟合参数。最佳拟合结果总结为后验均值以及由包含68%边缘化概率的可信区间给出的误差。表格最上部显示了超新星内在潜在变量（{MB, cint, x1, α, β}）的结果，中间部分显示了超新星外在变量（{E(B−V), RB}）和全局宿主星系性质（{M⋆, g−z}）的结果，底部部分显示了包括口袋效应校正的全局参数。低拉伸超新星种群仅与红色、大质量宿主星系相关联，而高拉伸超新星种群则对两种宿主星系种群都有贡献。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Constraints on the model parameters related to supernova intrinsic properties. The red and blue colours denote the low- x 1 x_{1} and high- x 1 x_{1} supernova populations, respectively. The contours show 1 ​ σ 1\sigma and 2 ​ σ 2\sigma credible regions containing 68 and 95 per cent of the 2D marginalised probability distributions. The obtained results are compared to currently available constraints on the two-population model from the Hubble-flow supernovae in the Pantheon+ catalogue (Wojtak & Hjorth, 2025 ) and from the Union3.1 supernova compilation (Rubin et al., 2026 ) . The figure demonstrates that the two supernova populations distinguished primarily by the bimodality of the stretch distribution, have different luminosities ( M B M_{\rm B} ), stretch-correction coefficients ( α \alpha ) and residual (unexplained) scatter in M B M_{\rm B} .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：与超新星内在性质相关的模型参数的约束。红色和蓝色分别表示低x1和高x1超新星种群。等高线显示了包含68%和95%二维边缘化概率分布的1σ和2σ可信区域。所得结果与目前来自Pantheon+星表中的哈勃流超新星（Wojtak & Hjorth, 2025）和Union3.1超新星汇编（Rubin et al., 2026）的双种群模型约束进行了比较。该图表明，主要通过拉伸分布双峰性区分的两个超新星种群具有不同的光度（MB）、拉伸校正系数（α）以及MB中的残余（未解释）弥散。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Constraints on the model parameters related to supernova extrinsic properties and host galaxy properties. The red and blue colours denote consistently the red/massive and blue/less massive host galaxy populations. The dark red shading and contours drawn with dashed lines show the constraints on the extrinsic properties of high-stretch supernovae in the red/massive host galaxies. The contours show 1 ​ σ 1\sigma and 2 ​ σ 2\sigma credible regions containing 68 and 95 per cent of the 2D marginalised probability distributions.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：与超新星外在性质和宿主星系性质相关的模型参数的约束。红色和蓝色一致地表示红色/大质量和蓝色/小质量宿主星系种群。深红色阴影和虚线绘制的等高线显示了红色/大质量宿主星系中高拉伸超新星的外在性质约束。等高线显示了包含68%和95%二维边缘化概率分布的1σ和2σ可信区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Correlations between the supernova stretch parameter x 1 x_{1} and colour c c , and the global stellar mass and rest-frame ( g − z ) (g-z) colour of the host galaxies. The lines show approximate iso-density contours enclosing 68 and 95 per cent of the data points in each panel. The three colours indicate approximate ranges of x 1 x_{1} dominated by low- x 1 x_{1} (red) and high- x 1 x_{1} (blue) supernova populations, as well as an intermediate region of population mixing (see Figure 1 ). The observations show that low- x 1 x_{1} supernovae are predominantly found in red ( g − z ≳ 1 g-z\gtrsim 1 mag) and massive ( log 10 ⁡ ( M ⋆ / M ⊙ ) ≳ 10 \log_{10}(M_{\star}/M_{\odot})\gtrsim 10 ) host galaxies, whereas high- x 1 x_{1} supernovae are observed across the full range of stellar masses and colours.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：超新星拉伸参数x1与颜色c，以及宿主星系的全局恒星质量和静止系(g−z)颜色之间的相关性。线条显示了每个面板中包含68%和95%数据点的近似等密度轮廓。三种颜色表示由低x1（红色）和高x1（蓝色）超新星种群主导的x1近似范围，以及种群混合的中间区域（见图1）。观测表明，低x1超新星主要出现在红色（g−z≳1星等）和大质量（log10(M⋆/M⊙)≳10）的宿主星系中，而高x1超新星则出现在恒星质量和颜色的整个范围内。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 当前模型预测，在银河系晕中距离超过80 kpc的地方，可以找到正在合并的人马座矮星系最早逃逸的恒星。然而，在这些距离上关于人马座流的数据有限。本研究考察了一个可能与并合碎片相关的红巨星分支（RGB）恒星超密度区域。利用拉斯坎帕纳斯天文台克莱望远镜的英田-京瓷阶梯光栅光谱仪，我们测量了这些恒星的视向速度和金属丰度。将其性质与关于人马座瓦解的模型预测以及来自暗能量光谱巡天第一版数据和天琴座RR变星星表的其他恒星示踪物进行了比较。光谱分析证实了其中四颗RGB星在完整六维相空间中显著紧密聚集。这个紧密星团嵌入在人马座流在南天的一个更大的分支状特征中。与人马座流模型的比较进一步强化了这一假设，并表明这个远距离分支可能由最初位于人马座矮星系晕中的恒星组成，这些恒星在相互作用的早期阶段被剥离。这四颗星的平均金属丰度为[Fe/H] = -1.46^{+0.11}_{-0.09}，其金属丰度弥散度为0.15^{+0.17}_{-0.08}，非常低。本研究首次提供了人马座远距离南向分支的光谱学视角，该分支由可能从人马座晕中剥离的恒星组成。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：该远距离南向分支很可能由人马座矮星系最早被剥离的晕族恒星组成，本研究首次提供了这一结构的光谱学观测证据。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 确定恒星年龄的一种技术是将恒星在赫罗图中的位置与理论恒星演化轨迹进行比较。次巨星演化阶段对年龄最为敏感，能够提供最精确的演化年龄估计。TOPoS样本中的恒星金属丰度来自低分辨率斯隆数字巡天光谱，其中包含大量具有盖亚任务精确视差的次巨星，可确定其演化年龄。本研究旨在利用该恒星样本探究银河系晕中的年龄-金属丰度关系。我们使用贝叶斯推断代码SPInS和理论BaSTI恒星演化轨迹来确定TOPoS恒星的年龄。结果显示，金属丰度随年龄减小而明显增加，但在任何给定年龄都存在相当大的弥散。在大于80亿年的年龄范围内，弥散极大，以至于年龄和金属丰度似乎不相关。在任何给定年龄，金属丰度分布呈多峰形态，最多有三个明显峰值。这些峰值对应三条年龄-金属丰度关系，我们初步将其识别为晕、厚盘和薄盘。我们的数据证明了并合事件在银河系演化（直至80亿年前）中的重要作用。在更近的时期，金属丰度弥散下降。一种可能性是，主要并合事件Gaia-香肠-盘状星系可能扰动了银河系邻近的星系，从而降低了并合率。化学演化模型和本星系群的宇宙学模型均支持并合在银河系早期演化中的重要性。需要更大、无偏或偏差明确的恒星样本（具有精确年龄）来进行模型与数据的定量比较。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 并合事件在银河系早期演化中起重要作用，Gaia-香肠-盘状星系并合可能降低了近期的并合率；需要更大、无偏或偏差明确的恒星样本进行定量模型比较。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种稳健的宇宙学约束，用于评估中微子质量之和（∑m_ν）在放宽标准假设（即纯粹绝热原初初始条件）时的结果。允许中微子密度等曲率（NDI）分量与绝热模式共存，我们分析了最新的CMB-SPA组合（Planck 2018、ACT DR6和SPT-3G）、DESI DR2重子声学振荡数据以及DES第五年超新星样本。在ΛCDM模型中，95%上限从∑m_ν < 0.052 eV（纯绝热）略微放宽至< 0.057 eV（包含NDI），且NDI振幅与零一致。在CPL动力学暗能量模型中，绝热上限为< 0.111 eV，加入NDI后变为< 0.115 eV，但等曲率模式仍未被探测到。尽管这些上限对包含等曲率扰动具有稳健性，但它们对假设的暗能量状态方程和∑m_ν的先验下限高度敏感。值得注意的是，绝热ΛCDM模型的上限0.052 eV低于正常中微子质量层级所需的最小和（0.05878 eV），表明该界限是统计先验延伸至零的人为产物。采用物理动机的层级信息先验后，上限提高至< 0.092 eV。我们的结果表明，当前数据未显示NDI模式的证据，且推断的中微子质量上限对该扩展具有稳健性，但要获得明确的、模型无关的界限，需解决先验依赖性和暗能量不确定性问题。本研究首次利用完整的CMB-SPA+DESI DR2+DES数据集对∑m_ν和NDI进行了联合约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：当前数据未发现中微子密度等曲率模式的证据，中微子质量上限对该扩展具有稳健性，但约束结果对暗能量模型假设和中微子质量先验高度敏感。要获得模型无关的确定上限，需解决先验依赖性和暗能量不确定性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Lensed CMB temperature and polarization angular power spectra assuming degenerate massive neutrinos. In the left panels, the predictions for a fixed neutrino density isocurvature fraction β = 0 \beta=0 and varying sums of neutrino masses ∑ m ν = 0.06 ​ eV \sum m_{\nu}=0.06\,\mathrm{eV} and 2 ​ eV 2\,\mathrm{eV} are compared. In the right panels, the sum of neutrino masses is fixed at ∑ m ν = 0.06 ​ eV \sum m_{\nu}=0.06\,\mathrm{eV} while the neutrino density isocurvature fraction is varied over β = 0 \beta=0 , 0.10 0.10 , and 0.50 0.50 , where β ​ ( k 1 ) = β ​ ( k 2 ) ≡ β \beta(k_{1})=\beta(k_{2})\equiv\beta is assumed here. Colors identify the neutrino mass, while line styles identify the neutrino density isocurvature fraction.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：假设简并大质量中微子时的透镜化CMB温度和极化角功率谱。左图比较了固定中微子密度等曲率分数β=0且中微子质量和∑m_ν分别为0.06 eV和2 eV时的预测。右图固定中微子质量和为∑m_ν=0.06 eV，同时改变中微子密度等曲率分数β=0、0.10和0.50，此处假设β(k₁)=β(k₂)≡β。颜色标识中微子质量，线型标识中微子密度等曲率分数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The same as Fig. 1 , but the matter power spectrum P m ​ ( k ) P_{m}(k) at z = 1.5 z=1.5 is shown here.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：与图1相同，但此处显示的是z=1.5处的物质功率谱P_m(k)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: One-dimensional posterior distribution of ∑ m ν \sum m_{\nu} in the Λ \Lambda CDM model under different initial condition assumptions. The solid lines represent the pure adiabatic initial conditions, while the dashed lines correspond to the mixed model including an neutrino density isocurvaturecomponent.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：ΛCDM模型中∑m_ν的一维后验分布，在不同初始条件假设下。实线代表纯绝热初始条件，虚线代表包含中微子密度等曲率分量的混合模型。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: One-dimensional posterior distribution of ∑ m ν \sum m_{\nu} in the Chevallier–Polarski–Linder model under different initial condition assumptions. The solid lines represent the pure adiabatic initial conditions, while the dashed lines correspond to the mixed model including an neutrino density isocurvaturecomponent.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：Chevallier–Polarski–Linder模型中∑m_ν的一维后验分布，在不同初始条件假设下。实线代表纯绝热初始条件，虚线代表包含中微子密度等曲率分量的混合模型。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Marginalized constraints on cosmological parameters for the Λ \Lambda CDM and Chevallier–Polarski–Linder models, considering different neutrino mass hierarchies (i.e., degenerate hierarchy, normal hierarchy, and inverted hierarchy). All error bars represent the 68 % 68\% confidence interval, while the upper bounds for ∑ m ν \sum m_{\nu} are given at the 95 % 95\% confidence level.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：ΛCDM和Chevallier–Polarski–Linder模型中宇宙学参数的边缘化约束，考虑不同中微子质量层级（即简并层级、正常层级和倒置层级）。所有误差棒代表68%置信区间，∑m_ν的上限以95%置信水平给出。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Triangle plot of all cosmological parameters in the Λ \Lambda CDM model. The solid lines represent the pure adiabatic initial conditions, while the dashed lines correspond to the mixed model including an neutrino density isocurvaturecomponent.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：ΛCDM模型中所有宇宙学参数的三角图。实线代表纯绝热初始条件，虚线代表包含中微子密度等曲率分量的混合模型。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Triangle plot of all cosmological parameters in the Chevallier–Polarski–Linder model. The solid lines represent the pure adiabatic initial conditions, while the dashed lines correspond to the mixed model including an neutrino density isocurvaturecomponent.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：Chevallier–Polarski–Linder模型中所有宇宙学参数的三角图。实线代表纯绝热初始条件，虚线代表包含中微子密度等曲率分量的混合模型。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提供了证据表明，赫克托星系巡天中的星系C901005481609968（$z_{\rm cl}=0.0553$）在光学积分场光谱中展现出空间延展的类LINER发射，其内部存在一个低光度活动星系核，对该星系的电离预算有显著贡献。尽管该星系未通过中红外AGN颜色标准被选为AGN，但钱德拉巡天数据揭示了一个致密的核X射线源，其$\log L_{\rm X}\approx41.46$ erg/s，支持LLAGN的存在。空间分辨的发射线诊断显示，在大多数信噪比$\geq 3$的像素中，线比值呈类LINER特征；而空间分辨的$τ$图（$τ\equiv Q_{\rm pAGB}/Q_{\rm req}$）表明，即使在最乐观的pAGB归一化下，大部分映射区域存在广泛的光子亏缺（$\logτ<0$），核区仍保持$τ< 1$。线比值-运动学测试未发现激波主导激发是延展发射主要驱动因素的证据，但现有数据无法排除局部或次主导的激波贡献。我们以该星系作为试点案例，因为赫克托IFS与独立的核X射线约束相结合，为空间分辨光子预算框架提供了严格验证。我们的结果表明，仅靠演化恒星族群无法解释观测到的发射，至少在内部区域需要额外的核电离源，并且一个微弱的LLAGN很可能对电离预算有贡献，尤其是在内部区域。我们的结果证明，延展的类LINER发射可能掩盖显著的LLAGN贡献，即使传统光学和红外AGN指示较弱，而空间分辨光子预算测试结合X射线约束能有效揭示这种隐藏活动。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：延展LINER发射可能掩盖显著的LLAGN贡献，空间分辨光子供需检验结合X射线约束能有效揭示这种隐藏的活动。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Emission-line flux maps (a–f), a DESI Legacy Surveys DR10 grz image (g; Dey et al. 2019 ), and BPT classification maps (h–j) and BPT diagnostic diagrams (k–m). Panels (a–f) use a common asinh stretch ( Q = 0.001 Q=0.001 ) with limits set by the 0.1–99.9 percentile of the combined (positive) flux distribution across the six lines; spaxels with S / N ≥ 3 {\rm S/N}\geq 3 are colored and those with S / N < 3 {\rm S/N}<3 are gray (Point Spread Function (PSF) FWHM shown in a). Panel (g) marks the map footprint (dotted box) and R eff , r R_{\rm eff,r} (ellipse; P.A.=116.97°); contours trace the stellar continuum, highlighting the bar. Panels (h–j) use spaxels with S / N ≥ 3 \mathrm{S/N}\geq 3 in all four BPT lines. In (k–m), spaxels are color-coded by radius; EW H ​ α < 3 {\rm EW}_{\rm H\alpha}<3 Å spaxels are white circles, and a representative error bar is shown (green: EW H ​ α ≥ 3 {\rm EW}_{\rm H\alpha}\geq 3 Å; black: EW H ​ α < 3 {\rm EW}_{\rm H\alpha}<3 Å). Background contours in (k–m) show SDSS galaxies from the OSSY (Oh-Sarzi-Schawinski-Yi) catalog (Oh et al. , 2011 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：发射线通量图（a–f）、DESI Legacy巡天DR10 grz图像（g；Dey等人，2019年）以及BPT分类图（h–j）和BPT诊断图（k–m）。面板（a–f）使用共同的asinh拉伸（Q=0.001），范围由六条线组合（正）通量分布的0.1–99.9百分位数设定；信噪比≥3的像素着色，信噪比<3的像素为灰色（面板a中显示点扩散函数半高全宽）。面板（g）标出图幅足迹（虚线框）和有效半径Reff,r（椭圆；位置角=116.97°）；等值线追踪恒星连续谱，突出棒结构。面板（h–j）使用所有四条BPT线中信噪比≥3的像素。在（k–m）中，像素按半径着色；EW Hα < 3 Å的像素为白色圆圈，并显示代表性误差棒（绿色：EW Hα ≥ 3 Å；黑色：EW Hα < 3 Å）。（k–m）中的背景等值线显示来自OSSY星表（Oh等人，2011年）的SDSS星系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Ionized-gas velocity dispersion and spatially resolved BPT classifications. Left: Map of the line-of-sight ionized-gas velocity dispersion, σ gas \sigma_{\rm gas} (in km ​ s − 1 {\rm km}~{\rm s}^{-1} ), from the Hector pipeline vdisp extension (corrected for instrumental resolution), shown for spaxels with S / N line ≥ 3 {\rm S/N}_{\rm line}\geq 3 in the BPT lines. Symbols indicate the [ N ii ] λ ​ 6583 \lambda 6583 /H α \alpha BPT classification: composite (purple circles), star-forming (blue triangles), and LINER-like (green squares). The empty diamond marks the stellar light center (flux-weighted continuum centroid), and the thick cross marks the spaxel with the maximum σ gas \sigma_{\rm gas} . The circle indicates the PSF FWHM ( 2.75 ′′ ≡ 5.50 2.75^{\prime\prime}\equiv 5.50 spaxels). No EW H ​ α {\rm EW}_{\rm H\alpha} cut is applied. Right: Distributions of σ gas \sigma_{\rm gas} for LINER-like (solid) and non-LINER (dashed; composite+star-forming) spaxels, normalized to unit area, illustrating a modest shift toward higher dispersions in the LINER-like population. Vertical lines indicate the medians of each distribution.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：电离气体速度弥散和空间分辨BPT分类。左图：来自赫克托管线vdisp扩展（经仪器分辨率校正）的视线方向电离气体速度弥散σgas（单位km/s），显示在BPT线中信噪比≥3的像素上。符号表示[N ii] λ6583/Hα BPT分类：复合（紫色圆圈）、恒星形成（蓝色三角形）和类LINER（绿色正方形）。空心菱形标记星光中心（通量加权连续谱质心），粗十字标记σgas最大的像素。圆圈表示PSF半高全宽（2.75″ ≡ 5.50像素）。未应用EW Hα截断。右图：类LINER（实线）和非类LINER（虚线；复合+恒星形成）像素的σgas分布，归一化至单位面积，显示类LINER群体向较高弥散的适度偏移。垂直线表示各分布的中位数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Emission-line properties in the WHAN diagram. Spaxels are color-coded by projected distance from the galaxy center. For comparison, we show SDSS galaxies and AGNs from the OSSY catalog at z < 0.07 z<0.07 , adopting the OSSY measurements and spectral classifications (Oh et al. , 2011 , 2015 ) . Crosses denote type 1 AGNs with Chandra detections (light-blue). Filled circles show type 2 AGNs with high [ O iii ] λ ​ 5007 \lambda 5007 luminosity (red; 10%; log ⁡ L [ OIII ] ¯ ∼ 41.2 \overline{\log L_{\rm[OIII]}}\sim 41.2 erg ​ s − 1 {\rm erg}~{\rm s}^{-1} ), type 2 AGNs with low [ O iii ] λ ​ 5007 \lambda 5007 luminosity (light-orange; 10%; log ⁡ L [ OIII ] ¯ ∼ 39.0 \overline{\log L_{\rm[OIII]}}\sim 39.0 erg ​ s − 1 {\rm erg}~{\rm s}^{-1} ), and star-forming galaxies (blue; 1%; log ⁡ SFR ¯ ∼ 1.0 ​ M ⊙ ​ yr − 1 \overline{\log{\rm SFR}}\sim 1.0~M_{\odot}\,{\rm yr}^{-1} ). The displayed type 2 AGNs in each [ O iii ] λ ​ 5007 \lambda 5007 -luminosity regime (10%) and star-forming galaxies (1%) are randomly selected from their respective parent samples to reduce overplotting.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：WHAN图中的发射线特性。像素按距星系中心的投影距离着色。作为比较，我们显示来自OSSY星表（Oh等人，2011年，2015年）在z<0.07处的SDSS星系和AGN，采用OSSY测量和光谱分类。叉号表示有钱德拉探测的1型AGN（浅蓝色）。实心圆表示高[O iii] λ5007光度（红色；10%；平均log L[OIII] ~ 41.2 erg/s）的2型AGN、低[O iii] λ5007光度（浅橙色；10%；平均log L[OIII] ~ 39.0 erg/s）的2型AGN以及恒星形成星系（蓝色；1%；平均log SFR ~ 1.0 M⊙/yr）。显示的每个[O iii] λ5007光度区间（10%）的2型AGN和恒星形成星系（1%）是从各自母样本中随机选取以减少重叠。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Line ratio versus velocity dispersion test for shock excitation. Each panel shows the spaxel-by-spaxel relation between the ionized-gas velocity dispersion σ gas \sigma_{\rm gas} and a low-ionization line ratio: log \log [ N ii ] λ ​ 6583 \lambda 6583 /H α \alpha (left), log \log [ O i ] λ ​ 6300 \lambda 6300 /H α \alpha (middle), and log \log [ S ii ] λ ​ λ ​ 6717 , 6731 \lambda\lambda 6717,6731 /H α \alpha (right). Spaxels are required to have S / N ≥ 3 {\rm S/N}\geq 3 in the relevant emission lines. Each panel reports Spearman’s rank correlation coefficient ρ s \rho_{s} (two-sided p p -value) and the partial Spearman coefficient ρ s ( | r ) \rho_{s}(\,|\;r) (two-sided p p -value) after controlling for projected radius r r . High-EW spaxels ( EW H ​ α ≥ 3 {\rm EW}_{\rm H\alpha}\geq 3 Å) are shown in red, and low-EW spaxels ( EW H ​ α < 3 {\rm EW}_{\rm H\alpha}<3 Å) are shown in black.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：激波激发的线比值与速度弥散测试。每个面板显示电离气体速度弥散σgas与低电离线比值之间的逐像素关系：log [N ii] λ6583/Hα（左）、log [O i] λ6300/Hα（中）和log [S ii] λλ6717,6731/Hα（右）。要求像素在相关发射线中信噪比≥3。每个面板报告斯皮尔曼等级相关系数ρs（双侧p值）以及控制投影半径r后的偏斯皮尔曼系数ρs(|r)（双侧p值）。高EW像素（EW Hα ≥ 3 Å）以红色显示，低EW像素（EW Hα < 3 Å）以黑色显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Spatially resolved EW H ​ α {\rm EW}_{\rm H\alpha} and ionizing-photon budget diagnostics. The top-left panel shows the EW H ​ α {\rm EW}_{\rm H\alpha} map. The three map panels in the left and middle columns show log ⁡ τ ≡ log ⁡ ( Q pAGB / Q req ) \log\tau\equiv\log(Q_{\rm pAGB}/Q_{\rm req}) computed for each spaxel for three pAGB ionizing-photon normalizations, q pAGB = 10 40.0 q_{\rm pAGB}=10^{40.0} , 10 40.5 10^{40.5} , and 10 41.0 10^{41.0} photons s -1 M ⊙ − 1 M_{\odot}^{-1} (low, fiducial, and high, respectively). Black contours overlaid on the three log ⁡ τ \log\tau map panels trace the stellar continuum proxy f cont ≡ F ​ ( H ​ α ) / EW H ​ α f_{\rm cont}\equiv F({\rm H}\alpha)/{\rm EW}_{\rm H\alpha} used to define the local stellar-mass surface density M ⋆ ​ ( i ) M_{\star}(i) in Section II.5 . Contour levels correspond to the 50th, 75th, 90th, and 97th percentiles of log 10 ⁡ f cont \log_{10}f_{\rm cont} across the valid spaxels, marking the nucleus, the half-light region, and the outskirts of the stellar light distribution. The top-right panel shows the cumulative AGN photon-budget ratio, log ⁡ [ Q AGN / Q req ( < r ) ] \log\!\left[Q_{\rm AGN}/Q_{\rm req}(<r)\right] , where Q req ( < r ) Q_{\rm req}(<r) is the cumulative required ionizing-photon rate within projected radius r r ; the shaded region spans log ⁡ Q AGN = 51.08 \log Q_{\rm AGN}=51.08 –52.33. The upper bound requires extreme bolometric corrections and ionizing fractions (see Section II.4 ). The bottom-right panel presents the radial profile of log ⁡ τ \log\tau , computed as annular medians; the shaded band marks the 16th–84th percentile range for the fiducial case. The horizontal dotted line at log ⁡ τ = 0 \log\tau=0 ( τ = 1 \tau=1 ) indicates where the pAGB photon output matches the ionizing requirement implied by the observed H α \alpha emission. Radial statistics include only bins containing at least N spaxel ≥ 20 N_{\rm spaxel}\geq 20 spaxels with S / N H ​ α ≥ 3 {\rm S/N}_{\rm H
figures.caption_zh: 图6：空间分辨的EW Hα和电离光子预算诊断。左上方面板显示EW Hα图。左列和中列的三个图面板显示对每个像素计算的log τ ≡ log(QpAGB/Qreq)，针对三种pAGB电离光子归一化：qpAGB = 10^40.0、10^40.5和10^41.0光子/s/M⊙（分别为低、基准和高）。三个log τ图面板上叠加的黑色等值线追踪恒星连续谱代理fcont ≡ F(Hα)/EW Hα，用于定义第II.5节中的局部恒星质量面密度M⋆(i)。等值线水平对应有效像素上log10 fcont的第50、75、90和97百分位数，标记核、半光区和恒星光分布外围。右上面板显示累积AGN光子预算比log[QAGN/Qreq(<r)]，其中Qreq(<r)是投影半径r内的累积所需电离光子率；阴影区域覆盖log QAGN = 51.08–52.33。上界需要极端热改正和电离分数（见第II.4节）。右下面板呈现log τ的径向轮廓，计算为环形中位数；阴影带表示基准情况下的第16–84百分位数范围。log τ = 0（τ = 1）处的水平虚线表示pAGN光子输出与观测Hα发射所隐含的电离需求相匹配之处。径向统计仅包含至少Nspaxel ≥ 20个信噪比Hα ≥ 3的像素的环带。

Left panel: [ N ii ] λ ​ 6583 \lambda 6583 /H α \alpha BPT diagnostic diagram showing the position of our target (green filled circles, color-coded by projected distance from the galaxy center), compared to sources with different ionization mechanisms, including LINER-like galaxies and AGNs from the literature with X-ray detections (Constantin et al. , 2009 ; González-Martín et al. , 2009 ; Oh et al. , 2015 ) . Right panel: Comparison between the 2 2 – 10 10 keV luminosity inferred from the H α \alpha -based SFR, L X , SFR L_{\mathrm{X,SFR}} , and the measured (spectral-fitting) value, L X , measured L_{\mathrm{X,measured}} . The thick dashed line marks the one-to-one relation, log ⁡ L X , SFR = log ⁡ L X , measured \log L_{\mathrm{X,SFR}}=\log L_{\mathrm{X,measured}} . The two dotted lines indicate offsets of + 2 +2 and + 4 +4 dex in log ⁡ L X , measured \log L_{\mathrm{X,measured}} relative to one-to-one, i.e., log ⁡ L X , SFR = log ⁡ L X , measured − 2 \log L_{\mathrm{X,SFR}}=\log L_{\mathrm{X,measured}}-2 and log ⁡ L X , SFR = log ⁡ L X , measured − 4 \log L_{\mathrm{X,SFR}}=\log L_{\mathrm{X,measured}}-4 .
figures.caption_zh: 图7：与各类有X射线探测的发射线星系的比较。左图：[N ii] λ6583/Hα BPT诊断图，显示我们目标的位置（绿色实心圆，按距星系中心的投影距离着色），与文献中具有不同电离机制（包括类LINER星系和AGN）且有X射线探测的源（Constantin等人，2009年；González-Martín等人，2009年；Oh等人，2015年）进行比较。右图：基于Hα的恒星形成率推断的2–10 keV光度LX,SFR与测量值（光谱拟合）LX,measured的比较。粗虚线标记一对一关系log LX,SFR = log LX,measured。两条虚线表示log LX,measured相对于一对一关系偏移+2和+4 dex，即log LX,SFR = log LX,measured - 2和log LX,SFR = log LX,measured - 4。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 除了传统的氢巴尔默发射线外，本文还将一些活动星系核（AGNs）中发生的光学变脸（CL）现象扩展到光学FeII复合体。多历元光谱观测使我们能够将本地平谱射电源OQ~208识别为一个新的FeII CL-AGN，原因是其强FeII复合体（RFe ≡ FeII/Hβ=0.64）和巴尔默宽发射线在约14年的时间尺度上同时消失。这种同时消失表明，在该天体中，FeII和巴尔默发射均来自暴露于电离连续谱的同一区域。我们进一步在Panda & Sniegowska (2024)近期研究的数十个CL-AGN中，发现CL事件期间FeII强度与连续谱（以及爱丁顿比）之间存在反相关，表明RFe对L_5100和L_bol/L_Edd均呈负响应；这可以通过热、光学薄吸积流中的康普顿化过程来理解。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：FeII和巴尔默发射线来自同一对电离连续谱敏感的区域；RFe的负响应可由热、光学薄吸积流中的康普顿化过程解释。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Upper panel: Spectral evolution of OQ 208 from 2005 to 2024. The top spectrum shown by cyan is taken from Wang et al. (2006), the second spectrum is from SDSS DR16, and the lower three spectra were obtained in this study. Lower panel: The differential spectrum in the rest frame generated from the SDSS DR16 (high-state) and Shane (low-state) spectra (see the main text for details). The SDSS DR16 spectrum is binned by a boxcar of 3 Å. The main emission lines are labeled in both panels.

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Spectral decomposition and emission-line profile fitting. Upper-left panel: The continuum modeling of the “turn-off” spectrum taken by the Lick/Shane 3 m telescope. The observed rest-frame spectrum (heavy black curve) is fitted by a linear combination of a starlight component (cyan curve) and an underlying AGN power law with a free slope (magenta curve). The best-fit continuum and isolated emission-line spectrum are shown by the blue curve at the bottom and the overplotted red curve, respectively. The individual components are shifted vertically by arbitrary amounts for clarity. Lower-left panel: The same as the upper-left panel but for the differential spectrum. Middle panels: Line-profile modeling for the H β \beta region in the emission-line isolated spectra (see the left panels). The modeling is based on a linear combination of a set of Gaussian functions. The observed and modeled line profiles are shown by black and red solid lines, respectively. The blue dashed lines show the Gaussian functions resulting from the fitting. The residuals between the observed and modeled profiles are presented in the subpanel below. Right panels: Same as the middle panels, but for the H α \alpha region.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个双场暴胀系统中线性动力学的精确解析解，其中原初曲率扰动ζ与熵质量为μ的等曲率扰动σ耦合。该解在准德西特背景下对任意μ值和无量纲相互作用强度λ均有效，因此提供了对ζ与轻等曲率场相互作用（通常与快速转弯暴胀相关）的强耦合区域的分析控制。作为首次应用，我们以闭合形式推导了原初功率谱的振幅，得到了一个在弱耦合、强耦合、轻场和重场区域之间插值的表达式。这些结果为研究功率谱之外的多场可观测量（包括非高斯性、粒子产生和圈图修正）的分析研究开辟了道路。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该解析解为研究功率谱之外的多场可观测量（如非高斯性、粒子产生和圈图修正）提供了分析基础，开辟了强耦合双场暴胀可解析研究的新途径。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们在受控环境中阐明了弱非高斯宇宙学场在场级与摘要统计量级的信息增益来源。具体而言，我们比较了场级推断（FLI）与标准功率谱加双谱（P+B），以及由星系密度场的局部幂次的自谱和互谱构建的一族复合算符相关函数（OCs）。前向模型是一个具有单一局部二次耦合λ和高斯噪声的线性密度场；这一最小非线性设置插值于纯高斯数据集（λ=0）与非高斯数据集（λ~1）之间，同时保持解析结构可处理。FLI通过MCMC联合采样初始条件、偏差和噪声参数实现；摘要后验通过基于模拟的推断（SBI）以及Fisher估计获得。在高斯极限下，P+B、OCs和FLI产生等效约束，与微扰预期一致。随着非线性耦合λ增加，基于摘要的模型参数不确定性比FLI增长更快，导致固定摘要集的信息损失增加。这种损失通过添加对应至多六点函数的OCs在很大程度上（但非完全）得到恢复。对于噪声更低的数据，FLI的信息损失更为显著，此时对应至多六点函数的摘要仍捕获显著少于场级的信息。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要的结论：场级推断在非高斯性增强和低噪声场景下比传统统计量方法具有显著优势，表明高阶统计量（如6点函数）仍不足以完全捕捉场级信息，场级推断是更优的信息提取方式。

The dashed black line indicates the fiducial value λ fid = 1 \lambda^{\mathrm{fid}}=1 , and the shaded region marks the burn-in phase that is discarded before the analysis.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：λ^fid=1模拟的λ迹线图。TPI链显示为蓝色，四条RPI链显示为不同颜色。黑色虚线表示基准值λ^fid=1，阴影区域标记分析前丢弃的燃烧阶段。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系团的演化过程会影响其成员星系的特性。我们对红移 $z_{\rm c}=0.151$ 的星系团 WHY J050106.2+013714 进行了联合 X 射线与光学分析。爱因斯坦探针后续 X 射线望远镜的观测表明，该星系团处于动力学年轻状态。其平均 X 射线温度为 $2.8^{+0.4}_{-0.3}$ keV，总光度为 $9.4\pm0.3\times10^{43}$ erg s$^{-1}$，与典型扰动星系团的标度关系一致。值得注意的是，该星系团拥有一个由六个大质量星系组成的多重合并最亮星系团星系系统，总恒星质量为 $1.16\times10^{12}M_{\odot}$。我们探测到一个清晰定义的星系团内光成分，延伸至 310 kpc 的尺度。在 DESI 遗留巡天中对合并最亮星系团星系进行的系统搜索表明，这种六重合并最亮星系团星系在本地宇宙中极为罕见。此外，其他合并最亮星系团星系也可能在中等扰动的星系团中形成，这为最亮星系团星系的形成提供了宝贵见解。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：其他合并的BCG也可能在中等扰动的星系团中形成，这为理解BCG的形成机制提供了宝贵见解。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 引力波事件和星系都追踪宇宙物质分布，但天体物理黑洞与原初黑洞的并合预计会占据不同的环境，因此具有不同的成团偏袒。引力波成团偏袒因此成为一种统计可观测量，可用于区分这两类群体。我们通过将中国空间站巡天望远镜（CSST）的光度星系巡天与来自两个未来探测器网络的模拟引力波星表进行互相关，评估了这种区分的可行性：第三代ET2CE网络（爱因斯坦望远镜和两台宇宙探索者探测器）以及多波段BDET2CE网络，后者增加了基于空间的基线Decihertz干涉引力波天文台。我们发现，CSST结合10年的ET2CE观测，可以在原初黑洞占总并合率比例超过约40%时揭示其贡献，而BDET2CE更精确的天空定位将此阈值降低至约20%。这一改进源于恢复了小尺度成团信息，否则这些信息会被定位误差抹去。这些结果表明，未来引力波探测器网络与CSST星系成团的结合，为统计识别原初黑洞提供了一条有前景且很大程度上独立的途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：未来引力波探测器网络与CSST星系巡天的结合，为统计识别原初黑洞提供了一条有前景且独立的途径。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 当今的 peculiar 速度场源于原初密度涨落，并在宇宙的整个寿命期间被塑造。诸如 ΛCDM 等宇宙学模型对 peculiar 速度的各种统计特性做出了预测。体流（给定体积内的平均速度）由于各向同性，其期望值为零，而其方差直接与哈勃常数、结构增长率和物质功率谱相关。本文利用夏威夷超新星流数据集中子集内的 Ia 型超新星（SNe Ia）的红移以及光学和近红外距离估计，来推断红移 z ≲ 0.1 范围内的体流。推断出的速度在约 100 至 400 km/s 之间变化，但均与 ΛCDM 的预测一致。作为次要关注点，我们讨论了由方法论的离散选择引入的系统不确定性，这些选择涉及两种体流估计器、两种类型的 SNe Ia 距离估计器以及覆盖波长空间中两个不同区域的数据。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：ΛCDM模型能够很好地描述当前宇宙的体流速度场；同时，方法论的选择（包括估计器类型、距离估计方法和波长波段）会引入系统不确定性，值得关注。

figures.caption_zh: 表1：夏威夷超新星流数据集中呈现的样本由用于推断距离模数的模型以及用于推断的数据是否仅包含光学数据或同时包含光学和近红外数据来定义。主要样本（无 O(J) 后缀）和 OJ 样本均使用光学和近红外数据，但后者已被截断，以包含与其对应 O 样本中相同的 SNe Ia。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: We use the Peery MVE (top row) and Nusser MLE (bottom row) methods to analyse 1500 mock catalogues with simulated bulk flows. The differences between the recovered ( B → \vec{B} ) and simulated ( B → sim \vec{B}_{\text{sim}} ) values are plotted against simulated values, with the left three columns representing Cartesian projections of the bulk flow and the rightmost column representing the total speed of the bulk flow. The differences in the rightmost column include the trace of the covariance matrix of B → \vec{B} to account for the positive expectation values of Maxwellian distributions. The red lines show the best-fitting linear models ( y = m ​ x + b y=mx+b ) with inverse-variance weighting. All quantities are in units of km s -1 except for the slopes m m and χ ν 2 \chi^{2}_{\nu} values which are dimensionless. Note that the presented slope values are scaled by a factor of 100. The uncertainties on | B → | |\vec{B}| were calculated with the covariance matrix, which may differ from the root quadrature sum of uncertainties on B → ⋅ x ^ α \vec{B}\cdot\hat{x}^{\alpha} . The bulk flows presented here were simulated as a uniform peculiar velocity field over a fully spherically symmetric survey volume, assuming a Planck cosmology during simulation and analysis.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们使用 Peery MVE（上排）和 Nusser MLE（下排）方法分析了 1500 个模拟体流的模拟星表。恢复值 ( B → ) 与模拟值 ( B → sim ) 之间的差异相对于模拟值绘制，左侧三列表示体流的笛卡尔投影，最右侧列表示体流的总速度。最右侧列的差异包括 B → 协方差矩阵的迹，以考虑麦克斯韦分布的正期望值。红线显示了具有逆方差加权的最佳拟合线性模型 ( y = m x + b )。所有量的单位均为 km s⁻¹，但斜率 m 和 χ²_ν 值无量纲。注意，呈现的斜率值已乘以因子 100。|B →| 的不确定性使用协方差矩阵计算，这可能与 B → · x̂^α 不确定性的均方根和不同。此处呈现的体流被模拟为完全球对称巡天体积上的均匀 peculiar 速度场，在模拟和分析中均假设普朗克宇宙学。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The same format as Figure 1 , but the bulk flows presented here were simulated as the field induced by a point-source mass outside a declination-limited ( − 40 ​ ° < δ < 60 ​ ° -40\degree<\delta<60\degree ) survey volume. The B → sim \vec{B}_{\text{sim}} values were calculated for the actual survey volume, and the significant slopes are evidence of the definitional discrepancy described in Section 4.2.1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：格式与图1相同，但此处呈现的体流被模拟为由赤纬限制（-40° < δ < 60°）巡天体积外的一个点源质量所诱导的场。B → sim 值针对实际巡天体积计算，显著的斜率证明了第 4.2.1 节中描述的定义差异。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The same format as Figure 2 , but the definitional discrepancy described in Section 4.2.1 is avoided by instantiating the tracers within a declination-limited volume but calculating B → sim \vec{B}_{\text{sim}} as though in a spherically symmetric volume.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：格式与图2相同，但通过将示踪粒子实例化在赤纬限制体积内，但如同在球对称体积中一样计算 B → sim，从而避免了第 4.2.1 节中描述的定义差异。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The same format as Figure 3 , but the recovery methods assumed a SH0ES cosmology, deviating from the Planck cosmology used in the simulation.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：格式与图3相同，但恢复方法假设了 SH0ES 宇宙学，偏离了模拟中使用的普朗克宇宙学。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: We use the Peery MVE and Nusser MLE methods to estimate bulk flow in the SNPY_EBV, SNPY_EBV_O, SNPY_EBV_OJ, SALT, SALT_O, and SALT_OJ samples. We summarise the cosmic covariance matrices 𝚺 cos \bm{\Sigma}_{\text{cos}} with the root of their traces, but use the full matrices in combination with the estimator covariance matrices when calculating p-values (See Equation 20 ). Parenthetical values are 1 σ \sigma uncertainties, and all quantities are in units of km s -1 except for the p-values, which are dimensionless.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：我们使用 Peery MVE 和 Nusser MLE 方法估计了 SNPY_EBV、SNPY_EBV_O、SNPY_EBV_OJ、SALT、SALT_O 和 SALT_OJ 样本中的体流。我们用其迹的平方根总结了宇宙协方差矩阵 Σ_cos，但在计算 p 值时使用完整矩阵以及估计器协方差矩阵（参见方程 20）。括号内的值为 1σ 不确定性，所有量的单位均为 km s⁻¹，但 p 值无量纲。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: We present the diagonal components of the tensor angle-averaged window-function 𝑾 ~ 2 ​ ( k ) \bm{\tilde{W}}^{2}(k) for the SNPY_EBV sample, calculated using Equation 8 and weights inferred for the Peery MVE. The matter power spectrum generated with CAMB using H 0 ≈ 70.7 H_{0}\approx 70.7 km s -1 Mpc -1 and q 0 = − 0.51 q_{0}=-0.51 is provided for comparison since Σ i ​ j , cos ∝ ∫ 0 ∞ P ​ ( k ) ​ W ~ i ​ j 2 ​ ( k ) ​ d k \Sigma_{ij,\text{cos}}\propto\int_{0}^{\infty}P(k)\tilde{W}_{ij}^{2}(k)\mathrm{d}k . The solid lines show the nominal window functions calculated with μ obs \mu_{\text{obs}} , and in reduced opacity, we plot 10 additional window functions calculated with the same weights but with random realizations of μ obs \mu_{\text{obs}} based on σ μ \sigma_{\mu} .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：我们展示了 SNPY_EBV 样本的张量角平均窗口函数 W̃²(k) 的对角分量，使用方程 8 和针对 Peery MVE 推断的权重计算。使用 CAMB 生成的物质功率谱（H₀ ≈ 70.7 km s⁻¹ Mpc⁻¹，q₀ = -0.51）作为比较，因为 Σ_{ij,cos} ∝ ∫₀^∞ P(k) W̃_{ij}²(k) dk。实线显示了使用 μ_obs 计算的标称窗口函数，在降低透明度的情况下，我们绘制了另外 10 个使用相同权重但基于 σ_μ 的 μ_obs 随机实现计算的窗口函数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The same format as Figure 1 , but the radial peculiar velocities were estimated through the Watkins & Feldman ( 2015 ) estimator reproduced in Equation 28 . This led to recovered speeds ∼ 9 % \sim 9\% ( ∼ 7 % \sim 7\% ) larger than the simulated values for the Peery MVE (Nusser MLE) method. Similar overestimates are seen when varying the shape of the survey volume, type of bulk flow simulated, and the cosmology assumed for simulation and analysis, although mismatches between the last two terms can increase or decrease the scale of the overestimation.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：格式与图1相同，但径向 peculiar 速度通过 Watkins & Feldman (2015) 估计器（在方程 28 中重现）估计。这导致 Peery MVE（Nusser MLE）方法恢复的速度比模拟值大约 9%（约 7%）。在改变巡天体积形状、模拟体流类型以及模拟和分析所假设的宇宙学时，也观察到类似的过高估计，尽管后两项之间的不匹配可能会增加或减少过高估计的幅度。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系团内介质（ICM）富含化学元素，这些元素由过去约120亿年间的核心坍缩超新星（SNIcc）和Ia型超新星（SNIa）产生。虽然星系团外围区域均匀富集了约0.3太阳丰度的铁，表明气体在星系聚集成团之前或期间已被预先增丰，但在松弛星系团的核心，铁丰度已知会向中心增加。然而，这些中心铁峰的起源，以及先前在多个系统中心报告的神秘铁丰度下降现象，仍有待澄清。本文通过测量X射线明亮、邻近的英仙座星系团中铁的空间分布及其与Si/Fe、S/Fe、Ar/Fe、Ca/Fe、Cr/Fe、Mn/Fe和Ni/Fe的相对比值，来探讨这两个问题。我们利用了XRISM卫星上Resolve微量热计提供的前所未有的光谱分辨率（约5 eV），该仪器在其性能验证阶段观测了英仙座星系团四个不同指向，覆盖至约250 kpc（约0.2r₅₀₀）。尽管存在一个X射线明亮的活跃星系核（AGN），给精确量化核心区域的绝对丰度带来挑战，但我们的基线分析以超过2σ的置信度排除了显著的铁丰度下降，这与先前的CCD测量结果不同。此外，我们发现X/Fe比值在空间上高度均匀，支持了最亮星系团星系NGC 1275的晚期SNIa增丰可忽略的观点。我们还将英仙座星系团ICM的整体化学组成与SNcc和SNIa核合成产率模型进行了比较，发现无需两个独立的SNIa增丰通道即可令人满意地再现ICM的比值。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，英仙座星系团核心未发现铁丰度突然下降，ICM化学组成可由单一通道的Ia型超新星增丰解释，NGC 1275的晚期Ia型超新星贡献可忽略。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们研究了多场Higgs-$R^2$暴胀中原初非高斯性的产生，重点关注双曲场空间流形中瞬态转向轨迹的影响。我们计算了完整的双谱，不依赖于慢滚或局域近似，并追踪了曲率和等曲率扰动的完整超视界演化。我们表明，瞬态转向有效地将等曲率涨落转移到绝热扇区，产生了可观尺度的局域非高斯性。对于基准的Higgs非最小耦合$ξ_h = 0.1$和四次耦合$λ= 10^{-10}$，我们得到$f_{\rm NL}^{\rm loc}\simeq -17.7$。随着Higgs非最小耦合的增加，转向速率逐渐被抑制，模型趋近于有效单场吸引子，恢复了Maldacena一致性关系$f_{\rm NL}\rightarrow 0.0159$。将我们的预测与当前CMB约束进行比较，我们发现原初非高斯性是对Higgs非最小耦合的敏感探针，并能显著限制该模型的可允许参数空间。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，原初非高斯性是对Higgs非最小耦合的敏感探针，能有效限制该模型的可允许参数空间。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : The turning rate parameter (upper panel), and slow-roll parameter ϵ H \epsilon_{H} (bottom panel) as a function of the number of e-folds N e N_{e} for the initial conditions h 0 = 10 − 5 h_{0}=10^{-5} and ϕ 0 = 5.7 \phi_{0}=5.7 and the parameter values ξ h = 0.1 , λ = 10 − 10 , ξ s = 4 × 10 8 \xi_{h}=0.1\,,\lambda=10^{-10}\,,\xi_{s}=4\times 10^{8} . The gray region is the e-fold interval over which the transient turn occurs.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：对于初始条件$h_0=10^{-5}$和$\phi_0=5.7$，以及参数值$\xi_h=0.1$、$\lambda=10^{-10}$、$\xi_s=4\times 10^8$，转向速率参数（上图）和慢滚参数$\epsilon_H$（下图）作为e-fold数$N_e$的函数。灰色区域是发生瞬态转向的e-fold区间。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Upper panel: Evolution of the non-linear parameter f NL f_{\text{NL}} for a nonminimal coupling ξ h = 0.1 \xi_{h}=0.1 in the equilateral and local shapes. Bottom panel: The nonminimal coupling parameter dependence of f NL f_{\text{NL}} . The horizontal dashed line corresponds to the Maldacena consistency relation value of single field inflation, f NL → 0.0159 f_{\text{NL}}\to 0.0159 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：上图：非最小耦合$\xi_h=0.1$时，等边和局域形状的非线性参数$f_{\rm NL}$的演化。下图：$f_{\rm NL}$对非最小耦合参数的依赖性。水平虚线对应单场暴胀的Maldacena一致性关系值$f_{\rm NL}\to 0.0159$。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Evolution of f NL f_{\text{NL}} evaluated on the equilateral triangle for the pivot scale k ∗ k_{*} and for nonminimal coupling parameter ξ h = 0.1 \xi_{h}=0.1 with Higgs field’s initial condition h 0 = 10 − 4 h_{0}=10^{-4} in Planck units.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：对于标度$k_*$的等边三角形，非最小耦合参数$\xi_h=0.1$且Higgs场初始条件$h_0=10^{-4}$（以普朗克单位表示）时，$f_{\rm NL}$的演化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Shape dependence of the non-linear parameter. Amplitude of f NL f_{\text{NL}} in the ( α , β ) (\alpha,\beta) plane for the Higgs- R 2 R^{2} model evaluated at the benchmark nonminimal coupling ξ h = 0.1 \xi_{h}=0.1 . The physically allowed triangular configurations are bounded by the condition α + β ≤ 1 \alpha+\beta\leq 1 (dashed line). While the bispectrum amplitude exhibits a relatively flat plateau across the equilateral ( α = 0 , β = 1 / 3 \alpha=0,\beta=1/3 ) and folded ( α = 0 , β = 0 \alpha=0,\beta=0 ) configurations with moderate values, it experiences a sharp negative enhancement towards the vertices of the domain. This drastic divergence at the boundaries corresponds exactly to the squeezed limits (e.g., k 1 ≪ k 2 ≃ k 3 k_{1}\ll k_{2}\simeq k_{3} ), visually confirming that the primordial non-Gaussianity in this model is overwhelmingly dominated by the local shape driven by superhorizon isocurvature transfer.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：非线性参数的形状依赖性。在基准非最小耦合$\xi_h=0.1$下，Higgs-$R^2$模型在$(\alpha,\beta)$平面上的$f_{\rm NL}$振幅。物理允许的三角形构型受条件$\alpha+\beta\leq 1$（虚线）限制。双谱振幅在等边（$\alpha=0,\beta=1/3$）和折叠（$\alpha=0,\beta=0$）构型附近呈现相对平坦的平台，具有中等数值，但在区域顶点处经历急剧的负增强。边界处的这种剧烈发散恰好对应于挤压极限（例如$k_1\ll k_2\simeq k_3$），直观地证实了该模型中的原初非高斯性主要由超视界等曲率转移驱动的局域形状主导。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了PSZ，这是由普朗克合作组编制的包含1962个星系团及候选体的元星表。PSZ包含了所有官方普朗克星表探测的完全更新验证信息，以及已确认星系团的红移估计，且无重复条目。验证来源于光学和X射线后续观测活动，并辅以与具有红移信息的外部星表以及XMM-Newton档案数据的交叉匹配。所考虑的外部星表包括全天X射线星表MCXC-II、eROSITA X射线星系团星表、RASS-MCMF和PSZ-MCMF星表，以及Burenin的扩展普朗克星表。通过这一过程，共有281个星系团被新确认；相反，262个普朗克候选体被否定。在1500个已确认的星系团中，274个更新了红移，278个获得了新分配的红移。为631个星系团分配了MCXC-II对应体，更新了普朗克星表中已发表的MCXC交叉匹配。讨论了与Bahk和Hwang的PSZ2更新的差异。我们进一步引入了一种新的、同质推导的质量估计，并针对内禀散射和底层质量函数性质引起的选择效应进行了修正。为所有源提供了Y5R500-θs平面上的新后验概率等高线，以及相应的M500(z)简并曲线。PSZ包含已确认星系团的修正和未修正M500值。提出了一种星表间交叉识别的方法。我们表明，简单的固定距离匹配不足以完成此任务，并证明了基于质量代理、红移以及距离与角大小比较进行额外一致性检查的必要性。最终的PSZ包含1500个已确认的星系团、262个噪声主导的探测和200个等待验证的候选体。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，PSZ提供了一个统一、更新且无重复的Planck星系团元星表，包含更可靠的质量估计和交叉匹配方法，相比固定距离匹配更有效。

The two components, 1eRASS J040416.5-270519 at z p ​ h ​ o ​ t = 0.2955 ± 0.0055 z_{\mathrm{p}hot}=0.2955\pm 0.0055 and 1eRASS J040418.7-270310 at z p ​ h ​ o ​ t = 0.3006 ± 0.0057 z_{\mathrm{p}hot}=0.3006\pm 0.0057 are resolved by eROSITA (middle panel) but not by Planck (left panel).

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Example of a PSZ cluster with STATUS=Confusion . Planck , X–ray and DESI images from left to right with layout as in Fig. 1 . PSZ2 G028.63+50.15 appears as a single diffuse emission in the Planck image (left). It is associated with MCXC J1540.1+1752 (red cross and circle) at z s ​ p ​ e ​ c = 0.0916 z_{\mathrm{s}pec}=0.0916 , coincident with A2108 (green point). ACT-CL J1540.0+1756 is a background cluster at z s ​ p ​ e ​ c = 0.386 z_{\mathrm{s}pec}=0.386 (purple) and a separate entry in PSZ. Both clusters are detected in the SDSS data, as WHL J154019.0+175123 ( z s ​ p ​ e ​ c = 0.0912 z_{\mathrm{s}pec}=0.0912 ) and WHL J154000.1+175609 ( z s ​ p ​ e ​ c = 0.3873 z_{\mathrm{s}pec}=0.3873 ), clearly visible in the DESI image (yellow squares in right panel). The XMM- Newton image (middle panel) reveals the complexity of the region, with 3 diffuse components, not resolved in the Planck and RASS images. The North component is the ACT cluster. The two other components correspond to the z = 0.09 z=0.09 cluster which appears bimodal, with a North-East component around the BCG of WHL J154019.0+175123 and a South-West component centred on a second bright galaxy, SDSS J153946.46+175007.8 at the same redshift ( z s ​ p ​ e ​ c = 0.0889 z_{\mathrm{s}pec}=0.0889 ), marked by yellow/orange circle in middle and right panel. PSZ2 G028.63+50.15 and MCXC J1540.1+1752 centers are located between the 3 X–ray peaks. The signal of PSZ2 G028.63+50.15 and MCXC J1540.1+1752 is the projection of the z = 0.09 z=0.09 and z = 0.39 z=0.39 clusters.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：一个状态为“混淆”的PSZ星系团示例。从左到右依次为普朗克、X射线和DESI图像，布局如图1所示。PSZ2 G028.63+50.15在普朗克图像（左侧）中表现为单一弥散发射。它与红移光谱z_spec=0.0916的MCXC J1540.1+1752（红色十字和圆圈）相关联，并与A2108（绿色点）重合。ACT-CL J1540.0+1756是一个红移光谱z_spec=0.386的背景星系团（紫色），在PSZ中为单独条目。两个星系团均在SDSS数据中被检测到，分别为WHL J154019.0+175123（红移光谱z_spec=0.0912）和WHL J154000.1+175609（红移光谱z_spec=0.3873），在DESI图像（右侧面板中的黄色方块）中清晰可见。XMM-Newton图像（中间面板）揭示了该区域的复杂性，包含3个弥散成分，在普朗克和RASS图像中未被分辨。北部分量为ACT星系团。另外两个成分对应于红移z=0.09的星系团，该星系团呈双峰结构，东北成分围绕WHL J154019.0+175123的BCG，西南成分以同一红移（红移光谱z_spec=0.0889）的第二亮星系SDSS J153946.46+175007.8为中心，在中间和右侧面板中用黄/橙色圆圈标记。PSZ2 G028.63+50.15和MCXC J1540.1+1752的中心位于3个X射线峰值之间。PSZ2 G028.63+50.15和MCXC J1540.1+1752的信号是红移z=0.09和z=0.39星系团的投影。

Left : Distance between each PSZ candidate and its possible two-way eRASS association versus their relative distance in terms of θ 500 \theta_{500} computed at the eRASS redshift. Regions A, B, and C are shown in green, yellow, and red, respectively. Green/red dots indicate whether the association is finally kept/rejected. Right : Deviations from the Y 500 Y_{500} - L 500 L_{500} relation as a function of the S/N ratio of the eRASS detection. Grey points correspond to matching clusters used to calibrate the relation (filled circles) and objects with same distance and redshift constrains at lower S/N (open circles). Green/orange points are PSZ candidates in the green/yellow regions of the left panel. Candidates in the yellow region are manually checked. Empty red squares mark the associations that we finally discarded (one confusion case and 4 false candidates). Three candidates, marked with green open circle in the left panel and green squares in the right panel, were confirmed from further cross-match with other catalogues.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：将PSZ候选体与eRASS星系团匹配的标准。左图：每个PSZ候选体与其可能的双向eRASS关联之间的距离，相对于以eRASS红移处计算的θ500表示的相对距离。区域A、B和C分别以绿色、黄色和红色显示。绿/红点分别表示关联最终被保留/拒绝。右图：Y500-L500关系的偏差与eRASS探测信噪比的函数关系。灰点对应于用于校准关系的匹配星系团（实心圆）以及在较低信噪比下具有相同距离和红移约束的天体（空心圆）。绿/橙点是左图绿色/黄色区域中的PSZ候选体。黄色区域中的候选体经过人工检查。红色空心方块标记我们最终丢弃的关联（一个混淆案例和4个假候选体）。三个候选体（左图中绿色空心圆，右图中绿色方块）通过与其他星表的进一步交叉匹配得到确认。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : Criteria for matching PSZ candidates to RASS-MCMF clusters. The distance between each PSZ candidate and its possible two-way RASS-MCMF association is plotted against their relative distance in terms of the PSZ cluster size θ 500 \theta_{500} recalculated at the RASS-MCMF redshift. Regions A, B, and C are shown in green, yellow, and red, respectively. Green/red dots indicate, for PSZ candidates (without z), whether the association is finally kept/rejected. The rest of the points (in grey) correspond to PSZ clusters with a redshift (plotted only in regions A and B, for clarity). Black empty circles highlight PSZ clusters for which there is a redshift difference of | Δ ​ ( z ) | / ( 1 + z ) > 0.05 \left|\Delta(z)\right|/(1+z)>0.05 . Those coloured in blue are the ones for which we have updated the redshift.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：将PSZ候选体与RASS-MCMF星系团匹配的标准。每个PSZ候选体与其可能的双向RASS-MCMF关联之间的距离，相对于以PSZ星系团大小θ500（在RASS-MCMF红移处重新计算）表示的相对距离。区域A、B和C分别以绿色、黄色和红色显示。绿/红点表示对于PSZ候选体（无红移），关联最终被保留/拒绝。其余点（灰色）对应于有红移的PSZ星系团（为清晰起见，仅绘制在区域A和B中）。黑色空心圆突出显示红移差|Δ(z)|/(1+z) > 0.05的PSZ星系团。蓝色标记的是我们已更新红移的星系团。

artifacts.abstract_zh: Motivated by the recent measurements by the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI) which suggest a late-time matter density approximately 5\% lower than that inferred from Planck we investigate models in which dark matter decays to two less massive, and thus warm, states. The decaying dark matter (DDM) models are parameterized by the fraction $f$ of dark matter that decays, the decay rate $Γ$, and the fraction $\varepsilon$ of the mass retained by the decay products. To efficiently explore the warm decay product regime, we employ \texttt{CLASSIER-DDM}, a modified version of the public Boltzmann solver \texttt{CLASS} that solves the perturbation equations with DDM via an integral-equation method. We consider DESI DR2 baryon acoustic oscillations and Planck 2018 CMB data including lensing, and find that DDM models are not favored over the $Λ$CDM model. This result arises because CMB lensing tightly constrains the velocity kicks imparted to decay products. For example, for $f\simeq0.5$, we find $1σ$ constraints to the decay-product kick velocities an order of $10^{-2}$ to $10^{-3}$ times the speed of light for decay redshifts from shortly after recombination until today. Nonetheless, the allowed parameter space includes models with sufficient power suppression at small-scales to potentially address dwarf galaxy anomalies. Our results also suggest that explanations for DESI that involve dark-matter decays to one massive and one massless particle will be constrained by CMB lensing.
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 暗物质衰变解释DESI异常受CMB透镜效应严重制约，但模型仍保留解决小尺度问题的潜力；对暗物质衰变为一个重粒子一个无质量粒子的解释同样受约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The 1 ​ σ 1\sigma upper limit on ( v kick / c ) (v_{\rm kick}/c) in the ( Γ − 1 , f ) (\Gamma^{-1},f) plane. Yellow regions indicate tighter constraints (smaller allowed deviations from v kick = 0 v_{\rm kick}=0 ).

Figure 2: The 1 ​ σ 1\sigma upper limit to v kick v_{\rm kick} in units of the speed of light as a function of DDM parameters. Left: 1 σ \sigma upper limit on v kick / c v_{\rm kick}/c versus Γ − 1 \Gamma^{-1} , with curves colored by f f . The black dashed line shows the expected scaling ∝ ( 1 + z d ) 1 / 2 \propto(1+z_{d})^{1/2} for Γ − 1 < 1 \Gamma^{-1}<1\, Gyr. Right: 1 σ \sigma upper limit on v kick / c v_{\rm kick}/c versus f f , with curves colored by Γ − 1 \Gamma^{-1} . The black dashed line shows the expected scaling ∝ f − 1 / 2 \propto f^{-1/2} .

Figure 3: Fractional deviations from Λ \Lambda CDM in the matter power spectrum (top), temperature power spectrum C ℓ T ​ T C^{TT}_{\ell} (middle), and lensing power spectrum C L ϕ ​ ϕ C^{\phi\phi}_{L} (bottom). Each curve corresponds to a DDM model with a different decay lifetime Γ − 1 \Gamma^{-1} at fixed f = 0.1 f=0.1 , with the mass retention parameter ε \varepsilon set such that it yields the 1 σ \sigma upper limit on v kick v_{\rm kick} . The vertical dashed lines in the P ​ ( k ) P(k) and C ℓ C_{\ell} panels indicate the free-streaming wavenumber k fs = 2 ​ π / λ fs k_{\rm fs}=2\pi/\lambda_{\rm fs} and free-streaming multipole moment ℓ fs \ell_{\rm fs} , respectively, for selected models.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用JWST第2周期NIRCam和NIRSpec观测，在红移z=6.5412的类星体场J0226+0302中，探测星系、活动星系核（AGN）与再电离期间星系际介质（IGM）之间的直接联系。该场此前由JWST ASPIRE项目观测，并在单个NIRCam指向中探测到8个[OIII]发射星系（5.3<z<6.4）。通过新的NIRCam和NIRSpec观测，我们额外识别出65个线发射星系（5.3<z<6.4）。IGM-星系交叉相关函数显示，在距星系约10-40 cMpc处，IGM透射率比平均值高出约2 sigma，表明恒星形成星系所在区域对再电离期间局部电离背景有显著贡献。该交叉相关函数与THESAN模拟一致，其中IGM中性分数为5%-7%，星系平均电离光子逃逸分数f_esc为6%。在NIRSpec观测的49个线发射星系中，我们通过探测宽Hα发射线识别出4个AGN，AGN比例为(8±4)%。通过测量AGN周围的IGM有效光学深度和IGM-AGN交叉相关函数，我们发现AGN周围5 cMpc/h内的IGM透射率高于大多数[OIII]发射体。我们将IGM透射率超出解释为AGN的局部辐射增强，并根据IGM-AGN交叉相关函数估计AGN的f_esc为50%-100%。未来的JWST NIRSpec类星体场观测将提供更具约束力的IGM-AGN交叉相关函数，进一步揭示星系和AGN在再电离中的作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：星暴星系和AGN的局域辐射对再电离有显著贡献，AGN的逃逸分数远高于星系；未来JWST NIRSpec观测可进一步约束IGM-AGN交叉相关函数。

The quasar at z = 6.5412 z=6.5412 is marked with a black star. All spectroscopically confirmed galaxies at 5.38 < z < 6.4 5.38<z<6.4 are denoted by dots. The size of the markers is scaled with M 1500 M_{\rm 1500} of the source, and the marker is color-coded by the source redshift z s z_{s} .

The average redshift of sources is z = 5.73 z=5.73 and the average IGM transmission ( 1 ​ σ 1\sigma range) at z = 5.73 z=5.73 is denoted by the blue shaded area (Yang et al. , 2020 ) . The IGM-galaxy cross-correlation functions from 6 EIGER quasar fields are plotted in a green solid line ( 5.5 < z < 5.7 5.5<z<5.7 ) and a green dotted line ( 5.7 < z < 6.1 5.7<z<6.1 ) (Kashino et al. , 2025 ) . The IGM-galaxy cross-correlation function measured from two most transparent quasar sightlines at z = 5.7 z=5.7 is plotted in purple (adapted from Zhu et al. 2026 ).

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The IGM-galaxy cross-correlation function extracted from THESAN snapshots, using galaxies with halo masses M h > 10 10.55 ​ M ⊙ {\rm M}_{h}>10^{10.55}\;\!{\rm M_{\odot}} ( Huang et al. 2026 , see also Eilers et al. 2024 ). The redshift of each THESAN snapshot is color-coded. The IGM galaxy cross-correlation function measured in the J0226 field is plotted in red.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：从THESAN快照中提取的IGM-星系交叉相关函数，使用暗晕质量Mh>10^{10.55} M⊙的星系（Huang等人，2026；另见Eilers等人，2024）。每个THESAN快照的红移用颜色编码。J0226场中测量的IGM-星系交叉相关函数用红色绘制。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 磁场在大质量原星团形成中可能很重要，但其作用仍缺乏约束。我们展示了W33 A（一个距离2.4 kpc的大质量恒星形成区）的1.2 mm ALMA全偏振观测，角分辨率为0.3角秒（730 au）。该区域被解析为20个致密核和9条纤维结构。从线性偏振尘埃辐射推断出的天平面磁场显示出多样结构：两个近乎垂直的大尺度分量分别指向西北-东南和东北-西南方向，以及朝向毫米波峰值MM1和MM2的两个局部特征。西北-东南分量可能由分子外流塑造。东北-西南分量沿主纤维F1、F-Main和Tail保持连贯，所有这些纤维都表现出跨阿尔芬湍流。在F-Main中，线质量超过湍流临界值，意味着需要磁支撑来防止径向坍缩并抑制碎裂。在F1和Tail中，仅湍流就能支撑气体对抗引力，尽管磁场可能提供额外支撑。朝向MM1，磁场遵循由CH3CN示踪的螺旋状下落流。吸积气体的跨阿尔芬状态表明湍流的有效磁阻尼以及一个磁调控的层流吸积流为核供料。朝向MM2，磁场呈现出由抛物线曲线拟合的沙漏形态。两种独立方法给出约8.1(1.9) mG的一致场强，维里分析表明磁场在延迟MM2坍缩方面具有动力学重要性。在单个原星团内，磁场可以稳定纤维、调控吸积并延迟核坍缩，突显了它们在大质量恒星形成中的多样化动力学作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：磁场在大质量原星团中扮演多重的动力学角色：稳定纤维结构（如F-Main需磁场支持抗径向坍缩）、调控吸积流（MM1中磁阻尼维持层流吸积）、延迟核心坍缩（MM2中磁场在动力学上重要）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : The overview of the W33 complex. The background color map is produced with the data from the Spitzer 3.6 and 8.0 μ \mu m and the Herschel 70 μ \mu m. Left: Three massive clumps W33 A, W33 Main, and W33 B are defined within the surface density threshold of 0.5 g cm -2 (Lin et al. 2016 ) in red, purple and blue contours, respectively. Right: The zoom-in view of W33 A which corresponds to the white dashed box on the left panel. The green circle outlines the primary beam response of 0.2 of the MagMaR observations.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：W33复合体的概览。背景色图由斯皮策3.6和8.0微米以及赫歇尔70微米的数据生成。左图：三个大质量团块W33 A、W33 Main和W33 B分别以红色、紫色和蓝色等高线定义在0.5 g cm⁻²的面密度阈值内（Lin等人，2016）。右图：W33 A的放大视图，对应左图中的白色虚线框。绿色圆圈标出了MagMaR观测的0.2主波束响应。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : The background gray-scale map shows the 1.2 mm continuum emission with a 4 ​ σ I = 0.52 ​ mJy beam -1 4\sigma_{I}=0.52\penalty 10000\ \mbox{mJy\penalty 10000\ beam${}^{-1}$} contour. The getsf -identified cores are shown in orange ellipses and filaments in green spines. A filament called “Tail”, as outlined by the blue rectangle, is added to our filament sample. There are two cores C10 and C17 outside the current field. The synthesized beam and the scale bar are both shown in the bottom.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：背景灰度图显示1.2 mm连续辐射，带有4σ_I = 0.52 mJy beam⁻¹的等高线。橙色椭圆和绿色脊线分别表示getsf识别的核和纤维。蓝色矩形标出的称为“Tail”的纤维被添加到我们的纤维样本中。当前视场外有两个核C10和C17。合成波束和比例尺均显示在底部。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Characteristics of the cores detected by ALMA 1.2 mm observations in the W33 A region. 1 1 1 RA and Dec are ICRS coordinates. FWHM gives the measured major and minor full width at half maximum. R deconv R_{\rm deconv} is the physical size in au deconvolved from the synthesized beam. I ν peak I^{\rm peak}_{\rm\nu} and S ν int S^{\rm int}_{\rm\nu} are the peak intensity and integrated flux density at 1.2 mm, respectively. M core M_{\rm core} is the molecular gas mass of core assuming a dust temperature of 25 ± 5 ​ K 25\pm 5\penalty 10000\ \mathrm{K} . For a hot molecular core ( T gas > 100 ​ K T_{\rm gas}>100\penalty 10000\ \mathrm{K} ), such mass should be a upper limit. ⟨ n H 2 ⟩ \langle n_{\rm H_{2}}\rangle is the core-averaged volume density of molecular hydrogen. T gas T_{\rm gas} is the gas temperature by fitting CH 3 CN K-ladders under the LTE assumption.

Assuming dust temperature of 25 ± 5 25\pm 5 K, ⟨ N H 2 ⟩ \langle{N}_{\rm H_{2}}\rangle and ⟨ n H 2 ⟩ \langle n_{\rm H_{2}}\rangle denote the mean column and volume densities filament. M fila M_{\rm fila} is the total filament mass, and M / l M/l represents the filament line mass. Uncertainties in parentheses indicate 1 σ \sigma errors.

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : The ALMA 1.2 mm Stokes I continuum emission (color map and contours) is overlaid with B-field directions (yellow segments) every half beam, rotated by 90 ∘ 90^{\circ} from the dust polarization directions. See Sect. 5.3 for more details. δ ​ v los nt \delta v^{\rm nt}_{\rm los} : turbulent velocity dispersion measured from H 13 CO + (3-2) line, averaged over the region of interest. n n (H 2 ): volume density of molecular hydrogen measured from the 1.2 mm dust continuum. ( 2010 ) , (e) is assumed due to the moderate POS inclination angle for W33 A. B pos B_{\rm pos} : B-field strength in the plane of the sky. B tot B_{\rm tot} : total B-field strength corrected by inclination angle. v A v_{A} : Alfvénic speed. ℳ A \mathcal{M}_{A} : Alfvénic Mach number.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：从DCF方法导出的磁场强度及相关参数总结。³δψ_int：去除局部角度不确定性后的偏振位置角本征弥散。对于MM1螺旋，有两种方法：(a) 去除核大小为三个波束的平滑磁场后。(b) 未去除任何平滑场的原始弥散（上限）。详见第5.3节。δv_los^nt：从H¹³CO⁺(3-2)谱线测量的湍流速度弥散，在感兴趣区域上平均。n(H₂)：从1.2 mm尘埃连续辐射测量的分子氢体积密度。(c) 该值重新计算为MM2区域上的平均密度，而非表1中计算的最致密部分。i：倾角；(d) 取自de Wit等人(2010)，(e) 因W33 A的适中天平面倾角而假设。B_pos：天平面磁场强度。B_tot：经倾角校正的总磁场强度。v_A：阿尔芬速度。ℳ_A：阿尔芬马赫数。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 高红移（z>6）明亮类星体（QSO）拥有早期宇宙中一些增长最快的超大质量黑洞（SMBH）。表征其冷星际介质（ISM）对于确定其演化至关重要。我们利用新的ALMA Band 3观测数据，针对CO(6-5)谱线和约100 GHz连续谱，并结合档案及文献中的ALMA/NOEMA数据，研究了十个HYPERION类星体的分子气体、冷尘埃、恒星形成、气尘比以及电离态ISM。我们在八个目标中探测到约100 GHz连续谱发射，在四个QSO宿主（J025-33、J083+11、J231-20和J0252-0503）以及J231-20的伴星系中探测到CO(6-5)发射。推断的分子气体质量约为10^10太阳质量，而未探测到的目标给出了几个10^9太阳质量的上限，表明HYPERION种群内分子储库的范围很广。对于J025-33和J083+11，远红外（FIR）光谱能量分布（SED）采样良好，得出较低的尘埃温度，分别为36^{+13}_{-7} K和32^{+4}_{-3} K，远低于z>6类星体的平均值。结合气体和尘埃质量，我们发现J083+11的气尘比为16^{+5}_{-4}，这是在高红移类星体宿主中测量到的最低值之一。我们还在J025-33中探测到[NII] λ205 μm发射，并在J083+11中初步探测到，表明存在致密或高度结构化的电离气体。最后，我们初步识别出尘埃温度T_dust、X射线光子指数Γ和C IV速度偏移之间的关联。这些趋势可能表明，更强大的外流将尘埃从中心活动星系核（AGN）加热源重新分布，降低了其温度，并削弱了大尺度尘埃储库与X射线冕之间的联系。总体而言，HYPERION类星体表现为一个异质种群，其中SMBH增长、恒星形成、气体消耗、金属增丰和反馈过程并不必然同步。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：HYPERION类星体是一个高度异质的种群，其黑洞增长、恒星形成、气体消耗、金属增丰和反馈过程并不必然同步。尘埃温度与X射线及C IV发射的关联可能表明更强大的外流将尘埃从中心AGN加热源重新分布，降低了尘埃温度并削弱了大尺度尘埃储库与X射线冕之间的联系。
