The gray background points show the whole halo K-giant sample and the markers of different colors show the five clusters identified by HDBSCAN . From top left to bottom right, panels show the distribution of stars in spaces defined by (a) energy and angular momentum (IoM space). The black solid (dashed) line at L z < 0 L_{z}<0 represents the track of prograde (retrograde) circular orbits; (b) [Fe/H] and [ α \alpha /Fe] (chemical space); (c) Galactocentric radial velocity and distance; (d) V r V_{r} and V ϕ V_{\phi} (velocity in Galactocentric spherical coordinates); (e) orbital pericenter and apocenter; and (f) eccentricity and Galactocentric distance. The legend in Panel (c) shows the color scheme for the clusters used in all the panels and throughout the paper.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：HDBSCAN各次扫描的总结。灰色背景点显示整个银晕K巨星样本，不同颜色的标记显示HDBSCAN识别出的五个星团。从左上到右下，面板显示了恒星在以下空间中的分布：(a)能量和角动量（IoM空间）。L_z<0处的黑色实线（虚线）代表顺行（逆行）圆形轨道的轨迹；(b)[Fe/H]和[α/Fe]（化学空间）；(c)银心径向速度和距离；(d)V_r和V_ϕ（银心球坐标速度）；(e)轨道近心点和远心点；(f)偏心率和银心距。面板(c)中的图例显示了所有面板及全文中使用的星团颜色方案。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了与黑洞吸积率预测相关的核区条件（气体密度和动力学温度）的空间分辨秒差距尺度测量结果，研究对象为塞弗特2星系NGC 1068。我们将这些参数输入邦迪型吸积模型的预设公式中，然后将所得吸积率预测值与基于硬X射线观测得到的经验吸积率进行比较。宇宙学模拟的空间分辨率范围从约10秒差距到约千秒差距尺度，因此为了进行合理比较，我们在像素大小的径向步长内（最远至500秒差距）测试了这些吸积率预测。与暖H₂气体相比，CO气体是靠近超大质量黑洞的主要质量载体。我们发现，仅使用CO测量的冷分子气体的邦迪吸积率（Ṁ_Bondi）在黑洞周围的小孔径（r≲5秒差距）内高估了真实吸积率高达14个数量级，在大孔径（r≲500秒差距）内至少高估了8个数量级。这些结果是吸积率预设公式直接测试系列中的首个，表明在塞弗特2星系的模拟中使用邦迪吸积形式来描述超大质量黑洞吸积可能导致吸积率被高估。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：在塞弗特2星系的模拟中使用邦迪吸积形式来描述超大质量黑洞吸积可能导致吸积率被严重高估。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Nuclear region of NGC 1068 in the CO(2-1) flux (left, from ALMA), 2.2 μ \mu m line+continuum (middle), and the continuum subtracted rovibrational H 2 1-0 S(1) transition (right), described in Section III . The CO(2-1) moment 0 map is masked below 3 × \times rms and the red box in the CO(2-1) moment map represents the field of view of the NIR data. The very small, magenta circle in the bottom left represents the beam size of the ALMA data (20 × \times 20 mas). All three images show flux peaks at the AGN’s location and both the CO and H 2 maps have enhanced emission in the CND ring. The red circle in the H 2 1-0 S(1) moment map represents the aperture in which T kin is calculated in Figure 3 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：NGC 1068的核区，分别显示CO(2-1)通量（左图，来自ALMA）、2.2微米谱线+连续谱（中图）以及连续谱减除后的转动振动H₂ 1-0 S(1)跃迁（右图），详见第三节。CO(2-1)矩0图在3倍均方根以下被掩蔽，CO(2-1)矩图中的红色方框表示近红外数据的视场。左下角的洋红色小圆圈表示ALMA数据的波束大小（20×20毫角秒）。三幅图像均在活动星系核位置显示通量峰值，CO和H₂图在环核盘环状结构中均有增强发射。H₂ 1-0 S(1)矩图中的红色圆圈表示图3中计算动力学温度T_kin的孔径。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Left : Moment 0 map of CO(2-1) in NGC 1068, with flux density values masked below 3 × \times rms. The red circle indicates the location and size of the 100 pc aperture (centered on the AGN) corresponding to the red dot in the right panel, which has M enc , H 2 + He {}_{{enc,H_{2}+He}} = (1.57 ± 0.57 ) × \pm\ 0.57)\times 10 8 M ⊙ . The small, magenta circle in the bottom left represents the beam size of the ALMA data 20 × \times 20 mas). Right : Integrated mass profile inside the radial aperture. Details on the conversion to molecular gas mass can be found in Section IV.2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左图：NGC 1068中CO(2-1)的矩0图，通量密度值在3倍均方根以下被掩蔽。红色圆圈表示100秒差距孔径的位置和大小（以活动星系核为中心），对应右图中的红点，其包络质量M_enc,H₂+He = (1.57 ± 0.57) × 10⁸ M⊙。左下角的洋红色小圆圈表示ALMA数据的波束大小（20×20毫角秒）。右图：径向孔径内的积分质量分布。关于转换为分子气体质量的详细信息见第四节第2小节。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: ( Left :) Column density in the upper level of each H 2 1-0 S(0), S(1), and S(2) transition as a function of energy level of that transition as a temperature (K) inside a r = 21 pc circular aperture centered on the AGN as shown in Figure 1 . The best fit slope (using linear regression), as described in Section IV.3.2 , is the temperature of the gas in that region if we assume LTE. ( Right :) T kin estimated as in the excitation diagram on the left but instead inside circular apertures matching the methods of Section IV.2 from 0.2” to 1.7” in steps of 0.1”. The mean of the derived temperatures is 1612 + 2840 − 1216 \begin{subarray}{c}+2840\\ -1216\end{subarray} K.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：（左图：）每个H₂ 1-0 S(0)、S(1)和S(2)跃迁上能级的柱密度，作为该跃迁能级温度（开尔文）的函数，位于以活动星系核为中心、半径r=21秒差距的圆形孔径内（如图1所示）。最佳拟合斜率（使用线性回归），如第四节第3小节所述，在假设局部热动平衡的情况下代表该区域的气体温度。（右图：）动力学温度T_kin的估计，方法与左图激发图相同，但位于与第四节第2小节方法匹配的圆形孔径内，从0.2角秒到1.7角秒，步长0.1角秒。推导出的温度平均值为1612 +2840 -1216 K。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: X-ray and (Cold-derived) Bondi accretion rates as a function of radius over which nuclear parameters are measured. Color bars and ranges displayed to the right denote uncertainties on each X-ray measurement. Regardless of which gas component is used to estimate M ˙ Bondi \dot{{M}}_{{Bondi}} , the Bondi prescription overestimates M ˙ BH \dot{{M}}_{{BH}} by orders of magnitude, and is above the Eddington rate (orange line, with radiative efficiency ϵ \epsilon = 0.1). For the cold gas case, which represents the majority of gas available for accretion in NGC 1068, Bondi overpredicts the accretion rate by between 10 and 14 orders of magnitude.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：X射线和（冷气体衍生的）邦迪吸积率作为核区参数测量半径的函数。右侧显示的色条和范围表示每个X射线测量的不确定性。无论使用哪种气体成分来估计Ṁ_Bondi，邦迪预设公式都会高估Ṁ_BH数个数量级，并且高于爱丁顿吸积率（橙色线，辐射效率ε=0.1）。对于冷气体情况（代表NGC 1068中可用于吸积的大部分气体），邦迪吸积率高估了吸积率10到14个数量级。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Accretion rate measurements and estimates for rates derived from X-ray luminosities and the pure Bondi accretion prescription inside various radii. In NGC 1068, where the cold gas phase makes up the bulk of the gas mass in the nucleus, the cold gas derived Bondi accretion estimate outpaces the X-ray derived accretion rates by between 10 and 14 orders of magnitude. *H 2 1-0 S(1) and S(2) lines required to calculate temperature for the Bondi calculation are not detected in this aperture.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：基于X射线光度以及不同半径内纯邦迪吸积预设公式推导的吸积率测量值和估计值。在NGC 1068中，冷气体相构成核区气体质量的主体，冷气体衍生的邦迪吸积估计值比X射线衍生的吸积率高出10到14个数量级。*在此孔径内未检测到计算邦迪吸积所需温度的H₂ 1-0 S(1)和S(2)谱线。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们首次构建了从瓦解致密星团中产生的银河系可探测致密天体-亮星双星种群模型。通过将EMP-Pathfinder模拟预测的星团映射到N体星团蒙特卡洛模型，我们桥接了宇宙学尺度上的星团形成与致密天体双星的高分辨率动力学演化。我们预测，在银河系历史中，从现已瓦解的致密星团中释放到银河系的、与亮星伴星组成的双星系统数量约为：3×10^5个白矮星、1.5×10^5个黑洞和1×10^3个中子星。利用gaiamock管道进行的合成观测显示，模拟的Gaia DR3探测结果稀少（90%置信度下约2个白矮星、0个中子星、0个黑洞），大多数系统位于探测视界之外。预计Gaia DR4对这些系统的观测产量提升有限，因为扩大搜索体积带来的好处在很大程度上被更远源的天体测量和测光精度下降所抵消（约14个白矮星、0个中子星、0个黑洞）。尽管黑洞双星种群与白矮星相似，但其探测频率远低于白矮星；它们倾向于与质量更低、更暗的伴星配对，且其长轨道周期的时间覆盖较少。对于中子星，我们认为观测到的贫金属、晕族系统比例过高与瓦解致密星团起源不一致。相反，观测到的Gaia中子星种群可能反映了贫金属矮星系吸积进入银河系、孤立双星演化或超新星物理的过程。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：观测到的贫金属、晕族中子星双星与瓦解致密星团起源不一致，更可能源于贫金属矮星系吸积、孤立双星演化或超新星物理。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left: The lifetime of EMP- Pathfinder disrupted clusters vs. their initial mass. Due to the assumption of a constant initial half-mass radius, these quantities are correlated; more massive clusters tend to have longer lifetimes. Right: Cluster metallicity vs. initial mass, for EMP- Pathfinder clusters that disrupt (blue), as well as globular cluster analogues (orange). In the simulation, ≈ 70 \approx 70 % of the clusters disrupt. Of the survivors, only ≈ 2 \approx 2 % are older than 10 10 Gyr and are similar in number and mass to the observed Milky Way GCs (Reina-Campos et al. , 2022 ) . These clusters cover a wide range of metallicities and masses, notably overlapping with the CMC cluster models described in Section III .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左图：EMP-Pathfinder瓦解星团的寿命与其初始质量的关系。由于假设恒定的初始半质量半径，这两个量是相关的；质量越大的星团往往寿命越长。右图：星团金属丰度与初始质量的关系，针对EMP-Pathfinder中瓦解的星团（蓝色）以及球状星团类似物（橙色）。在模拟中，约70%的星团瓦解。在幸存者中，只有约2%的星团年龄超过100亿年，其数量和质量与观测到的银河系球状星团相似（Reina-Campos等人，2022）。这些星团覆盖了广泛的金属丰度和质量范围，尤其与第三节描述的CMC星团模型重叠。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Left: The cluster distances from the Sun, for a single realization of the Sun’s position in the Galaxy. The dashed (dotted) line shows generous upper limits on the detection horizon for Gaia DR3 (DR4). Of the disrupted clusters, ≈ 0.6 % \approx 0.6\% are within the DR3 limit of 3 kpc and ≈ 70 % \approx 70\% are within that of DR4 at 10 kpc. Middle: The galactocentric radii of the clusters in the snapshot directly after disruption. Most clusters disrupt closer to the Galactic centre than the Sun, which is located at 8.24 kpc. These values overlap with those of the CMC models (see Section III ). Right: The age of the Universe at the time of cluster disruption.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左图：对于太阳在银河系中位置的一次实现，星团与太阳的距离。虚线（点线）显示了Gaia DR3（DR4）探测视界的慷慨上限。在瓦解的星团中，约0.6%位于DR3的3千秒差距限制内，约70%位于DR4的10千秒差距限制内。中图：瓦解后瞬间快照中星团的银心半径。大多数星团在比太阳（位于8.24千秒差距）更靠近银心的地方瓦解。这些值与CMC模型的值重叠（见第三节）。右图：星团瓦解时的宇宙年龄。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The spatial locations of the disrupted massive star clusters from EMP- Pathfinder within a simulated Milky Way-like galaxy, directly following their disruption, in cartesian coordinates. The possible locations of the Sun throughout the Galaxy are shown by the orange annulus. We rotate the location of the Solar System around the X-Y plane to account for the stochastic spatial variation of clusters in the Galaxy relative to an observer. An example realization of the Solar System’s location is indicated by the orange star. The Gaia observation horizons are approximate and most binaries will remain undetectable even within the indicated radii.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在模拟的银河系类似星系中，EMP-Pathfinder瓦解的大质量星团在瓦解后立即在笛卡尔坐标中的空间位置。太阳在银河系中的可能位置由橙色环表示。我们围绕X-Y平面旋转太阳系的位置，以考虑星团相对于观测者在银河系中的随机空间变化。太阳系位置的一个示例实现由橙色星表示。Gaia观测视界是近似的，即使在所示半径内，大多数双星仍将无法探测。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The property distributions of CO binary systems sampled from CMC for different mappings from EMP- Pathfinder . Blue lines indicate that the CMC /EMP- Pathfinder mapping was done based on mass alone. Pink lines indicate that the mapping additionally accounts for metallicity. The different linestyles represent three different random draws, showing that the results are robust against random noise. The mapping that includes metallicity has slightly less support at higher CO masses because the EMP- Pathfinder disrupted clusters have a high concentration at metallicities above [ F ​ e / H ] = − 0.3 = 1 / 2 ​ Z ⊙ [Fe/H]=-0.3=1/2Z_{\odot} . Since these more massive COs are missing, the ‘Mass+Metal’ map also has fewer binaries with large eccentricities and long periods. An approximate range of observable periods (100-2000 days; Müller-Horn et al. , 2025 ) in Gaia DR3 is shown in shaded grey.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：针对EMP-Pathfinder的不同映射，从CMC采样的致密天体双星系统的属性分布。蓝线表示仅基于质量进行CMC/EMP-Pathfinder映射。粉线表示映射额外考虑了金属丰度。不同的线型代表三次不同的随机抽取，表明结果对随机噪声具有鲁棒性。包含金属丰度的映射在较高致密天体质量处的支持度略低，因为EMP-Pathfinder瓦解星团在金属丰度高于[Fe/H]=-0.3=1/2 Z⊙处高度集中。由于这些较大质量的致密天体缺失，'质量+金属'映射也拥有较少的大偏心率和长周期双星。Gaia DR3中可观测周期的近似范围（100-2000天；Müller-Horn等人，2025）以灰色阴影显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The properties of COs in binaries with luminous companions released to the Galactic field from disrupted dense clusters. Most of these binaries contain a WD, followed by BHs, while NSs are the least numerous. The WDs have comparatively shorter periods and orbits that are more circular compared to the other COs. The dynamically formed binaries (all NS and BH binaries in this study) extend to low eccentricities, showcasing that low eccentricity is not necessarily indicative of a lack of dynamics. The BHs also favour lower mass companions compared to the WDs, making them more difficult to observe.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：从瓦解致密星团释放到银河系场中的、与亮星伴星组成的双星系统中致密天体的属性。这些双星大多数包含白矮星，其次是黑洞，而中子星数量最少。与其他致密天体相比，白矮星具有相对较短的周期和更圆的轨道。本研究中的动力学形成双星（所有中子星和黑洞双星）延伸到低偏心率，表明低偏心率不一定意味着缺乏动力学过程。与白矮星相比，黑洞也倾向于质量更低的伴星，这使得它们更难观测。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Property distributions of primordial (solid) and dynamically-assembled (dashed) WD binaries with luminous companions released from disrupted clusters. Light blue indicates all of the samples from the CMC/EMP- Pathfinder model, while dark blue indicates the systems that were ‘observable’ at least once after passing through the Gaia selection function. This shows observations for DR4 over all realizations; the DR3 observations are encompassed by DR4 so not explicitly shown. The observed population selects against the low-period peak in the primordial binaries. The observations also reduce the number of binaries with low-mass companions.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：从瓦解星团释放的、与亮星伴星组成的原初（实线）和动力学组装（虚线）白矮星双星的属性分布。浅蓝色表示来自CMC/EMP-Pathfinder模型的所有样本，而深蓝色表示在通过Gaia选择函数后至少一次'可观测'的系统。这显示了所有实现中DR4的观测结果；DR3观测结果包含在DR4中，因此未明确显示。观测到的种群排除了原初双星中的低周期峰值。观测还减少了具有低质量伴星的双星数量。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: The impact of the initial selection cuts on the sample of binaries from disrupted dense star clusters. We report the median percentages after computing the eligible sample from 100 realizations of the Solar System’s position in the Galaxy. Note that the reduction in the sample by each selection criterion is calculated independently of the others. In DR3, the largest cuts come from the distance selection, but in DR4, the largest cuts are from the requirements for apparent magnitude and photocenter semi-major axis. These values do not reflect the final detection yields; the final counts of detected binaries are detailed in Table 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：初始选择截断对来自瓦解致密星团的双星样本的影响。我们报告了从太阳系在银河系中位置的100次实现中计算合格样本后的中位数百分比。请注意，每个选择标准对样本的减少是独立于其他标准计算的。在DR3中，最大的截断来自距离选择，但在DR4中，最大的截断来自视星等和光心半长轴的要求。这些值不反映最终的探测产量；最终探测到的双星数量详见表2。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Properties of the CMC/EMP- Pathfinder binaries. Blue shading represent WDs, orange represent NSs, and gray represents BHs. The pink stars indicate Gaia detections. We display the WD candidates as selected by Shahaf et al. ( 2024 ) . Squares indicate detections over all 100 realizations; filled symbols represent DR3 and open symbols represent DR4. Note that this visualization displays a factor of 100 more detections than would be expected in any single realization, as it represents the total marginalized discovery space. The dashed (dotted) line shows the maximum period detectable in Gaia DR3 (DR4). Top: Eccentricity vs. period. The observable points clearly showcase the orbital period selection. Approximately 66% of BHs in the model are in systems too wide to pass our initial lenient DR3 and DR4 cuts. Middle: Luminous companion mass vs. CO mass. Our model produced a smaller proportion of massive NSs due to the adopted supernova prescription (see Section III ). Bottom: Period vs. CO mass.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：CMC/EMP-Pathfinder双星的属性。蓝色阴影代表白矮星，橙色代表中子星，灰色代表黑洞。粉色星表示Gaia探测。我们展示了Shahaf等人（2024）选择的白矮星候选体。方块表示所有100次实现中的探测；实心符号代表DR3，空心符号代表DR4。请注意，此可视化显示的探测次数是任何单次实现预期探测次数的100倍，因为它代表了总边际发现空间。虚线（点线）显示了Gaia DR3（DR4）中可探测的最大周期。上图：偏心率与周期。可观测点清晰地展示了轨道周期选择。模型中约66%的黑洞处于周期过宽、无法通过我们初始宽松的DR3和DR4截断的系统中。中图：亮星伴星质量与致密天体质量。由于采用超新星模型（见第三节），我们的模型产生的大质量中子星比例较小。下图：周期与致密天体质量。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 现代球状星团恒星动力学模拟认为恒星质量黑洞起主导作用，但黑洞在星团中的直接证据仍然有限。我们利用哈勃太空望远镜oMEGACat项目及额外JWST数据（总计23年跨度），在银河系最大球状星团半人马座ω中发现了天体测量学上的恒星质量黑洞-主序星双星系统。黑洞的发光伴星是一颗主序转折星，轨道周期为94^{+63}_{-42}年，半长轴为31^{+15}_{-12}天文单位，偏心率为e=0.72^{+0.08}_{-0.13}。由于我们在近星点观测该双星，即使仅观测到部分轨道，黑洞质量也能得到良好约束：推断黑洞质量为4.46^{+1.22}_{-1.01}太阳质量。我们称此黑洞为oMEGACat BH-2。这是首次在球状星团中通过天体测量学发现恒星质量黑洞，也是迄今发现轨道周期最长的黑洞双星系统。该黑洞质量较低，考虑到星团的低金属丰度，这或许令人惊讶，表明至少部分低质量黑洞在金属丰度Z<10^{-3}的环境中形成。我们发现该双星几乎肯定是动力学形成的，且为软双星，预期瓦解时标约为8亿年。虽然半人马座ω中黑洞双星的总数尚不确定，但现有巡天仅覆盖了参数空间的一小部分区域，很可能存在更多可探测的黑洞双星系统。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要总结：该发现证实了球状星团中存在恒星质量黑洞，表明即使在低金属丰度（Z<10⁻³）环境下也能形成低质量黑洞；现有巡天仅覆盖了参数空间的小部分区域，半人马座ω中可能还存在更多可探测的黑洞双星系统。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Stacked HST composite image of ω \omega Cen. Left – Location of the visible star relative to the cluster center (Anderson and van der Marel, 2010 ; Häberle et al. , 2024b ) Right – A closer view of the visible star and its neighbors, including a bright horizontal branch star ∼ \sim 1″ to the northwest. Image Credit: ESA/Hubble, NASA, Maximilian Häberle (MPIA)
figures.caption_zh: 图1：半人马座ω的HST堆叠合成图像。左图——可见星相对于星团中心的位置（Anderson and van der Marel, 2010; Häberle et al., 2024b）。右图——可见星及其邻近天体的近景，包括西北方向约1角秒处的一颗明亮水平分支星。图片来源：ESA/Hubble, NASA, Maximilian Häberle (MPIA)

figures.caption_en: Table 1: HST and JWST astrometric measurements of the visible star. Measurements are relative to the Häberle et al. ( 2024a ) catalog position and do not include the motion of ω \omega Cen. Entries with a non-zero flag are not used in the orbital fit. Flag descriptions: 1: Large ( > 5 ​ σ >5\sigma ) outlier; 2: Overlapping diffraction spike; 3: Centroid falls on noisy pixel; 4: Short ( < 5 <5 s) exposure time.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：可见星的HST和JWST天体测量数据。测量值相对于Häberle等人（2024a）的星表位置，不包括半人马座ω的自行。非零标志的条目未用于轨道拟合。标志说明：1：大（>5σ）离群值；2：重叠的衍射尖峰；3：质心落在噪声像素上；4：短（<5秒）曝光时间。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Visible star properties. Left – Extinction corrected color-magnitude diagram combining photometry from Häberle et al. ( 2024a ) and spectroscopic metallicities from Nitschai et al. ( 2023 ) . Based on its position in the CMD, it is a turnoff star with [M/H] = –1.75 ± \pm 0.25. Right – MUSE spectra of the visible star (red) vs. other stars with similar color (blue). The blue line and shaded regions show the median, one, and two σ \sigma range of the 260 stellar spectra selected as photometric doppelgangers (within 0.02 magnitudes in both color and magnitude in the left CMD). The red line shows the calcium triplet lines are slightly deeper than for stars of similar color, and most consistent with [M/H] = –1.5. The combined photometric and spectroscopic data suggest [M/H] in the range –1.75 to –1.5.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：可见星的性质。左图——结合Häberle等人（2024a）测光与Nitschai等人（2023）光谱金属丰度的消光校正颜色-星等图。根据其在CMD中的位置，它是一颗[M/H]=–1.75±0.25的转折星。右图——可见星（红色）与相似颜色其他恒星（蓝色）的MUSE光谱。蓝线和阴影区域显示260颗作为测光双胞胎（左图CMD中颜色和星等均在0.02星等以内）的恒星光谱的中位数、一倍和两倍σ范围。红线显示钙三重线比相似颜色恒星略深，与[M/H]=–1.5最为一致。结合测光和光谱数据，[M/H]范围在–1.75至–1.5之间。

The size of each marker is inversely proportional to the measurement’s uncertainty. The marker shape and color corresponds to the instrument used for measurement, and the gray points represent 3 ​ σ 3\sigma outliers from the median fit. Right - Our median orbital model plotted with the on-sky data in the proper motion subtracted frame colored by observation date; the orbit is shown as a dashed line outside our observation window.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：最佳拟合轨道模型。左图——我们的中位数模型（紫色线）与扣除推导自行后的数据对比。标记形状和颜色对应测量所用仪器，灰色点表示中位数拟合的3σ离群值。右图——我们的中位数轨道模型与扣除自行框架下的天球数据，按观测日期着色；观测窗口外的轨道以虚线表示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Degeneracies corner plot. Corner plot showing the degeneracies between Period ( P P ), semi-major axis ( a vis a_{\text{vis}} ), and the declination proper motion. The cutout in the top right shows the degeneracy between the companion mass and the declination proper motion ( μ Dec \mu_{\text{Dec}} ). The contours on the a vis a_{\text{vis}} versus P P subplot represent a constant mass corresponding to M comp M_{\text{comp}} , showing the spine of the ellipse closely follows along the 5 ​ M ⊙ 5~M_{\odot} contour. The stars in each panel represent the orbital solutions corresponding to the median, ± \pm 1σ \sigma and ± \pm 2σ \sigma of the joint 2D probability distribution of a vis a_{\text{vis}} and P P .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：简并性角点图。显示周期（P）、可见星半长轴（a_vis）和赤纬自行之间简并性的角点图。右上角插图为伴星质量与赤纬自行（μ_Dec）之间的简并性。a_vis与P子图中的等高线代表对应伴星质量M_comp的常数质量线，显示椭圆脊线紧密沿着5太阳质量等高线。每个面板中的星号代表对应于a_vis和P联合二维概率分布中位数、±1σ和±2σ的轨道解。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 小红点（LRDs）在静止光学波长上显得极为致密，但许多在静止紫外波段表现出延展形态，揭示了更复杂的内部结构。我们结合VLT/MUSE静止紫外积分场光谱和JWST/NIRCam成像在亚千秒差距分辨率下的连续谱减除[O III]、Hβ和Hα+[N II]发射线图，对GOODS-S中红移z=5.482的LRD-204851进行了分析。我们发现LRD-204851拥有一个非常细长、双极、延展的结构，穿过光学连续谱质心，两侧延伸数kpc，由紫外连续谱和静止光学发射线共同示踪，并在质心东南约2 kpc处有一个明亮的[O III]团块状结构。MUSE观测显示双峰Lyα轮廓，具有宽而明亮的近系统红峰和蓝移约430 km/s的相对微弱蓝峰，同时伴有类似速度的N V λ1238疑似探测。从MUSE IFU数据立方体提取的窄带成像中，蓝Lyα峰和疑似N V发射均倾向于同一东南方向。独立地，对积分Lyα轮廓的辐射转移模型支持在致密、缓慢膨胀的中性包层中存在双锥低柱密度空腔，与发射线图揭示的双极几何结构一致。这些结果表明，LRD-204851的延展发射与其中心引擎通过低柱密度小张角通道产生的辐射和/或气体流出有关，可能对应慢速外流或准静态电离锥。LRD-204851是首批在kpc尺度上直接观测到中心引擎对宿主星系影响的LRD之一。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：LRD-204851的细长发射结构与其中心引擎通过低柱密度小张角通道产生的辐射和/或气体流出有关，可能对应慢速外流或准静态电离锥，是首批在kpc尺度上直接观测到中心引擎对宿主星系影响的LRD之一。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: NIRCam imaging and NIRSpec/PRISM spectrum of LRD-204851 at z sys = 5.482 z_{sys}=5.482 . Top row: Three NIRCam RGB cutouts at the native resolution, all shown with a common linear stretch. The left panel uses three continuum filters; the middle panel highlights [O iii ]+H β \beta ; and the right panel highlights H α \alpha +[N ii ] in green. The target is a compact red point source in F460M, but shows a remarkably elongated blue continuum extension from southeast to northwest, as well as complex structures in optical emission lines. Bottom: NIRSpec/PRISM spectrum (MSA shuttle is shown in the inset). The blue and red solid lines show the rest-UV and rest-optical continuum power laws, respectively. The characteristic “V-shaped” continuum identifies LRD-204851 as a Little Red Dot, and higher-resolution spectra confirm that its H α \alpha emission includes a broad component with FWHM > 1000 ​ km ​ s − 1 {FWHM}>1000~{km~s^{-1}} (Matthee et al. , 2024 ; Juodžbalis et al. , 2026 ; Matthee et al. , 2026 ) ; these spectra are not shown here.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：LRD-204851在z_sys=5.482的NIRCam成像和NIRSpec/PRISM光谱。顶行：三个NIRCam RGB剪裁图，原始分辨率，均采用相同线性拉伸。左图使用三个连续谱滤光片；中图突出显示[O III]+Hβ；右图突出显示Hα+[N II]（绿色）。目标在F460M中是一个致密红点源，但显示出从东南到西北的显著延展蓝色连续谱延伸，以及光学发射线中的复杂结构。底行：NIRSpec/PRISM光谱（插图显示MSA快门）。蓝色和红色实线分别表示静止紫外和静止光学连续谱幂律。特征性的“V形”连续谱将LRD-204851识别为小红点，更高分辨率光谱确认其Hα发射包含FWHM>1000 km/s的宽成分（Matthee等人，2024；Juodžbalis等人，2026；Matthee等人，2026）；这些光谱未在此显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Left: MUSE spectrum (black) of the Ly α \alpha region with the Bicone_X_Slab_Out best-fit model (orange) overlaid. The cyan, red, and pink bands mark the disjoint windows used to build the blue-component, red-core, and red-wing narrow-band maps (see Section III.3 ). The lower sub-panel shows the fit residuals with ± 1 ​ σ \pm 1\sigma (grey band) and ± 3 ​ σ \pm 3\sigma (dashed) reference levels. The full posterior is shown in Appendix B . Right: MUSE spectrum around N v λ \lambda 1238, with the raw flux (light grey) overlaid by a 1.5-pixel (i.e., ≈ \approx 1.8Å) Gaussian-smoothed version (black) and its propagated ± 1 ​ σ \pm 1\sigma band. The arrow marks the tentative 2.1 ​ σ 2.1\sigma N v λ \lambda 1238 detection.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左图：MUSE光谱（黑色）显示Lyα区域，叠加Bicone_X_Slab_Out最佳拟合模型（橙色）。青色、红色和粉色带标记用于构建蓝成分、红核和红翼窄带图的不相交窗口（见第III.3节）。下方子图显示拟合残差，带有±1σ（灰色带）和±3σ（虚线）参考水平。完整后验分布见附录B。右图：MUSE光谱围绕N V λ1238，原始流量（浅灰色）叠加1.5像素（即约1.8Å）高斯平滑版本（黑色）及其传播的±1σ带。箭头标记疑似2.1σ N V λ1238探测。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: MUSE narrow-band maps of the multi-component Ly α \alpha emission and the tentative N v λ ​ 1238 \lambda 1238 detection in LRD-204851. From left to right: the blue Ly α \alpha component, the red Ly α \alpha core, the red Ly α \alpha wing, and the N v λ ​ 1238 \lambda 1238 narrow-band map. Per-panel color stretches saturate at the 99.5th percentile and use a lower limit of 1 ​ σ 1\sigma for the displayed map, so structures below the noise level fade to white. The black dashed contour shows the boundary of the Ly α \alpha segmentation map from the MUSE HUDF release and is identical in every panel; the thin black crosshairs mark the NIRCam/F460M continuum centroid.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：LRD-204851中多成分Lyα发射和疑似N V λ1238探测的MUSE窄带图。从左到右：蓝Lyα成分、红Lyα核、红Lyα翼和N V λ1238窄带图。每面板颜色拉伸饱和于99.5百分位，显示地图下限为1σ，因此低于噪声水平的结构渐变为白色。黑色虚线轮廓显示MUSE HUDF发布中Lyα分割图的边界，每个面板相同；细黑色十字准线标记NIRCam/F460M连续谱质心。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Optical emission-line maps of LRD-204851 constructed using NIRCam imaging. From left to right: [O III] , H α \alpha + [N II] , and H β \beta . The top row shows the maps alone; the bottom row overlays the MUSE red (magenta) and blue (cyan) Ly α \alpha component contours and the tentative N v λ ​ 1238 \lambda 1238 contour (green dashed), with the NIRCam/F460M continuum centroid marked by the blue × \times . All panels share a common color scale of line flux per pixel.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：使用NIRCam成像构建的LRD-204851光学发射线图。从左到右：[O III]、Hα+[N II]和Hβ。顶行仅显示地图；底行叠加MUSE红（品红色）和蓝（青色）Lyα成分轮廓以及疑似N V λ1238轮廓（绿色虚线），NIRCam/F460M连续谱质心用蓝色×标记。所有面板共享每像素线流量的共同颜色标度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Azimuthally averaged radial surface-brightness profiles of the optical emission-line maps in LRD-204851 (Figure 4 ), normalized by the central-annulus value. The black dashed curve shows the radial profile of the PSF, and the gray shaded region marks the scale of the PSF’s FWHM / 2 {FWHM}/2 . The bottom panel shows the relative difference from the PSF. The H α \alpha + [N II] profile tracks the PSF within r ≲ 0.15 ′′ r\lesssim 0.15^{\prime\prime} , while the [O III] profile lies above the PSF, indicating a more extended light distribution than H α \alpha + [N II] .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：LRD-204851光学发射线图（图4）的方位角平均径向表面亮度轮廓，归一化至中心环值。黑色虚线曲线显示PSF的径向轮廓，灰色阴影区域标记PSF的FWHM/2尺度。底图显示与PSF的相对差异。Hα+[N II]轮廓在r≲0.15″内追踪PSF，而[O III]轮廓位于PSF之上，表明其光分布比Hα+[N II]更延展。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Map of the line ratio log 10 ⁡ ( [O III] / H ​ α + [N II] ) \log_{10}(\mbox{[{O~III}]}\,/\,{H}\alpha\!+\!\mbox{[{N~II}]}) in LRD-204851, derived from the line maps shown in Figure 4 . Pixels are masked where either line has S/N < 3 <3 . Overlaid contours show the MUSE blue Ly α \alpha component and the tentative N v λ ​ 1238 \lambda 1238 emission, as in Figure 4 .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：LRD-204851中线比log10([O III]/Hα+[N II])的图，源自图4所示的线图。像素在任一线S/N<3时被掩蔽。叠加轮廓显示MUSE蓝Lyα成分和疑似N V λ1238发射，如图4所示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: MUSE-to-NIRCam astrometric correction. Left : PDF of the per-source offsets for reference sources before (top) and after (bottom) correction. Right : 2-D astrometric residuals; the red dashed ellipse marks ± \pm 1 mean absolute deviation (MAD) about the median. After correction both medians are zero.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：MUSE到NIRCam的天体测量校正。左图：校正前（顶部）和校正后（底部）参考源每源偏移的PDF。右图：二维天体测量残差；红色虚线椭圆标记中位数周围±1平均绝对偏差（MAD）。校正后两个中位数均为零。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Joint and marginal posterior distributions for the four sampled parameters, z Ly ​ α z_{Ly\alpha} , log ⁡ V exp \log V_{exp} , log ⁡ N HI \log N_{HI} , and log ⁡ τ a \log\tau_{a} , under the Bicone_X_Slab_Out geometry, which best reproduces the observed Ly α \alpha profile of LRD-204851.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：在Bicone_X_Slab_Out几何结构下，四个采样参数z_Lyα、log V_exp、log N_HI和log τ_a的联合和边缘后验分布，该结构最佳再现LRD-204851的观测Lyα轮廓。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 脉冲星计时阵列（PTA）对经过的致密次结构的引力影响敏感，这些次结构可通过加速脉冲星或太阳系质心产生多普勒计时延迟，以及在经过地球-脉冲星视线附近时产生夏皮罗计时延迟。由于信号类型多样，从罕见的、几乎静态的相遇，到动态飞越，再到许多次结构的随机极限，对致密暗物质（DM）次结构（如原初黑洞和轴子小团簇）的完整PTA灵敏度预测具有挑战性。我们通过一个结合蒙特卡洛信号建模和机器学习替代似然函数的框架来应对这一挑战，从而能够对先前仅在简化极限情况下处理的信号进行统一的似然级分析。然后，我们利用该框架精确评估随机引力波背景（SGWB）对PTA探测致密DM次结构灵敏度的影响，近期已有证据表明该背景存在。SGWB显著削弱了灵敏度，我们发现，即使在最乐观的观测场景下，当假设从当前测量推断出的SGWB参数时，只有夏皮罗搜索仍能保持对次主导DM成分的灵敏度。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：随机引力波背景的存在对脉冲星计时阵列探测致密暗物质次结构构成严重挑战，需在未来的分析中充分考虑其对灵敏度的压制效应。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Illustration of the sampling region geometries relevant for the pulsar-term Doppler and Shapiro effects. The Earth location is denoted by E E , the pulsar by P P , and the line of sight by 𝐝 \mathbf{d} , with the length d d corresponding to the Earth–pulsar distance. The Doppler sampling region, 𝒱 D \mathcal{V}_{D} , is the sphere of radius R D R_{D} centered on the pulsar. The Shapiro sampling region, 𝒱 S \mathcal{V}_{S} , is the cylinder of radius R S R_{S} around the Earth–pulsar line segment, with length d d . Grey points indicate perturbing substructures with associated velocity vectors.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：与脉冲星项多普勒效应和夏皮罗效应相关的采样区域几何示意图。地球位置用E表示，脉冲星用P表示，视线用d表示，长度d对应地球-脉冲星距离。多普勒采样区域V_D是以脉冲星为中心、半径为R_D的球体。夏皮罗采样区域V_S是围绕地球-脉冲星线段、半径为R_S、长度为d的圆柱体。灰色点表示带有相关速度矢量的扰动次结构。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Example signal realizations drawn from the Monte Carlo signal model. Each panel shows five independent realizations at fixed expected number of substructures in the fiducial volume. The upper row shows Doppler signals and the lower row shows Shapiro signals, with ⟨ N D , S dyn ⟩ = 10 − 2 , 1 , \langle N_{D,S}^{dyn}\rangle=10^{-2},1, and 10 3 10^{3} from left to right, corresponding to the static, dynamic, and stochastic regimes, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：从蒙特卡洛信号模型中抽取的示例信号实现。每个面板显示了在基准体积内固定预期次结构数量下的五个独立实现。上行显示多普勒信号，下行显示夏皮罗信号，从左到右⟨N_D,S^dyn⟩分别为10^{-2}、1和10^3，分别对应静态、动态和随机状态。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Benchmark observing scenarios considered in this work, specified by the number of pulsars in the array ( N p N_{p} ), the common Earth–pulsar distance ( d d ), the observing span ( T obs T_{{obs}} ), the measurement cadence ( Δ ​ t \Delta t ), and the root-mean-square white-noise level ( σ WN \sigma_{{WN}} ).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本工作中考虑的基准观测场景，由阵列中的脉冲星数量（N_p）、共同的地球-脉冲星距离（d）、观测跨度（T_obs）、测量节奏（Δt）和均方根白噪声水平（σ_WN）指定。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Schematic summary of the surrogate likelihood constructions used in this work. The horizontal axis indicates the expected number of substructures in the relevant fiducial sampling volume. At small ⟨ N ⟩ \langle N\rangle , the projected signal distribution is strongly non-Gaussian but often dominated by smooth low-order structure, motivating the cubic-mode flow surrogate. At large ⟨ N ⟩ \langle N\rangle , the signal is sourced by the superposition of many independent substructures, motivating the covariance-based surrogate when the Gaussian limit is reached. The diffusion-based Monte Carlo surrogate is designed to remain applicable across regimes by generating full projected time-domain signal realizations. The transitions between static, dynamic, and stochastic regimes are illustrative rather than sharp.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：本工作中使用的替代似然函数构建的示意图总结。水平轴表示相关基准采样体积中次结构的预期数量。在小的⟨N⟩下，投影信号分布强烈非高斯，但通常由平滑的低阶结构主导，这激发了三次模式流替代方法。在大的⟨N⟩下，信号由许多独立次结构的叠加产生，当达到高斯极限时，这激发了基于协方差的替代方法。基于扩散的蒙特卡洛替代方法旨在通过生成完整的投影时域信号实现，保持跨状态的适用性。静态、动态和随机状态之间的转换是示意性的，而非明确的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Residualized covariance matrices in the large- ⟨ N ⟩ \langle N\rangle limit for the Doppler signal ( upper ) and Shapiro signal ( lower ). In both cases, the covariance depends on t t and t ′ t^{\prime} separately, rather than only on t − t ′ t-t^{\prime} , showing that the residualized signals are nonstationary processes. The Doppler covariance exhibits broader, more coherent structure across the observing span, indicating stronger long-timescale correlations and therefore a greater potential degeneracy with low-frequency red-noise backgrounds. The Shapiro covariance is comparatively more localized in time, reflecting the shorter-duration structure of line-of-sight encounters after timing-model projection.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：在大⟨N⟩极限下，多普勒信号（上行）和夏皮罗信号（下行）的残差协方差矩阵。在两种情况下，协方差分别依赖于t和t'，而不仅仅是t-t'，表明残差信号是非平稳过程。多普勒协方差在观测跨度上表现出更宽、更连贯的结构，表明更强的长时间尺度相关性，因此与低频红噪声背景的潜在简并性更大。夏皮罗协方差在时间上相对更局部化，反映了在计时模型投影后视线相遇的较短持续时间结构。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Illustration of the cubic-mode compression used in the flow-based surrogate likelihood. In each panel, solid curves show representative projected signal realizations, while dashed curves show their cubic reconstructions s ~ ℐ ( 3 ) ​ ℓ ~ 3 \tilde{s}^{(3)}_{\mathcal{I}}\tilde{\bm{\ell}}_{3} . The signal class and the corresponding value of ⟨ N ⟩ \langle N\rangle are indicated by the in-panel annotations. In each panel, the realizations are normalized independently to unit maximum absolute value in order to emphasize shape rather than overall amplitude. At small ⟨ N ⟩ \langle N\rangle , the projected signal is well-captured by the cubic mode. As ⟨ N ⟩ \langle N\rangle increases, additional non-cubic structure becomes increasingly important, so the cubic compression becomes progressively more conservative.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：基于流的替代似然函数中使用的三次模式压缩示意图。在每个面板中，实线表示代表性的投影信号实现，虚线表示它们的三次重建s̃_I^(3)ℓ̃_3。信号类别和相应的⟨N⟩值由面板内注释指示。在每个面板中，实现被独立归一化为单位最大绝对值，以强调形状而非整体幅度。在小的⟨N⟩下，投影信号被三次模式很好地捕捉。随着⟨N⟩增加，额外的非三次结构变得越来越重要，因此三次压缩逐渐变得更加保守。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Projected sensitivities in the Optimistic observing scenario using the three surrogate likelihoods developed in this work. The left panel shows Doppler signals and the right panel shows Shapiro signals. Curves are shown both with white noise alone and with the additional uncorrelated pulsar-term SGWB red-noise contribution. The thick curves show the diffusion-based likelihood, the thinner curves show the cubic-mode flow surrogate, and the faded curves show the covariance-based surrogate in the regime where the large- ⟨ N ⟩ \langle N\rangle approximation is expected to apply. The dotted grey line labeled N dyn = 1 N_{{dyn}}=1 indicates where the expected number of substructures in the dynamical volume is unity; regions above this line approach the large- ⟨ N ⟩ \langle N\rangle limit, while regions below it approach the small- ⟨ N ⟩ \langle N\rangle limit. See Eq. ( 15 ) for the definition of the expected dynamic number, as compared to the expected number ⟨ N ⟩ \langle N\rangle in the fiducial sampling volume as defined in Eq. ( 17 ). Across the surrogate constructions, inclusion of the SGWB red-noise contribution substantially degrades the projected sensitivity, especially for Doppler signals. In the case of the Doppler signal, the parametric non-Gaussianity of the signal, even deep in the large ⟨ N ⟩ \langle N\rangle limit, results in systematic disagreement between the fiducial diffusion model sensitivity projections and those developed under the covariance model.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：在乐观观测场景下，使用本工作中开发的三种替代似然函数得到的投影灵敏度。左面板显示多普勒信号，右面板显示夏皮罗信号。曲线同时显示了仅白噪声以及额外的不相关脉冲星项SGWB红噪声贡献的情况。粗曲线显示基于扩散的似然函数，较细曲线显示三次模式流替代方法，淡曲线显示在大⟨N⟩近似预期适用的状态下的基于协方差的替代方法。标记为N_dyn=1的虚线灰色线表示动态体积中次结构的预期数量为1；该线上方的区域接近大⟨N⟩极限，而线下方的区域接近小⟨N⟩极限。关于预期动态数量的定义，与基准采样体积中预期数量⟨N⟩的比较，参见方程（15）和（17）。在各种替代构建中，包含SGWB红噪声贡献显著降低了投影灵敏度，尤其是对于多普勒信号。对于多普勒信号，即使在深大⟨N⟩极限下，信号的参数化非高斯性也导致基准扩散模型灵敏度投影与协方差模型下开发的投影之间存在系统性差异。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Fiducial projected sensitivities obtained with the diffusion-based likelihood. The left panel shows Doppler signals and the right panel shows Shapiro signals. Red curves show the projected sensitivities obtained in this work after including both white noise and the uncorrelated pulsar-term SGWB red-noise contribution, assuming the NANOGrav 15-year free-index power-law fit with A GW = 6.4 × 10 − 15 A_{{GW}}=6.4\times 10^{-15} and γ GW = 3.2 \gamma_{{GW}}=3.2 . Black curves show the corresponding white-noise-only projections from this work. Grey curves show the previous white-noise-only projections of Ref. Ramani et al. ( 2020 ) . Solid and dashed curves correspond to the Optimistic and SKA observing scenarios, respectively. The comparison between the black and grey curves shows that our white-noise projections broadly reproduce previous estimates, while the red curves illustrate how the SGWB red-noise contribution substantially weakens the projected sensitivity, especially for Doppler signals.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：使用基于扩散的似然函数得到的基准投影灵敏度。左面板显示多普勒信号，右面板显示夏皮罗信号。红色曲线显示了本工作中在包含白噪声和不相关脉冲星项SGWB红噪声贡献后得到的投影灵敏度，假设NANOGrav 15年自由指数幂律拟合，A_GW=6.4×10^{-15}，γ_GW=3.2。黑色曲线显示了本工作中相应的仅白噪声投影。灰色曲线显示了先前Ramani等人（2020）的仅白噪声投影。实线和虚线分别对应乐观和SKA观测场景。黑色和灰色曲线的比较表明，我们的白噪声投影大致重现了先前的估计，而红色曲线说明了SGWB红噪声贡献如何显著削弱投影灵敏度，尤其是对于多普勒信号。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了CMBComp，一个紧凑且精确的压缩宇宙微波背景（CMB）似然函数，它捕捉了来自SPT-3G D1 + ACT DR6 + Planck PR3原初CMB各向异性 + Planck PR4/NPIPE CMB透镜组合数据集（统称为SPA）的完整CMB似然函数的主要几何信息。该压缩易于评估，且易于在标准推断流程中实现。我们在五个模型空间中构建并验证了它：空间平坦的宇宙学常数模型（ΛCDM），及其动态暗能量（w₀wₐCDM）、大质量中微子（νΛCDM）、非平坦（oΛCDM）以及联合大质量中微子-动态暗能量（νw₀wₐCDM）扩展。引入了五个压缩似然函数，分别对应暗能量部分的两个三参数压缩（用于ΛCDM的CMB-3和用于w₀wₐCDM的CMB-3w）、中微子部分的两个四参数压缩（用于νΛCDM的CMB-4ν和用于νw₀wₐCDM的CMB-4νw），以及一个四参数曲率压缩（用于oΛCDM的CMB-4k）。将每个压缩似然函数与DESI DR2重子声学振荡（BAO）数据结合，我们证明所得后验分布与从相应完整CMB链获得的后验分布高度一致。因此，CMBComp特别适用于修改晚期膨胀历史的宇宙学模型推断，能够以最小的计算开销将精确的CMB约束纳入新分析中，而无需依赖完整的玻尔兹曼求解器推断管线。压缩似然函数文件和示例笔记本随CMBComp公开发布于https://github.com/Amoghsriv/CMBComp。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，CMBComp特别适合修改晚期膨胀历史的宇宙学模型推断，能以极小计算开销提供精确的CMB约束，无需依赖完整的玻尔兹曼求解器推断管线。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of the cosmological models, sampled cosmological parameters, fixed parameters, and the corresponding compressed CMB likelihoods. The combined CMB dataset SPA refers to SPT-3G D1 + ACT DR6 + Planck PR3 primary CMB anisotropies + Planck PR4/NPIPE CMB lensing. All compressions are derived from chains using SPA.

图3：CMB-4νw在νw₀wₐCDM中的验证：DESI DR2 BAO + CMB-4νw（蓝色）与DESI DR2 BAO + SPA（完整CMB）（红色）。压缩后验分布以良好精度再现了所有五个参数（w₀, wₐ, Ω_m, H₀, ∑m_ν）。虚线标记ΛCDM参考值w₀ = -1，wₐ = 0。压缩运行中的中微子质量约束比参考运行稍宽松，这与同时变化暗能量自由度时四参数压缩对∑m_ν的杠杆作用降低一致。

For each parameter, we list the mean and 68% uncertainty. Upper limits on ∑ m ν \sum m_{\nu} are one-tailed 95% bounds (indicated by < < ); two-sided 68% constraints are listed otherwise. Models are listed in the same order as Table 1 .

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们对当前宇宙学观测的解释依赖于均匀性和各向同性的假设，这导致了由弗里德曼-勒梅特-罗伯逊-沃克时空度规所描述的均匀背景曲率和膨胀。然而，宇宙的大尺度结构在细节上是不均匀的，这导致了非均匀曲率和尺度因子的变化。在本文中，我们使用在完整广义相对论框架下生成的数值宇宙学模拟，研究非均匀时空对遥远天体星等涨落的影响，重点关注其作为宇宙结构增长速率探针的应用。我们量化了星等相关谱随角尺度和红移的畸变，并利用这些畸变推断增长速率测量中的系统偏移。我们发现，在红移z ≲ 0.2时，完整数值相对论与FLRW处理之间的增长速率测量系统偏移小于当前数据集的统计误差，这证实了FLRW建模对于当前低红移本动速度实验是充分的。未来扩展到更高红移的数据集可能需要额外考虑引力透镜和非均匀曲率贡献的理论模型。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：当前FLRW建模对低红移本动速度实验是充分的，但未来更高红移观测需要更复杂的理论模型。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Projections of the magnitude fluctuation field δ ​ m \delta m at redshifts z = 0.1 z=0.1 , 0.3 0.3 , and 0.5 0.5 (top to bottom). The left column shows the full NR measurement δ ​ m NR \delta m_{NR} , and the right column shows the velocity-only values δ ​ m vel \delta m_{vel} calculated using the source and observer velocities. At z = 0.1 z=0.1 the two maps are visually similar, with large-scale features driven dominantly by velocities. At higher redshifts, the amplitude of the fluctuations decreases and the maps become increasingly distinct, with smaller scale structure formation apparent in δ ​ m NR \delta m_{NR} and absent from the δ ​ m vel \delta m_{vel} maps, reflecting the growing contribution of gravitational lensing to the signal.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：红移z=0.1、0.3和0.5（从上到下）的星等涨落场δm的投影。左列显示完整的数值相对论测量δm_NR，右列显示仅使用源和观测者速度计算的速度贡献值δm_vel。在z=0.1时，两幅图在视觉上相似，大尺度特征主要由速度驱动。在更高红移时，涨落幅度减小，两幅图差异增大，δm_NR中可见更小尺度的结构形成，而δm_vel图中则没有，这反映了引力透镜对信号的贡献逐渐增加。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The angular power spectrum of magnitude fluctuations, C ℓ δ ​ m ​ δ ​ m C_{\ell}^{\delta m\,\delta m} , at a range of redshifts from z = 0.1 z=0.1 to z = 0.6 z=0.6 . The green points show the full NR simulation measurement ( C ℓ , NR C_{\ell,{NR}} ), the purple points show the velocity-only measurements ( C ℓ , vel C_{\ell,{vel}} ), and the blue and orange curves show the FLRW model prediction due to velocities and lensing, respectively. The errors in the measurements are determined as the standard deviation across 20 observer positions. At low redshift, the full NR and velocity-only measurements agree closely. At higher redshift, the NR power spectra exceeds the velocity-only measurements due to the effects of gravitational lensing, with the excess appearing first at high ℓ \ell and extending to all scales by z ≳ 0.6 z\gtrsim 0.6 . The dipole signature due to observer motion is visible at ℓ = 1 \ell=1 . The vertical dashed line shows a multipole ℓ ∼ k ​ χ ​ ( z ) \ell\sim k\,\chi(z) corresponding to a constant physical wavenumber k = 0.09 ​ h k=0.09\,h Mpc -1 , which represents the power spectrum cutoff in the initial data.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：红移从z=0.1到z=0.6范围内的星等涨落角功率谱C_ℓ^{δm δm}。绿色点表示完整数值相对论模拟测量值（C_ℓ,NR），紫色点表示仅速度测量值（C_ℓ,vel），蓝色和橙色曲线分别表示FLRW模型对速度和透镜效应的预测。测量误差由20个观测者位置的标准差确定。在低红移时，完整数值相对论和仅速度测量值非常一致。在更高红移时，由于引力透镜效应，数值相对论功率谱超过仅速度测量值，这种超出首先出现在高ℓ处，并在z≳0.6时扩展到所有尺度。ℓ=1处的偶极特征源于观测者运动。垂直虚线表示对应于恒定物理波数k=0.09 h Mpc^{-1}的多极ℓ∼k χ(z)，这代表了初始数据中功率谱的截止。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Fisher forecast of the systematic offset Δ ​ f \Delta f (green) and statistical error σ f \sigma_{f} (purple) in the growth rate, expressed as a percentage of the fiducial value f fid f_{fid} , as a function of redshift for the N = 256 N=256 resolution simulation. At z ≤ 0.2 z\leq 0.2 the systematic offset is negligible ( < 1 % <1\% ) compared to the statistical error ( 3 3 – 4 % 4\% ). The systematic offset grows rapidly with redshift, reaching ∼ 8 % {\sim}8\% at z = 0.3 z=0.3 , ∼ 39 % {\sim}39\% at z = 0.4 z=0.4 , and exceeding 100 % 100\% by z = 0.5 z=0.5 , while the statistical error increases more gradually. The crossover at z ≈ 0.3 z\approx 0.3 indicates the redshift beyond which curvature gradient and lensing effects would dominate over statistical uncertainties in growth rate measurements, for this future survey configuration.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：对于N=256分辨率模拟，增长速率系统偏移Δf（绿色）和统计误差σ_f（紫色）的Fisher预测，以基准值f_fid的百分比表示，作为红移的函数。在z≤0.2时，系统偏移（<1%）相对于统计误差（3-4%）可忽略不计。系统偏移随红移迅速增长，在z=0.3时达到约8%，在z=0.4时达到约39%，在z=0.5时超过100%，而统计误差增长较为平缓。z≈0.3处的交叉点表明，对于这种未来巡天配置，在此红移之后，曲率梯度和透镜效应将在增长速率测量中主导统计不确定性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Angular power spectra of magnitude fluctuations C ℓ δ ​ m ​ δ ​ m C_{\ell}^{\delta m\,\delta m} at redshifts z = 0.1 z=0.1 to z = 0.6 z=0.6 across three simulation resolutions N = { 128 , 200 , 256 } N=\{128,200,256\} . The green points show the NR measurement C ℓ , NR C_{\ell,{NR}} with the lightest green representing the coarsest resolution ( N = 128 N=128 ) and the green increasing in darkness as the resolution increases. The purple points show the velocity-only measurement C ℓ , vel C_{\ell,{vel}} with the lightest purple representing the coarsest resolution ( N = 128 N=128 ) and the purple increasing in darkness as the resolution increases. Error bars represent the standard deviation across 20 observer positions. The C ℓ , NR C_{\ell,{NR}} have been scaled by a factor of 5 to improved the ability to distinguish the cases. C ℓ , NR C_{\ell,{NR}} and C ℓ , vel C_{\ell,{vel}} are converged at N = 256 N=256 .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：红移从z=0.1到z=0.6范围内，三种模拟分辨率N={128,200,256}下的星等涨落角功率谱C_ℓ^{δm δm}。绿色点表示数值相对论测量值C_ℓ,NR，最浅的绿色代表最粗分辨率（N=128），绿色随分辨率增加而加深。紫色点表示仅速度测量值C_ℓ,vel，最浅的紫色代表最粗分辨率（N=128），紫色随分辨率增加而加深。误差棒表示20个观测者位置的标准差。C_ℓ,NR已乘以因子5以提高区分能力。C_ℓ,NR和C_ℓ,vel在N=256时收敛。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Convergence test of the systematic offset Δ ​ f \Delta f (green) and statistical error σ f \sigma_{f} (purple) across three simulation resolutions N = { 128 , 200 , 256 } N=\{128,200,256\} . The systematic offset and the statistical error are converged at N = 256 N=256 , demonstrating that the measured systematic offset is robust to the simulation resolution.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：三种模拟分辨率N={128,200,256}下系统偏移Δf（绿色）和统计误差σ_f（紫色）的收敛性测试。系统偏移和统计误差在N=256时收敛，表明测量的系统偏移对模拟分辨率是稳健的。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 大面积的CO巡天对于研究分子云动力学和演化至关重要；然而，大多数巡天都集中在银道面，高银纬云团的研究相对较少。我们介绍了PMO北极星耀斑CO巡天（PPCOS），该巡天利用德令哈13.7米望远镜，在12CO、13CO和C18O的J=1-0跃迁中绘制了北极星耀斑区域100平方度的天区。作为首个在高银纬（|b| > 20°）进行的大面积CO巡天，PPCOS具有亚角分分辨率，在光谱分辨率0.16 km/s和角分辨率50角秒下，对12CO的灵敏度约为0.46 K，对13CO和C18O的灵敏度约为0.23 K。12CO发射揭示了七个不同的复合体，其中只有约10%的像素显示多个速度成分，同时存在0.18 km/s/pc的整体速度梯度。12CO的典型线宽为1.2 ± 0.6 km/s，而13CO成分系统性地更窄（≲ 0.7 ΔV_12CO）。12CO/13CO强度比（5-25）表明12CO光学厚度普遍存在，类似于巨分子云中的条件。总体上，CO发射分为两组：一组与速度梯度对齐，另一组垂直于速度梯度延伸，可能受大尺度相干动力学调控。我们提出了一个三层层次结构：由12CO示踪的动态组装和扩散外围、由13CO示踪的更稳定中间内核，以及由C18O示踪的引力束缚致密核。没有年轻恒星天体与分子气体明确关联。PPCOS为研究湍流、层次结构和邻近相对简单分子云中的早期云演化提供了理想实验室。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，PPCOS是首个在高银纬进行的大面积CO巡天，揭示了北极星耀斑区域的分子云结构和动力学特征。该区域未发现与年轻恒星天体的强关联，为研究湍流、层次结构及早期云演化提供了理想、相对简单的实验室。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of large-area ( ≳ 10 \gtrsim 10 deg 2 ) molecular cloud CO (1–0) surveys (1)
figures.caption_zh: 表1：大面积（≳ 10 deg²）分子云CO（1-0）巡天总结（1）

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Top: All-sky Planck 353 GHz continuum image (Planck Collaboration et al. , 2014 ) in a Galactic Mollweide projection. The white boundary encloses the target footprint of the PPCOS (this work). Thick solid, thin solid, and dashed black lines indicate the sky coverages of MWISP, FUGIN, and ThrUMMS, respectively (see Table 1 ). The dotted black line delineates the extended coverage of the Mopra Southern Galactic Plane CO Survey, which is not Nyquist sampled, in comparison with ThrUMMS (see the footnote of Table 1 ). Surveys of nearby clouds (Taurus, Perseus A, and Ophiuchus A) conducted by FCRAO (Table 1 ) are shown in cyan. The blue line marks the celestial equator, while the green lines indicate Galactic latitudes of b = ± 20 ​ ° b=\pm 20\degr . Bottom left: Zoomed-in view of the 353 GHz continuum across the Polaris Flare. The black contour outlines the approximately half-Nyquist sampled region of the DHT16 survey (detailed in the bottom-right panel), and the white boundary corresponds to that in the top panel. The cyan dot marks the North Celestial Pole. The cyan rectangle, covering roughly 0.6 deg 2 , highlights the brightest continuum region of the complex, designated as the Polaris cloud (Bensch et al. , 2001b ) . Bottom right: 12 CO integrated intensity (Moment 0) map from the DHT16 survey (Heithausen and Thaddeus, 1990 ; Heithausen et al. , 1993 ) . The contiguous central region features half-Nyquist sampling (with a pixel size comparable to the ∼ \sim 8.5′ beam), while the surrounding pixels exhibit sparser coverage. The red boundary encloses the target footprint of PPCOS. Note that the bottom-left panel utilizes a gnomonic (TAN) projection, whereas the bottom-right panel utilizes a plate carrée (CAR) projection.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：顶部：全天普朗克353 GHz连续谱图像（Planck Collaboration et al., 2014），采用银河系摩尔韦德投影。白色边界包围了PPCOS的目标覆盖区域（本工作）。粗实线、细实线和虚线黑线分别表示MWISP、FUGIN和ThrUMMS的天空覆盖范围（见表1）。虚线黑线描绘了Mopra南银道面CO巡天的扩展覆盖范围（未进行奈奎斯特采样），与ThrUMMS对比（见表1脚注）。FCRAO对邻近云团（金牛座、英仙座A和蛇夫座A）的巡天（表1）以青色显示。蓝线表示天赤道，绿线表示银纬b = ±20°。左下：北极星耀斑区域353 GHz连续谱的放大视图。黑色轮廓勾勒出DHT16巡天近似半奈奎斯特采样的区域（详见右下角面板），白色边界对应顶部面板中的边界。青色点标记北天极。青色矩形覆盖约0.6 deg²，突出显示复合体中最亮的连续谱区域，称为北极星云（Bensch et al., 2001b）。右下：来自DHT16巡天（Heithausen and Thaddeus, 1990；Heithausen et al., 1993）的12CO积分强度（矩0）图。连续中心区域具有半奈奎斯特采样（像素大小与约8.5′波束相当），而周围像素覆盖较稀疏。红色边界包围了PPCOS的目标覆盖区域。注意，左下角面板使用日心投影，而右下角面板使用等距圆柱投影。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The 13 CO (1–0) integrated intensity maps of Polaris cloud, measured by the FCRAO 14 m telescope (panel a; Bensch et al. , 2001b ) and the Delingha 13.7 m telescope (panel b; this work). Panels (a) and (b) share the same color scale, as indicated by the colorbar between them. Note that MCLD 123.5+24.9 (e.g., Heithausen et al. , 2002 ; Shimoikura et al. , 2012 ) is denoted by a cyan box in Panel (a), and the Polaris clouds serve as its host clump. In panel (c), the intensities of the two maps are compared, showing a consistent intensity ratio of approximately unity, as indicated by the orange lines.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：由FCRAO 14米望远镜（面板a；Bensch et al., 2001b）和德令哈13.7米望远镜（面板b；本工作）测量的北极星云13CO（1-0）积分强度图。面板(a)和(b)共享相同的色标，如两者之间的色条所示。注意，MCLD 123.5+24.9（例如，Heithausen et al., 2002；Shimoikura et al., 2012）在面板(a)中用青色框表示，北极星云是其宿主团块。在面板(c)中，比较了两张图的强度，显示强度比约为1，如橙色线所示。

Note that these overall moment-0 maps cannot fully display the detailed CO distributions due to image compression from limited figure size, the broad velocity range used for integration, and color maps that are not optimized for individual complexes (see Figure 17 for an example). The cyan dot in each panel marks the north celestial pole. The black circle indicates the declination D ​ E ​ C = 87 ​ ° DEC=87\degr . The dashed black line denotes R ​ A = 0 ​ ° RA=0\degr , while the three dashed gray lines denote R ​ A = 90 ​ ° RA=90\degr , 180 ​ ° 180\degr , and 270 ​ ° 270\degr ; note that R ​ A RA increases clockwise. The red boxes in the right panel indicate the detected emission regions of C 18 O, which are highlighted by the orange boxes in Figure 10 .
figures.caption_zh: 图7：来自PMO北极星耀斑CO巡天的12CO（左）和13CO（右）矩0图，积分速度范围为-8至6 km/s。注意，由于有限图形尺寸导致的图像压缩、用于积分的宽速度范围以及未针对单个复合体优化的色图（例如见图17），这些整体矩0图无法完全显示详细的CO分布。每个面板中的青色点标记北天极。黑色圆圈表示赤纬DEC = 87°。虚线黑线表示RA = 0°，三条虚线灰线表示RA = 90°、180°和270°；注意RA顺时针增加。右面板中的红色框表示C18O的探测发射区域，在图10中用橙色框突出显示。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 宇宙剪切偏差的校准对于验证宇宙学结果至关重要。然而，目前尚不清楚基于模拟星系图像的校准（如弱引力透镜领域常见做法）能在多大程度上捕捉真实的剪切偏差，尤其是在复杂的仪器效应下。另一方面，实际测量中对源星系的选择（如星等截断、红移分箱等）以及随机但可能相关的剪切偏差，可能会引入难以先验校准的剪切-剪切相关误差。在我们之前的几篇论文中，我们展示了与每个星系图像相关的场畸变信号可以保存在剪切星表中，为星系-星系透镜和剪切-剪切相关提供现场校准。本文将此方法应用于由Fourier_Quad剪切测量方法生成的HSCpdr3剪切星表。通过我们的现场校准方法，我们发现剪切偏差随光红移分箱、信噪比截断、光学波段以及剪切估计量的替代形式而变化。然而，校准后，所有考虑情况下的剪切-剪切相关函数和宇宙学参数约束均显示出一致的结果。来自r/i/z波段剪切星表且信噪比>10截断的基准结果给出：$S_8=0.740^{+0.030}_{-0.030}$ 和 $Ω_m=0.383^{+0.129}_{-0.132}$。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，现场校准方法能有效校正不同选择条件下的剪切偏差，获得稳健且一致的宇宙学参数约束结果。

In each panel, the data points represent the stacked shear signals from galaxies binned according to their FD shear values ( g 1 f g^{f}_{1} or g 2 f g^{f}_{2} ). The dashed lines show the best-fit results. Different colors represent different SNR cut. To clearly show the data points and the best-fit lines, we plot < g i e ​ s ​ t > − g i f <g_{i}^{est}>-g_{i}^{f} against g i f g_{i}^{f} ( i = 1 , 2 i=1,2 ) in this figure.

Each panel represents different redshift bin (labelled as 1-5) combinations, and the left-bottom and top-right panels represent ξ + \xi_{+} and ξ − \xi_{-} respectively. Different colors represent different SNR cut. The error bars are estimated by the jackknife method. The dashed lines show the corresponding best-fit model. The unshaded region refers to the fiducial scale cut.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系团的三维形状对于理解其天体物理学特性以及作为宇宙学研究中的探针具有重要意义。我们利用体视学方法估算了首次eROSITA全天巡天（eRASS1）中星系团的最可能三维形状。我们的样本是最大且定义明确的星系团样本，通过该方法估算的最可能形状可作为宇宙学、星系团及弱引力透镜研究中团形状模型的先验信息。SRG/eROSITA的首次全天巡天获得了约12,000个经光学确认的星系群和星系团样本。我们使用了eRASS1巡天中一个定义明确的子样本（包含3254个星系团），通过约束星系团椭圆率的概率密度函数（PDF）来估算其最可能形状。我们模拟了具有三维形状分布（长球和扁球）的星系团的投影外观，并获得了其椭圆率分布。然后将该分布与eRASS1星系团样本的实测椭圆率分布进行比较，以推断与数据一致的三维形状。我们使用蒙特卡洛方法估算了最可能的轴比l和w，其中l ≡ L/T，w ≡ W/T，L、W、T分别为星系团的长轴、中间轴和短轴。我们不需要任何额外探针（光学、SZ等）来约束星系团的可能形状。我们描述了eRASS1星系团椭圆率PDF，其服从均值为0.79、标准差为0.25的正态分布。eRASS1子样本中星系团的最可能形状估算为(l, w) = (1.51 ± 0.27, 1.17 ± 0.27)，且长球形状优于扁球形状。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该方法不需要额外探针（光学、SZ等）即可约束星系团的三维形状，所得结果可作为宇宙学、星系团及弱引力透镜研究中团形状模型的先验信息。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Projection effects for the Vikhilinin model surface brightness profiles (see section 3.1 ). The projection of the cluster with length axis L : W : T = 2 : 1.5 : 1 L:W:T=2:1.5:1 , and Euler rotation of 30 ​ ° 30\degree along the X axis, is not similar along different axes.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：Vikhilinin模型表面亮度轮廓的投影效应（见第3.1节）。长轴比L:W:T = 2:1.5:1且绕X轴欧拉旋转30°的星系团投影，沿不同轴并不相似。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Conditional PDFs for known ratios l , w l,w . The blue PDF (ratios l = 1.22 , w = 1.18 l=1.22,w=1.18 ) peaks at ellipticity e ∼ 0.86 e\sim 0.86 , representing spheroidal shapes, while the green PDF ( l = 2.43 , w = 2.12 l=2.43,w=2.12 ) peaks at e ∼ 0.47 , e\sim 0.47, representing ellipsoidal shapes. For extreme shapes ( l = 4.5 , w = 1.34 l=4.5,w=1.34 ), the probability density decreases, and we get a bimodal distribution which peaks at e p ​ e ​ a ​ k ∼ 0.3 e_{peak}\sim 0.3 and e p ​ e ​ a ​ k ∼ 0.75 e_{peak}\sim 0.75 , due to projection effects.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：已知轴比l、w的条件PDF。蓝色PDF（轴比l=1.22，w=1.18）在椭圆率e≈0.86处达到峰值，代表球体形状；绿色PDF（l=2.43，w=2.12）在e≈0.47处达到峰值，代表椭球形状。对于极端形状（l=4.5，w=1.34），概率密度降低，并出现双峰分布，峰值分别在e≈0.3和e≈0.75处，这是由于投影效应所致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Conditional PDF for varying thickness with constant L = 16 L=16 and W = 10 W=10 . We vary T T from 1 to 8. As the shape gets spherical, i.e., the ratios l , w → 1 l,w\rightarrow 1 , the conditional PDFs shift to the right.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在L=16和W=10固定条件下，不同厚度的条件PDF。我们改变T从1到8。随着形状趋于球形（即轴比l、w→1），条件PDF向右移动。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Posterior PDFs for some clusters in our sample. On the x axis, we plot the ellipticity, and on the y axis, we plot the probability density. The legend contains the name of the cluster.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：样本中某些星系团的后验PDF。x轴为椭圆率，y轴为概率密度。图例包含星系团名称。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Prior distributions of the samples for l l and w w . 2 2 2 Prior distributions of the samples for l l and w w . The last two columns list the χ 2 \chi^{2} statistic between the model PDF ( 𝒫 m ​ o ​ d ​ e ​ l \mathcal{P}_{model} ) and the observational PDF ( 𝒫 o ​ b ​ s ​ ( e ) \mathcal{P}_{obs}(e) ) before and after the Monte Carlo procedure.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：l和w样本的先验分布。这里，𝒩(μ,σ)是均值和标准差的正态分布，𝒰(a,b)是a和b之间的均匀分布。最后两列列出了蒙特卡洛过程前后模型PDF（𝒫_model）与观测PDF（𝒫_obs(e)）之间的χ²统计量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Model PDFs for Sample 0 (blue curve), Sample 1 (green curve), and Sample 2 (orange curve), sampled from distribution l ∈ 𝒰 ​ ( 1.0 , 5.0 ) l\in\mathcal{U}(1.0,5.0) , w ∈ 𝒰 ​ ( 1 , l ) w\in\mathcal{U}(1,l) for sample 0, l ∈ 𝒰 ​ ( 1.25 , 2.5 ) l\in\mathcal{U}(1.25,2.5) , w ∈ 𝒰 ​ ( 1 , l ) w\in\mathcal{U}(1,l) for sample 1, and l ∈ 𝒰 ​ ( 2.5 , 5 ) l\in\mathcal{U}(2.5,5) , w ∈ 𝒰 ​ ( 1 , l ) w\in\mathcal{U}(1,l) for sample 2. The black curve represents the observational PDF.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：样本0（蓝色曲线）、样本1（绿色曲线）和样本2（橙色曲线）的模型PDF。样本0的l∈𝒰(1.0,5.0)，w∈𝒰(1,l)；样本1的l∈𝒰(1.25,2.5)，w∈𝒰(1,l)；样本2的l∈𝒰(2.5,5)，w∈𝒰(1,l)。黑色曲线代表观测PDF。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Model PDF for the points in reduced sample 3, i.e., after Monte-Carlo estimation procedure in section 2.4 . The reduced sample was obtained by removing the points that are not essential to the model PDF. The model PDF closely follows the observational PDF (black curve), suggesting that the sample contains the correct pair of l , w l,w , which reconstructs our observational PDF.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：缩减样本3中点的模型PDF，即经过第2.4节蒙特卡洛估算过程后的结果。缩减样本通过移除对模型PDF非必要的点获得。模型PDF紧密跟随观测PDF（黑色曲线），表明样本包含正确的l、w对，从而重构了我们的观测PDF。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : 2D probability plot for the ratios in sample 3. The bar represents the probability density for the bins. The probability for the plot was evaluated by multiplying the probability by the width of the bins.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：样本3中轴比的二维概率图。色条表示各箱的概率密度。该图的概率通过将概率乘以箱宽计算得到。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 超级盘近年来已成为一个活跃的研究领域，J0116-473是研究这种扩展结构的一个有前景的目标。我们的主要目标是搜索与疑似超级盘相关的HI吸收。然而，未检测到此类吸收特征，表明超级盘中中性氢含量很低或不存在。此外，我们检查了位于星系核心附近和假定超级盘平面内的一个致密点源，从而能够搜索针对该背景连续谱的HI吸收。我们还利用巨米波射电望远镜（GMRT）在波段3、4和5的观测，对星系进行了详细的多波段形态分析。使用这三个频段的数据对星系和附近的点源进行了光谱分析。从核心向瓣区观察到光谱指数系统性变陡，这与老化的同步辐射等离子体预期一致。我们还发现，北内侧瓣的光谱明显比南内侧瓣更陡，这可能反映了与所提出的超级盘相关的环境效应。由于超级盘预计包含热电离气体，我们还检查了XMM-牛顿望远镜的档案X射线观测。尽管可以看到与射电瓣相关的弥散X射线发射，但在疑似超级盘对应的区域未检测到显著发射。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：超级盘中中性氢含量很低或不存在；谱指数差异可能反映超级盘的环境效应；超级盘可能主要包含热电离气体而非中性氢或显著X射线发射物质。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Observation details for J0116–473 obtained from GMRT archival data.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：从GMRT档案数据获得的J0116–473观测详情。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Various regions marked in red circles over the band 5 continuum map. The size of the synthesized beam is indicated by a blue ellipse at the bottom left corner.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：波段5连续谱图上用红色圆圈标记的不同区域。左下角的蓝色椭圆表示合成波束的大小。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Continuum maps of J0116 − - 473 at GMRT Bands 3, 4, and 5 with radio contours overlaid. The synthesized beam is shown in blue in the lower-left corner of each panel. The diffuse continuum emission is more prominent in Band 3 than in Bands 4 and 5. For Band 3, contours start at 6 ​ σ 6\sigma and increase by successive factors of 2 \sqrt{2} for 12 levels. For Bands 4 and 5, contours start at 4 ​ σ 4\sigma and 3 ​ σ 3\sigma , respectively, and increase by the same factor.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：J0116-473在GMRT波段3、4和5的连续谱图，叠加了射电等值线。每个面板左下角的蓝色椭圆表示合成波束。弥散连续谱发射在波段3中比在波段4和5中更显著。对于波段3，等值线从6σ开始，以连续因子√2增加12个级别。对于波段4和5，等值线分别从4σ和3σ开始，并以相同因子增加。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: X-ray image of J0116 − - 473 derived from XMM–Newton observations, with GMRT Band 3 radio contours overlaid in white. The two parallel cyan lines indicate the plane of the superdisk. The dark region at the position of the host galaxy corresponds to the excised central point source. Radio contours start at 6 ​ σ 6\sigma and increase by successive factors of 2 \sqrt{2} for 12 levels.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：J0116-473的X射线图像，源自XMM-牛顿观测，叠加了白色GMRT波段3射电等值线。两条平行的青色线表示超级盘的平面。宿主星系位置的暗区对应于被切除的中心点源。射电等值线从6σ开始，以连续因子√2增加12个级别。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Log-Log plot of frequency vs flux density. We used data from three different frequency bands and performed a linear fit. The unit of flux is mJy, and frequency was measured in MHz. The data points with error bars are shown in black.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：频率与通量密度的对数-对数图。我们使用了三个不同频段的数据并进行了线性拟合。通量单位为毫央，频率单位为兆赫。带误差棒的数据点以黑色显示。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Mean spectral index values measured in different regions of J0116–473.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：在J0116–473不同区域测量的平均光谱指数值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Left column: Flux density vs Frequency plot for the different lobes of the galaxy J0116-473. The dashed green line represents the expected absorption frequency (i.e., 1239.446 MHz); Right column: Flattened Spectrum between the frequency range of 1238 to 1242 MHz, along with the region-specific RMS value. This is the cutout frequency range from the left column highlighted in yellow. The green line represents the expected absorption frequency.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：左列：星系J0116-473不同瓣区的通量密度与频率图。绿色虚线表示预期的吸收频率（即1239.446兆赫）；右列：1238至1242兆赫频率范围内的平坦光谱，以及区域特定的均方根值。这是左列中黄色高亮部分的频率范围截取。绿线表示预期的吸收频率。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 继对晚型星系恒星比角动量（sAM）二维空间分布的首次观测研究之后，我们利用新提出的j型分类法量化了星系模拟中的形态-运动学多样性。我们分析了从TNG50 MW/M31母样本中选出的约8000个TNG50恒星盘（覆盖0 ≤ z ≤ 3.5和9.5 ≤ log(M_⋆/M_⊙) ≤ 11.2）的恒星sAM面密度（sAMSD）。通过四种形态-运动学指标（源自与Freeman sAMSD分布的比较以及星系在sAMSD空间中的傅里叶分解）来刻画其j子结构。一个包含四个全协方差分量的高斯混合模型为每个星系分配了属于四种j型之一的概率。我们发现TNG50盘展现出与观测一致的形态-运动学多样性，通过四种主导的j子结构重新分布恒星角动量，这些子结构随红移演化如下：j不规则型（平均红移=0.91）、j旋涡型（平均红移=0.76）、j环型（平均红移=0.62）和j棒型（平均红移=0.39）。气体分数和恒星旋转支撑（V/σ）驱动了这一演化：富气星系优先拥有j不规则型和j旋涡型，而贫气星系则倾向于j环型和j棒型。在固定气体分数下，较高的V/σ分别有利于j旋涡型和j环型。我们得出结论：在TNG50中，经历长期演化的星系盘内存在角动量再分配的经典路径，该路径仅能通过其形态-运动学描述来揭示。sAMSD分析将恒星动力学变化与其对质量再分配的影响联系起来，从而能够重建全面的星系演化历史。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：星系盘在长期演化中存在角动量再分配的经典路径，该路径仅能通过形态-运动学描述揭示。sAMSD分析将恒星动力学变化与质量再分配联系起来，有助于重建完整的星系演化历史。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Face-on (top) and edge-on (bottom) view of Σ ⋆ \Sigma_{\star} (left), v ⋆ θ v_{\star\theta} (middle), and ι ⋆ \iota_{\star} (right) for the galaxy with the highest j ⋆ j_{\star} of our sample. The SubHaloID and the 5 kpc length scale are located at the top and bottom left of all face-on maps, respectively, while the redshift corresponding to the snapshot is located at the bottom right of the face-on Σ ⋆ \Sigma_{\star} .

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : ι ⋆ \iota_{\star} (left), ι model \iota_{model} (middle), and ( ι ⋆ − ι model ) / ι model \left(\iota_{\star}-\iota_{model}\right)/\iota_{model} (right) for the galaxy with the highest 𝒞 2 ​ D \mathcal{C}_{2D} in our sample. The solid black line on all panels shows the disc scale length, while the dashed black line shows the radius at which the maximum speed is reached on the rotation curve. The SubHaloID and the 5 kpc length scale are located at the top and bottom left of all face-on maps, respectively. The redshift is located at the bottom right of ι ⋆ \iota_{\star} , and the 𝒞 2 ​ D \mathcal{C}_{2D} value is located at the bottom right of the residue map.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：样本中具有最高C_2D的星系的ι_⋆（左）、ι_model（中）和(ι_⋆ - ι_model)/ι_model（右）。所有面板中的实黑线表示盘标长，虚黑线表示旋转曲线上达到最大速度的半径。所有正面图的左上角和左下角分别标注了SubHaloID和5 kpc长度标尺。红移标注在ι_⋆图的右下角，C_2D值标注在残差图的右下角。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : ι ⋆ \iota_{\star} (left column), and their Fourier decomposition (right column), for the three galaxies in our sample that best represent the j ⋆ j_{\star} -irregular, j ⋆ j_{\star} -bar and j ⋆ j_{\star} -spiral morpho-kinematics, from top to bottom. The a 1 a_{1} and a 2 a_{2} profiles are displayed along with the radial bin stellar particle histogram in the right column. The solid black line on all panels shows the disc scale length, while the dashed black line shows the radius at which the maximum speed is reached on the rotation curve for each galaxy. The SubHaloID identifying each galaxy is located at the top left of all face-on maps, the 5 kpc length scale at the bottom left, and the redshift at the bottom right.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：从上到下依次为样本中最佳代表j_⋆-不规则型、j_⋆-棒型和j_⋆-旋涡型形态-运动学的三个星系的ι_⋆（左列）及其傅里叶分解（右列）。右列显示了a_1和a_2轮廓以及径向bin恒星粒子直方图。所有面板中的实黑线表示盘标长，虚黑线表示每个星系旋转曲线上达到最大速度的半径。每个星系的SubHaloID标注在所有正面图的左上角，5 kpc长度标尺在左下角，红移在右下角。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Histograms of the morpho-kinematic metrics for each of the four components identified by the GMM. From left to right, the panels show the number of galaxies per bin for 𝒞 2 ​ D \mathcal{C}_{2D} , a 1 max a_{1}^{\max} , a 2 max a_{2}^{\max} , and R 2 max R_{2}^{\max} , respectively. We assign a j ⋆ j_{\star} -type to each of the four components, as indicated at the top of the figure, based on the shape of their distributions and following the logic described in Sect. 3.3 . The dotted lines indicate the mean values of the corresponding j ⋆ j_{\star} -types for each distribution, while the coloured text gives their mean values together with the ranges defined by the 16th and 84th percentiles. The grey histogram at the background of each panel represents the entire sample.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：GMM识别的四个分量各自的形态-运动学指标直方图。从左到右，面板分别显示C_2D、a_1^max、a_2^max和R_2^max的每bin星系数。根据分布形状并遵循第3.3节描述的逻辑，我们为每个分量分配了一个j_⋆型，如图顶部所示。虚线表示每个分布对应j_⋆型的平均值，彩色文本给出了平均值及第16和第84百分位数定义的范围。每个面板背景中的灰色直方图代表整个样本。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Markov transition matrix for the different j ⋆ j_{\star} -types obtained from the posterior probabilities of the GMM classification. Each element P CN P_{CN} represents the row-normalised probability that a galaxy snapshot associated with the current state ( C C ) evolves into the next state ( N N ) in the immediately following snapshot. The mean redshift for each j ⋆ j_{\star} -type is displayed below their corresponding label along the y-axis.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：基于GMM分类后验概率的不同j_⋆型之间的马尔可夫转移矩阵。每个元素P_CN表示与当前状态（C）相关的星系快照在紧接着的下一个快照中演变为下一状态（N）的行归一化概率。每个j_⋆型的平均红移显示在y轴对应标签下方。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Expected j ⋆ j_{\star} -types fraction (top), mean f gas f_{gas} and mean V / σ V/\sigma (bottom) with respect to redshift for our sample. Each j ⋆ j_{\star} -type is labelled at the top of the figure with its corresponding marker and colour. The blue and red dashed vertical lines in both panels mark the redshifts at which ⟨ f gas ⟩ = 0.5 \langle f_{gas}\rangle=0.5 and ⟨ V / σ ⟩ = 1 \langle V/\sigma\rangle=1 , respectively. The grey histogram in the background of the top panel shows the percentage of galaxies within each redshift bin. A minimum of five galaxies per bin was ensured throughout the analysis. The x-axis is inverted such that the chronological evolution of the sample, from the past to the present, is read from left to right.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：样本中期望的j_⋆型比例（上）、平均f_gas和平均V/σ（下）随红移的变化。每个j_⋆型在图的顶部用相应的标记和颜色标注。两个面板中的蓝色和红色虚线分别标记了⟨f_gas⟩ = 0.5和⟨V/σ⟩ = 1对应的红移。上面板背景中的灰色直方图显示了每个红移bin内星系的百分比。分析中确保每个bin至少有五个星系。x轴反向，使得样本从过去到现在的时序演化从左到右阅读。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : Morpho-kinematic metrics in the j ⋆ j_{\star} – M ⋆ M_{\star} diagram for our sample. The x-axis and y-axis show the total stellar mass and total stellar sAM, respectively. Hexagonal bins containing at least five galaxies are coloured according to the mean value of the corresponding metric, whilst individual galaxies outside the bins are shown with smaller and semi-transparent symbols. The minimum and maximum values of the colour bars correspond to the 10th and 90th percentiles of each metric distribution. The dashed black line represents the best-fitting Fall relation for our sample. The contours show the smoothed 2D density distribution of the galaxies, enclosing approximately the 1σ \sigma , 2σ \sigma , and 3σ \sigma Gaussian-equivalent credible regions.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：样本在j_⋆–M_⋆图中的形态-运动学指标。x轴和y轴分别表示总恒星质量和总恒星比角动量。包含至少五个星系的六边形bin根据对应指标的平均值着色，而bin外的单个星系用较小且半透明的符号显示。颜色条的最小值和最大值对应每个指标分布的第10和第90百分位数。虚黑线表示样本的最佳拟合Fall关系。等高线显示了星系的平滑二维密度分布，分别包围约1σ、2σ和3σ的高斯等效可信区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8 : The j ⋆ j_{\star} -types transition diagram in the j ⋆ − M ⋆ j_{\star}-M_{\star} plane. Each sAMSD map representing a morpho-kinematic class corresponds to the galaxy with the minimum Euclidean distance to the associated GMM centroid in the scaled four-dimensional parameter space, and is centred on its corresponding M ⋆ M_{\star} and j ⋆ j_{\star} values. The value of redshift, corresponding to the mean redshift from each class, is shown below the label indicating its j ⋆ j_{\star} -type. The arrows between maps represent transitions with P CN ≥ 0.10 P_{CN}\geq 0.10 between j ⋆ j_{\star} -types. Black arrows indicate transitions from a j ⋆ j_{\star} -type with higher mean redshift to one with lower mean redshift, whilst grey arrows represent the opposite behaviour. The arrow width scales with P CN P_{CN} , whereas the frame width is proportional to the self-transition probability P CC P_{CC} . The dashed black line is the same best-fitting Fall relation shown in Fig. 7 .
figures.caption_zh: 图8：j_⋆-M_⋆平面上的j_⋆型转移图。每个代表形态-运动学类别的sAMSD图对应在缩放的四维参数空间中与相关GMM质心欧氏距离最小的星系，并以其对应的M_⋆和j_⋆值为中心。红移值（对应每个类别的平均红移）显示在指示其j_⋆型的标签下方。图之间的箭头表示j_⋆型之间P_CN ≥ 0.10的转移。黑色箭头表示从较高平均红移的j_⋆型向较低平均红移的转移，而灰色箭头表示相反行为。箭头宽度随P_CN缩放，而边框宽度与自转移概率P_CC成正比。虚黑线与图7中相同的最佳拟合Fall关系。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 利用暗能量光谱巡天（DESI）第二次数据发布中的发射线星系（ELGs），我们评估了依赖于性质的成像系统改正。我们采用与其他DESI示踪物相同的线性回归方法推导系统权重，但分别对ELG子样本进行，以提供一种基于物理的替代方案，替代默认的基于神经网络的方法。在此过程中，我们发现暗能量巡天（DES）覆盖区域更深的成像导致更高的整体数密度，但缺乏具有极端g−r和r−z颜色的目标。DES区域的ELGs在按g−r vs. r−z平面中的位置进行子采样时，也显示出不同的红移分布。为了解决这些影响，我们在DESI星表生成流程中实现了对DES覆盖区域的单独处理，这在物理上是合理的，并且在某些情况下对于精确的成团测量是必要的。在单独处理DES后，我们发现依赖于性质的系统权重进一步减轻了约10%子样本中的虚假成团信号，而默认方案对于全样本仍然是最优的。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：单独处理DES足迹在物理上是合理的，在某些情况下对精确聚类测量至关重要；属性依赖权重对部分子样本有效，但全样本仍以默认方案为优。

Each solid colored line and arrow mark the zero-point and direction of increasing distance for the corresponding quantity. Shading indicates the number of 0.8 < z < 1.1 0.8<z<1.1 ELGs ( 𝙴𝙻𝙶 ​_ ​ 𝙻𝙾𝙿𝚗𝚘𝚝𝚚𝚜𝚘 \tt{ELG\_LOPnotqso} ) in two-dimensional bins and uses logarithmic scaling.

figures.caption_en: Table 3 : Definitions of ELG subsamples with 0.8 < z < 1.1 0.8<z<1.1 . Horizontal lines separate the galaxy property used to define each group of subsamples. The leftmost column lists the shorthand name for each subsample, which we use throughout this work. The number of galaxies in each subsample is listed as N gal N_{gal} . Stellar masses and [OII] luminosities have units of M ⊙ M_{\odot} and erg s -1 , respectively.

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Subsamples defined by bounds along each galaxy property, as listed in Table 3 . All ELGs with 0.8 < z < 1.1 0.8<z<1.1 are used when splitting on each property, meaning the sum of all subsamples in a given panel is preserved. The coloring marks distinct subsamples and matches that of all subsequent figures.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：根据表3所列每个星系性质的边界定义的子样本。在按每个性质分割时，使用所有0.8<z<1.1的ELGs，这意味着给定面板中所有子样本的总和保持不变。颜色标记不同的子样本，并与所有后续图中的颜色匹配。

The right panel shows the distribution of new systematic weights for the subsample farthest from the stellar locus, D s g ​ r ​ z ​ ( 6 ) D^{grz}_{s}(6) , before enforcing the prior. Negative weights are shown as absolute values in pink. Both panels illustrate that before enforcing the prior, the subsample farthest from the stellar locus, D s g ​ r ​ z ​ ( 6 ) D^{grz}_{s}(6) , receives relatively frequent, extreme weights.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：针对每个子样本定制的系统权重检查。左图显示每个子样本中权重在[0.5, 2]之外的星系数量。右图显示在施加先验之前，距离恒星序列最远的子样本D_s^{grz}(6)的新系统权重分布。负权重以绝对值形式用粉色显示。两图均说明，在施加先验之前，距离恒星序列最远的子样本D_s^{grz}(6)接收了相对频繁的极端权重。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Comparison of our systematic weights derived via linear regression on subsamples ( w sys , linear subsample w_{sys,\penalty 10000\ linear}^{subsample} ) to those provided in the DESI LSS catalogs, which are derived via SYSNet on all ELGs together ( w sys , SYSNet all w_{sys,\penalty 10000\ SYSNet}^{all} ). In each main panel, the solid line and shaded region show the median and 1σ \sigma bounds of the distribution. Marginalized distributions—normalized to a maximum of unity—are shown along the top and right axes.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：我们通过子样本线性回归推导的系统权重（w_{sys, linear}^{subsample}）与DESI LSS星表中提供的、通过SYSNet对所有ELGs一起推导的权重（w_{sys, SYSNet}^{all}）的比较。在每个主图中，实线和阴影区域显示分布的中位数和1σ边界。边缘分布——归一化到最大值为1——显示在顶部和右侧轴上。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在宇宙学和粒子物理学中，贝叶斯模型选择通常依赖于对竞争模型先验的强烈且常被忽视的依赖。标准方法——参考先验、分层先验或自然性诉求——忽略了相关的理论知识或依赖于难以操作定义的准则。我们提出“相干性原则”：一种可重复的处方，根据与现有理论已验证结构（即“语法”，包括对称性、守恒律、局域性、洛伦兹不变性和普适性模式）的兼容性来分配模型先验。无动机违反这些规则会产生相干性代价，通过一个由可校准参数α控制的最大熵指数形式转换为先验权重。所得先验不同于贝叶斯奥卡姆因子和自然性：它惩罚的不是参数体积或精细调谐，而是对已验证理论语法的偏离。我们通过宇宙学和基础物理学的例子（中微子质量机制、暗能量和修正引力、暴胀、标准模型外扇区以及层级天体物理推断）来说明该原则。我们还用四个历史案例（广义相对论、泡利中微子、宇称破坏和狭义相对论）对其进行了测试，在这些案例中，证据和理论背景可以重构。这些例子表明，当在正确的领域和时间定义适当的语法时，该原则倾向于历史上成功的选择。相干性原则使物理学推理中常见但通常隐性的部分——对已验证结构规则的信任——变得明确。它将这种判断转化为贝叶斯推断中透明、可检验且可推翻的组成部分，当数据足够约束时，让经验似然自由主导。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该原则将物理学中常见但通常隐性的“信任已验证结构规则”的推理显式化，使其成为贝叶斯推断中透明、可检验、可推翻的组成部分，并在数据充分时允许经验似然主导结果。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Coherence-cost partition of the ( w 0 , w a ) (w_{0},w_{a}) plane. Green: quintessence-realizable histories ( w ≥ − 1 w\geq-1 throughout, C = 0 C=0 ), containing Λ \Lambda CDM at ( − 1 , 0 ) (-1,0) and the Caldwell–Linder thawing wedge (hatched, Eq. 3.4 ). Orange: fully phantom histories ( w ≤ − 1 w\leq-1 throughout), requiring a ghost ( C ≥ 1 C\geq 1 ). Yellow: phantom-divide crossing (Eq. 3.5 ), forbidden to a single minimally coupled scalar by Vikman’s no-go and hence requiring an extra degree of freedom or modified gravity ( C ≥ 1 C\geq 1 ). The actual DESI DR2 w 0 ​ w a w_{0}w_{a} CDM confidence contours (BAO + + CMB + + SN; 68% and 95%; Gaussian reconstruction of the published marginalized constraints [ 68 ] ) lie in the crossing zone for every supernova sample.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：(w0, wa)平面的相干性代价分区。绿色：可实现为精质的历史（全程w≥-1，C=0），包含(-1,0)处的ΛCDM和Caldwell–Linder解冻楔形区（阴影部分，式3.4）。橙色：完全幻影历史（全程w≤-1），需要鬼场（C≥1）。黄色：幻影分界线穿越（式3.5），被Vikman禁戒定理禁止用于单个最小耦合标量场，因此需要额外自由度或修正引力（C≥1）。实际的DESI DR2 w0waCDM置信轮廓（BAO+CMB+SN；68%和95%；基于已发表边缘化约束[68]的高斯重构）对于每个超新星样本都位于穿越区。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Illustrative coherence costs and prior weights ( α = 1 \alpha=1 ) for the candidate models discussed in Section 3.3 . Costs depend on the stated grammar and on the independent-motivation clause; ranges indicate the spread across sub-cases. The table is intended to make the assignments explicit and contestable, not to fix them definitively.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：第3.3节讨论的候选模型的说明性相干性代价和先验权重（α=1）。代价取决于所陈述的语法和独立动机条款；范围表示子案例间的差异。该表旨在使分配明确且可争议，而非最终确定。

figures.caption_zh: 表2：物理学之外可能应用相干性原则的基于理论的模型比较示例。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们在平坦ΛCDM框架下，检验了从宇宙微波背景（CMB）、暗能量光谱仪（DESI）重子声学振荡测量以及暗能量巡天（DES）Ia型超新星推断的宇宙距离-红移关系的一致性。DESI以亚百分比精度恢复了CMB约束的参数组合$(r_d h)(Ω_m/0.3)^{0.4}$，表明在$z \sim 1$处的BAO测量与复合时代的声学尺度之间具有极好的一致性。施加CMB约束得到的$Ω_m$估计值略低于普朗克值，但仅存在轻微张力。高红移DES超新星样本与标准宇宙学模型吻合良好，而当前低红移锚点样本显示出约0.05星等的系统偏移，这很大程度上驱动了表观上对演化暗能量的偏好。来自暗能量基岩全天超新星计划（DEBASS）的初步数据未显示此偏移，表明未解决的低红移系统误差可能解释了这一差异。这些结果表明，单一的平坦ΛCDM模型能准确描述从本地宇宙到复合时代的距离-红移关系，对哈勃张力的新物理解释施加了越来越严格的约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：单一的平坦ΛCDM模型能准确描述从本地宇宙到复合时代的距离-红移关系，对哈勃张力的新物理解释施加了越来越严格的约束，低红移系统误差可能是造成矛盾的主要原因。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 原初非高斯性（PNG）是研究早期宇宙和暴胀物理的基本探针。本文针对即将开展的中国空间站巡天望远镜（CSST）的光谱巡天，系统研究了局域型PNG参数f_NL的约束能力。利用高分辨率九天N体模拟套件，我们在三个代表性红移z=0.3、0.6和0.9处构建了发射线星系（ELG）的真实模拟星表。同时考虑了CSST的观测特征，包括红移不确定性和基于发射线信噪比的选择函数。我们开发了一套稳健的分析框架，用于处理红移空间中的星系功率谱和双谱，该框架考虑了红移空间畸变、尺度依赖偏差和非线性效应。通过联合马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）分析，我们发现仅功率谱就能提供有竞争力的约束，而加入双谱（特别是针对挤压极限构型）可将f_NL的约束精度提高约5%-6%。联合分析在三个红移处、1 (h^{-1}Gpc)^3共动体积的模拟数据中给出了f_NL=-20±52的约束结果，对于CSST全光谱巡天，约束精度预计将提升数倍甚至一个数量级。这项工作展示了像CSST这样的第四代巡天项目探测暴胀物理的潜力，并强调了高阶统计量在从大尺度结构巡天中提取信息的重要性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：CSST作为第四代巡天项目，能够有效探测暴胀物理，高阶统计量在提取大尺度结构信息中具有重要作用。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 大尺度均匀性假设是现代宇宙学的基石，也是FLRW框架有效性的基础。检验宇宙过渡到均匀性的尺度仍然是一个关键的观测挑战，尤其是在星系巡天精度不断提高的背景下。我们旨在通过系统比较用于估计角均匀性尺度θ_H的不同计算方法，并量化方法选择和物理成团尺度的影响，来评估θ_H的稳健性。我们分析了来自MICE Grand Challenge模拟的模拟星系目录。使用Landy-Szalay估计器和直接对计数方法计算角分形维数D_2(θ_H)。我们实现了包括符号回归在内的不同方法来建模D_2(θ_H)并确定θ_H。不确定性通过重采样技术和替代参数误差传播方法进行估计。我们发现θ_H的估计对分析中的方法选择（如巡天面积、红移区间、数值实现和拟合策略）敏感。虽然其红移演化是稳健的，但其绝对值对建模选择和局部成团特征的存在都很敏感。我们的结果强调了方法系统学在均匀性研究中的重要性，表明θ_H的确定不仅取决于数据，还取决于所采用的分析策略。符号回归等灵活方法为建模这些效应提供了有用的框架，但也强调了仔细建模和巡天设计的必要性。这对未来旨在高精度检验宇宙学原理的大尺度结构分析具有重要意义。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：方法系统学在均匀性研究中具有重要影响，θ_H的确定不仅依赖于数据，还取决于分析策略。符号回归等灵活方法提供了建模框架，但需要仔细建模和巡天设计，这对未来高精度检验宇宙学原理的大尺度结构分析具有重要意义。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在天文学和宇宙学参数推断中，协方差矩阵通常由有限数量的模拟估计得到，因此协方差不确定性会影响后验校准和参数约束。我们从基于模拟估计协方差矩阵的似然推断角度研究协方差正则化。首先，我们分析了在高斯插件似然和协方差边缘化的Sellentin-Heavens似然下的标量协方差缩放。通过期望负对数似然损失，我们表明在高斯插件似然下，Hartlap协方差侧缩放是最优的，而在Sellentin-Heavens似然下，未缩放的样本协方差是最优的。这表明标量协方差校正依赖于似然函数，且一旦通过Sellentin-Heavens似然边缘化协方差不确定性，额外的Hartlap型全局缩放并不被偏好。然后，我们引入一种收缩公式，其中样本协方差向球形目标正则化，收缩强度被视为辅助推断量。为收缩强度分配先验，似然函数诱导其后验分布，最终参数后验通过边缘化得到。蒙特卡洛实验表明，收缩显著改善了协方差条件性，而对收缩强度的边缘化将正则化量的不确定性传播到后验推断中。所提出的方法提供了一种将协方差边缘化似然推断与噪声模拟估计协方差矩阵的结构正则化相结合的简单方式。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：提出了一种将协方差边缘化似然推断与仿真估计协方差矩阵的结构正则化相结合的简单方法，有效提升了协方差条件性并正确传播不确定性。

figures.caption_en: Fig. 1: Empirical excess negative log-likelihood loss for scalar covariance corrections in a representative autoregressive scenario with p = 50 p=50 and n s / p = 5 n_{s}/p=5 . The dashed lines indicate the theoretical scalar optima. The two panels use separate vertical scales, and each loss is shifted by its minimum. Under the Gaussian plug-in likelihood, the empirical minimum is close to the Hartlap covariance-side scaling c G ⋆ c_{G}^{\star} . Under the Sellentin–Heavens likelihood, the empirical minimum is close to c S ​ H ⋆ = 1 c_{SH}^{\star}=1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在代表性自回归场景（p=50，n_s/p=5）中，标量协方差校正的经验超额负对数似然损失。虚线表示理论标量最优值。两个面板使用不同的垂直尺度，每个损失都减去其最小值。在高斯插件似然下，经验最小值接近Hartlap协方差侧缩放c_G^⋆。在Sellentin–Heavens似然下，经验最小值接近c_SH^⋆=1。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Likelihood-loss optimal scalar covariance corrections. Theoretical values are compared with empirical minimisers of the Monte Carlo loss curves.

Points denote the observed data vector, the dashed curve is the true mean function μ i ​ ( θ ) = exp ⁡ ( θ 0 + θ 1 ​ z i ) \mu_{i}(\theta)=\exp(\theta_{0}+\theta_{1}z_{i}) , and the solid curve is the posterior mean fit obtained by sampling the joint posterior of ( θ , α ) (\theta,\alpha) with Stan.
