Bouwens等人，2021，来自HST空白场）和暗端（R. J. Bouwens等人，2017；R. C. Livermore等人，2017；H. Atek等人，2018，来自HFF强透镜星系团）的测量值进行比较。来自H. Atek等人（2024）和Goolsby等人（准备中）的JWST导出测量值的近似转折星等分别以粗垂直绿线和橙线显示。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜对高红移星系的最新观测表明，存在一个明亮的星系群体，其丰度超过了大多数星系形成模型的预测。这些观测促使人们重新思考这些模型，并提出了许多天体物理和宇宙学解决方案，包括宇宙弦——一种可能是宇宙极早期特定相变残留的拓扑缺陷。本文将宇宙弦（一种非线性和非高斯扰动源）整合到半解析代码Zeus21中，从而能够有效预测紫外光度函数。我们精确研究了恒星形成天体物理学与宇宙弦现象学之间的参数简并。我们的结果表明，宇宙弦能够将早期星系丰度提高到足以解释詹姆斯·韦伯和哈勃空间望远镜在红移z=4至z=17范围内测量的紫外光度函数，而无需修改恒星形成物理学。此外，我们设定了弦张力的新上限$G\mu\lessapprox 10^{-8}$（95%置信度），优于此前来自宇宙微波背景的限制。尽管当前数据下该上限存在一定程度的模型和先验依赖性，但它表明紫外光度函数是未来对宇宙弦物理学进行观测约束的一个有前景的途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：宇宙弦可以解释JWST观测到的高红移星系丰度异常，紫外光度函数是未来约束宇宙弦物理的有前景的观测途径，尽管当前结果存在一定的模型和先验依赖性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Comparison between predictions of UVLFs with (dashed line) and without (solid line) the presence of cosmic strings with a string tension corresponding to the 95 % 95\% credibility limits (CL) from Planck 2014. HST observations from Ref. [ Bouwens_2021 ] are shown in comparison in black with their error bar corresponding to a 68 % 68\% confidence interval. In both cases, the astrophysical parameters are standard for galaxy formation models and are the same in both predictions; only the presence of strings changes. These results highlight the very high sensitivity of UVLFs to the presence of cosmic strings for string tensions close to the limits obtained by Planck data. This sensitivity is greater at higher redshifts.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在弦张力对应普朗克2014年95%置信度上限的情况下，有（虚线）和无（实线）宇宙弦时紫外光度函数预测的比较。黑色为来自参考文献[Bouwens_2021]的HST观测，误差棒对应68%置信区间。两种情况下天体物理参数均为星系形成模型的标准值且相同，仅弦的存在与否不同。这些结果突显了在弦张力接近普朗克数据所得上限时，紫外光度函数对宇宙弦存在的高度敏感性，且红移越高敏感性越强。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Comparison of the cosmic string loops halo mass function for different string tensions and the Sheth & \& Tormen (ST) halo mass function as a function of redshift. The factor N N in Equation 7 is set equal to N = 570 N=570 . The vertical axis corresponds to the halo mass function and the horizontal axis to the mass range. As shown in Section II.1 , the cosmic string halo mass function becomes subdominant for most string tensions compared to the ST halo mass function. As redshift increases, the string halo mass function gradually tends to dominate the dark matter haloes high mass regime over the ST halo mass function. This figure highlights that cosmic strings can explain certain anomalies by forming dark matter haloes at high redshift while remaining consistent with observations at lower redshift when their contributions become subdominant.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：不同弦张力下宇宙弦环晕质量函数与Sheth & Tormen (ST) 晕质量函数随红移变化的比较。方程7中的因子N设为N=570。纵轴为晕质量函数，横轴为质量范围。如第II.1节所示，对于大多数弦张力，宇宙弦晕质量函数相对于ST晕质量函数处于次主导地位。随着红移增加，弦晕质量函数逐渐在高质量端主导暗物质晕，超过ST晕质量函数。该图强调，宇宙弦可以通过在高红移形成暗物质晕来解释某些异常，同时在低红移其贡献变得次主导时与观测保持一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Comparison of the impact of the five star formation parameters on final UVLF at redshift z = 8 z=8 . The first four parameters of the SFE and the last G ​ μ G\mu related to cosmic strings (and M c M_{c} in units of M ⊙ M_{\odot} ). Each parameter is varied individually while keeping all others constant. The factor N N in Equation 7 is set equal to N = 570 N=570 . The impact of cosmic strings tends to diminish and become completely negligible as G ​ μ G\mu decreases.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：红移z=8时五个恒星形成参数对最终紫外光度函数影响的比较。前四个参数为恒星形成效率参数，最后一个Gμ与宇宙弦相关（Mc以太阳质量M⊙为单位）。每个参数单独变化，其余参数保持不变。方程7中的因子N设为N=570。随着Gμ减小，宇宙弦的影响趋于减弱并完全可忽略。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of prior choices adopted for the conservative (top) and fiducial (bottom) scenarios in the analysis of UVLFs data from z = 4 z=4 to z = 17 z=17 .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：在分析红移z=4至z=17的紫外光度函数数据时，保守情景（上）和基准情景（下）所采用的先验选择总结。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Marginalized two-dimensional posterior distribution of ϵ ⋆ \epsilon_{\star} assuming the conservative scenario at redshift z = 7 z=7 and assuming log-uniform prior on G ​ μ G\mu . The color ranges from darkest to lightest correspond to the regions containing 68 % 68\% percent, 95 % 95\% percent, and 99 % 99\% percent of the samples. These results suggest a strong degeneracy between the SFE and the cosmic string tension. Without more information on the SFE, this degeneracy remains unbroken and results in some sensitivity to whether one assumes a log-uniform (left) or uniform (right) prior on ϵ ⋆ \epsilon_{\star} .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：假设保守情景和Gμ的对数均匀先验时，红移z=7处ϵ⋆的边际化二维后验分布。颜色从最深到最浅对应包含68%、95%和99%样本的区域。这些结果表明恒星形成效率与宇宙弦张力之间存在强简并。在没有更多恒星形成效率信息的情况下，这种简并无法打破，并导致对ϵ⋆采用对数均匀先验（左）或均匀先验（右）的敏感性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Redshift-by-redshift marginal posterior distributions of log 10 ⁡ [ ( N / 570 ) 2 / 3 ​ G ​ μ ] \log_{10}[(N/570)^{2/3}G\mu] for the conservative scenario with HST UVLFs assuming a log-uniform prior and a prior range on G ​ μ G\mu of [ 10 − 11 , 10 − 6 ] [10^{-11},10^{-6}] at redshifts z = 4 z=4 to z = 8 z=8 (top); and with JWST UVLFs for redshifts z = 9 z=9 to z = 17 z=17 (bottom). The vertical lines indicate the upper limits of log 10 ⁡ [ ( N / 570 ) 2 / 3 ​ G ​ μ ] \log_{10}[(N/570)^{2/3}G\mu] in which 95 % 95\% percent of the samples are contained contain. The most competitive bound is at redshift 9 and with N = 570 N=570 gives G ​ μ ≤ 1.24 × 10 − 8 G\mu\leq 1.24\times 10^{-8} . The bounds at z = 11 z=11 and z = 14 z=14 are very similar.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：保守情景下逐红移的log₁₀[(N/570)^{2/3}Gμ]边际后验分布。采用对数均匀先验，Gμ先验范围为[10⁻¹¹, 10⁻⁶]。上图为HST紫外光度函数在红移z=4至z=8的结果；下图为JWST紫外光度函数在红移z=9至z=17的结果。竖线表示包含95%样本的log₁₀[(N/570)^{2/3}Gμ]上限。最具竞争力的约束来自红移9，当N=570时给出Gμ≤1.24×10⁻⁸。红移11和14的约束非常相似。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Marginal posterior distribution of log 10 ⁡ [ ( N / 570 ) 2 / 3 ​ G ​ μ ] \log_{10}[(N/570)^{2/3}G\mu] for the fiducial scenario with HST UVLFs alone (blue dashed) at redshifts z = 4 , 5 , 6 , 7 z=4,5,6,7 , and 8 8 and JWST and HST UVLFs at redshifts from z = 4 z=4 to 17 17 (red solid). Also included are the combined constraints from the different redshifts in the conservative case using only HST data (orange dash dotted), HST and JWST data (green dotted), and JWST data only (purple dahsed). The vertical lines indicate the upper limits of log 10 ⁡ [ ( N / 570 ) 2 / 3 ​ G ​ μ ] \log_{10}[(N/570)^{2/3}G\mu] in which 95 % 95\% percent of the samples are contained contain.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：基准情景下log₁₀[(N/570)^{2/3}Gμ]的边际后验分布。蓝色虚线为仅使用HST紫外光度函数在红移z=4,5,6,7,8的结果；红色实线为使用JWST和HST紫外光度函数在红移z=4至17的结果。此外，还展示了保守情景下不同红移的组合约束：橙色点划线为仅HST数据，绿色点线为HST和JWST数据，紫色虚线为仅JWST数据。竖线表示包含95%样本的log₁₀[(N/570)^{2/3}Gμ]上限。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Best-fit observable predictions using median values obtained from the posterior distribution of parameters assuming fiducial scenario with (solid) and without (dashed) cosmic strings on HST data from redshifts z = 4 z=4 to z = 8 z=8 . The astrophysical parameter values are summarized in Table 3 in the Appendix B . At these redshifts, it is not necessary to invoke cosmic strings to get a good fit to the data.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：使用基准情景下参数后验分布的中值，对HST数据在红移z=4至z=8的观测预测最佳拟合。实线为有宇宙弦，虚线为无宇宙弦。天体物理参数值总结于附录B的表3中。在这些红移下，无需引入宇宙弦即可获得对数据的良好拟合。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 引力透镜类星体是约束多种基本天体物理现象的有效宇宙工具：它们能够识别微弱的低质量超大质量黑洞，提供对其视线方向上星系际或星际介质的独特约束，并可用于确定哈勃常数$H_0$等关键宇宙学参数。然而，这类现象十分罕见，且难以定义高效、无偏的选择方法。本研究基于盖亚（Gaia）任务的天体测量数据以及一项更大规模的盖亚探测候选透镜类星体光谱后续巡天，报告了一个红移$z=2.67$的显著三重透镜类星体系统的光谱识别。我们详细描述了该类星体的三个镜像及其空间和时间光谱覆盖，重点关注发射线特性，这些特性在不同视线方向上表现出变化，并在约11个月的光谱监测期间呈现时间演化。我们结合多光谱和深光学成像构建了前景源的透镜模型，得到了稳健的暗晕质量$M_{\rm h} = (2.78 \pm 0.05)\times 10^{10}M_\odot$。基于该透镜模型，每条视线之间的时间延迟被转换为固有的类星体时间，从而构建了约18个月、每月一次采样的类星体时间序列。在数月时间尺度上，宽发射线的速度偏移、等效宽度以及电离程度均表现出整体增加。这一典型的三重透镜类星体证明了仅基于盖亚任务的天体测量数据识别此类稀有透镜配置的可行性，我们在此为未来研究提供了优化的选择标准。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：该研究证明了仅基于盖亚天体测量数据识别稀有引力透镜类星体配置的可行性，并为未来研究提供了优化的选择标准。这个三重透镜类星体系统为研究类星体物理和宇宙学参数提供了独特的机会。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Example spectrum of the quasar DR3Gaia0205-3233 at z = 0.843 ± 0.003 z=0.843\pm 0.003 (blue), fit with the dust extinction parameter, A V A_{V} , red (see Eq. 1 ). The redshift is determined from the identified emission lines in the spectrum.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：红移z = 0.843 ± 0.003的类星体DR3Gaia0205-3233的示例光谱（蓝色），用尘埃消光参数A_V拟合（红色，见公式1）。红移由光谱中识别的发射线确定。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Histograms of redshift, z z , and visual extinction parameters, A V A_{V} , for the parent quasar sample observed in this study.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：本研究中观测的母类星体样本的红移z和视觉消光参数A_V的直方图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: S / N S/N for proper motion against G - RP, the difference in the Gaia bands G- and RP-bands. The plotted points are sources from the study discarded as lens candidates (red) and remaining lens candidates, each identified with the source ID and an index separating individual sight lines in the source. To enhance the statistics, known lenses are added, either as lines to connect lenses where photometry of both objects exist in Gaia, or ”+” if not. A line is added, showing that the lens and lens candidate population can be separated by an additional photometric criterion. Note, that we deselect only sources where all sight lines complies to the condition in Eq. 3 – meaning they will be to the right of the line.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：自行运动信噪比S/N与G - RP（盖亚G波段和RP波段之差）的关系。绘制的点包括研究中被排除的透镜候选源（红色）和剩余的透镜候选源，每个源用源ID和区分源内各视线的索引标识。为增强统计，已知透镜被添加为连接线（若盖亚中存在两个天体的测光数据）或“+”号（若无）。添加的线条显示，透镜和透镜候选群体可通过额外的测光标准区分。注意，我们仅排除所有视线均满足公式3条件的源——即它们位于线条右侧。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: (Left): Spectra of each sight line in the lensed quasar DR3Gaia2107-1611, as seen in Fig. 5 . The variability between sightlines are especially clear in the shape of C IV, which is different for sight line B, while Ly α \alpha vary substantially across all sightlines.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：（左）：透镜类星体DR3Gaia2107-1611每条视线的光谱，如图5所示。视线间的变异性在C IV谱线形状上尤为明显，视线B的C IV不同，而Ly α在所有视线中变化显著。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Imaging of DR3Gaia2107-1611 with each slit used for the observing the three sightlines, A, B and C, as seen in Fig. 4 . The lens galaxy is vaguely visible in the center of the lens system. We mark the tentative detection of Ly α \alpha emission on the opposite side of sight line A, detected from the 2D-spectrum of the system before extraction.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：DR3Gaia2107-1611的成像，显示了用于观测三条视线A、B和C的狭缝，如图4所示。透镜星系在透镜系统中心隐约可见。我们标记了在视线A对侧探测到的Ly α发射的暂定检测，该检测来自提取前的系统二维光谱。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Overview of the classification of all 11 objects studied as a part of a larger follow-up spectroscopy survey of lensed quasar candidates. All objects are classified by identifying each sight line of the source. All objects will be named using just the 4 first digits of each coordinate. α Proj. refers to projected.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：作为透镜类星体候选者更大光谱后续巡天一部分的所有11个天体的分类概览。所有天体通过识别源的每条视线进行分类。所有天体将仅使用每个坐标的前四位数字命名。α Proj.指投影。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Comparison of the result of the fit of the lens configuration to the data (left) with the overlay of the contours of the data and the fit, as well as an illustration of the potential ψ ​ ( θ ) \psi(\theta) of the lens galaxy from the fit. (Right) the residual of the data and the fit with the same contour levels as the fit and data. The residual reflects predominantly statistical noise. The fit first and foremost allows us to determine the ordering of sightlines. This allow us to translate spectrum properties into the intrinsic time of the quasar. A discrepancy is visible in the comparison between lens and lens model (left), which likely stems from the fact that the top left sight line is a significantly smaller signal than the remaining. However, we note that the deviation of the location of the centre is δ R ​ A ∼ 0.4 ​ ” \delta_{RA}\sim 0.4" and δ D ​ E ​ C ∼ 0.2 ​ ” \delta_{DEC}\sim 0.2" , which is small enough that we expect it not to influence the derived properties.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：透镜配置拟合结果（左）与数据和拟合轮廓叠加的比较，以及拟合中透镜星系势ψ(θ)的图示。（右）数据和拟合的残差，采用与拟合和数据相同的等高线水平。残差主要反映统计噪声。拟合首先使我们能够确定视线的顺序，从而将光谱特性转换为类星体的固有时间。在透镜与透镜模型比较中可见差异（左），这可能源于左上角视线的信号显著小于其他视线。然而，我们注意到中心位置的偏差为δRA ∼ 0.4”和δDEC ∼ 0.2”，这足够小，预计不会影响推导出的性质。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The Ly α \alpha emission line of each sight line of the lensed quasar DR3Gaia2107-1611 across three different epochs, as described in Table 2 . Ly α \alpha changes dramatically along sightline A, modestly in sightline C and mildly along sightline B. We show only the Ly α \alpha line here to highlight the observed variation.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：透镜类星体DR3Gaia2107-1611每条视线的Ly α发射线在三个不同历元（如表2所述）的情况。Ly α沿视线A变化剧烈，沿视线C变化适中，沿视线B变化轻微。此处仅显示Ly α线以突出观测到的变化。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出一个贝叶斯框架，通过整合欧几里得星系透镜目录中的信息性位置先验，增强了对强透镜引力波的识别。该方法的核心引入了一个两步重加权方案：首先在均匀天区先验下进行引力波参数估计；然后利用所得后验对欧几里得目录中的星系位置进行重加权，构建一个天体物理信息化的位置先验。在我们的框架中比较欧几里得信息先验与均匀先验，揭示了不同的行为。虽然内在波形参数的后验估计对先验变化不敏感，但透镜识别的贝叶斯因子表现出显著的先验依赖性。关键的是，对于真正的透镜事件对，贝叶斯因子系统性增加，而对于非透镜事件对则减少。这种双重效应对于鲁棒判别至关重要。我们的分析表明，这种多信使方法显著提高了透镜搜索的置信度。对于透镜对，该方法将贝叶斯因子平均提高了约10倍，同时有效抑制了非透镜巧合的误报。这强调了先验指定的关键重要性，并展示了通过协同引力波数据与电磁巡天信息所能实现的显著增益。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：多信使方法显著提高了透镜搜索的置信度，展示了结合引力波数据和电磁波调查信息的重要价值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Simulated Euclid lens galaxy catalog for informed positional priors in gravitational lensing analysis. The 5 deg 2 field contains ∼ 77 \sim 77 galaxies with a density of 15 deg -2 , matching ET’s sky localization uncertainty. The field center ( α = 1.375 \alpha=1.375 rad, δ = − 1.2108 \delta=-1.2108 rad) corresponds to the injection position of simulated GW events.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：用于引力透镜分析中信息性位置先验的模拟欧几里得透镜星系目录。5平方度视场包含约77个星系，密度为15 deg⁻²，与爱因斯坦望远镜的天区定位不确定性相匹配。视场中心（α=1.375 rad，δ=-1.2108 rad）对应于模拟引力波事件的注入位置。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Reweighted Euclid lens galaxy prior after incorporating gravitational wave posterior information. The initial uniform weights w i ( 0 ) = 1 / N w_{i}^{(0)}=1/N have been updated to w i w_{i} based on the consistency between galaxy positions ( α i , δ i ) (\alpha_{i},\delta_{i}) and the GW sky localization, implementing the mixture model P Euclid ​ ( α , δ | 𝒢 ) = ∑ i = 1 N w i ​ K ​ ( Δ ​ α i , Δ ​ δ i ) P_{Euclid}(\alpha,\delta\,|\,\mathcal{G})=\sum_{i=1}^{N}w_{i}\,K(\Delta\alpha_{i},\Delta\delta_{i}) . The colorbar indicates the relative probability mass assigned to each galaxy, reflecting the combined evidence from both Euclid catalog and GW parameter estimation.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：结合引力波后验信息后重加权的欧几里得透镜星系先验。初始均匀权重w_i^(0)=1/N已根据星系位置(α_i, δ_i)与引力波天区定位的一致性更新为w_i，实现了混合模型P_Euclid(α,δ|𝒢)=∑_{i=1}^N w_i K(Δα_i, Δδ_i)。色标表示分配给每个星系的相对概率质量，反映了来自欧几里得目录和引力波参数估计的联合证据。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Combined corner plot comparing posterior distributions for lensed gravitational wave signal parameters under different prior assumptions. The royal blue contours show ET lensed GW signal 1 with uniform priors, dark orange contours show ET lensed GW signal 2 with uniform priors, crimson contours show ET lensed GW signal 1 with Euclid priors, and light green contours show ET lensed GW signal 2 with Euclid priors. All contours represent the 68% and 95% credible regions. The injection values are marked by colored lines corresponding to each analysis (gray for uniform prior analyses, crimson and light green for Euclid prior analyses), illustrating the impact of prior information on parameter estimation accuracy. The near-perfect overlap of contours confirms that intrinsic parameter estimates are robust to prior choice for high-SNR ET signals.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：比较不同先验假设下透镜引力波信号参数后验分布的联合角图。皇家蓝轮廓显示均匀先验下的爱因斯坦望远镜透镜引力波信号1，深橙色轮廓显示均匀先验下的爱因斯坦望远镜透镜引力波信号2，深红色轮廓显示欧几里得先验下的爱因斯坦望远镜透镜引力波信号1，浅绿色轮廓显示欧几里得先验下的爱因斯坦望远镜透镜引力波信号2。所有轮廓代表68%和95%置信区域。注入值用对应分析的颜色线条标记（灰色用于均匀先验分析，深红色和浅绿色用于欧几里得先验分析），说明了先验信息对参数估计精度的影响。轮廓近乎完美的重叠证实了对于高信噪比爱因斯坦望远镜信号，内在参数估计对先验选择具有鲁棒性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Comparison of the restricted Bayes factors log 10 ⁡ ℬ ( 5 ) \log_{10}\mathcal{B}^{(5)} computed under uniform and Euclid-informed priors. The Bayes factors are computed using only the five common parameters ( ℳ c \mathcal{M}_{c} , q q , θ JN \theta_{JN} , a 1 a_{1} , a 2 a_{2} ) to isolate the effect of incorporating positional information. Blue points represent unlensed event pairs, while red points represent lensed event pairs. The dashed diagonal line indicates equality between the two priors. The systematic shift of lensed pairs above the diagonal demonstrates the enhanced sensitivity provided by the Euclid-informed prior, while the shift of unlensed pairs below the diagonal shows suppression of false positives.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：在均匀先验和欧几里得信息先验下计算的受限贝叶斯因子log₁₀ℬ^(5)的比较。贝叶斯因子仅使用五个共同参数（ℳ_c, q, θ_JN, a₁, a₂）计算，以隔离位置信息的影响。蓝点表示非透镜事件对，红点表示透镜事件对。虚线对角线表示两种先验下的相等性。透镜对在对角线上方的系统性偏移表明欧几里得信息先验提供的增强灵敏度，而非透镜对在对角线下方的偏移则显示了对误报的抑制。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Statistical summary of the restricted Bayes factors ℬ ( 5 ) \mathcal{B}^{(5)} for lensed and unlensed event pairs. The comparison uses only parameters with identical priors ( ℳ c \mathcal{M}_{c} , q q , θ JN \theta_{JN} , a 1 a_{1} , a 2 a_{2} ). Uncertainties represent the standard deviation across the six event pairs in each category.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：透镜和非透镜事件对受限贝叶斯因子ℬ^(5)的统计摘要。比较仅使用具有相同先验的参数（ℳ_c, q, θ_JN, a₁, a₂）。不确定性表示每个类别中六个事件对的标准差。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 观测表明，星系外流中含有大量致密且呈团块状的分子气体，这为引发恒星形成创造了有利条件。事实上，理论模型和流体动力学模拟已提出，恒星可能在星系外流内部形成，这代表了一种与典型盘状恒星形成截然不同的新模式。本文利用甚大望远镜X-shooter摄谱仪的光谱数据，研究了12个具有活跃活动星系核和高恒星形成率的本地星系。我们通过空间分辨的诊断图（并辅以排除激波和外部光电离贡献的检验）探究了这些外流的激发机制和物理性质。在7个清晰探测到外流的星系中，我们找到了一个星系（IRAS 20551-4250）外流内存在恒星形成的可靠证据，另有2个星系（IRAS 13120-5453和F13229-2934）显示出初步迹象。因此，我们的结果支持先前的研究发现，即外流内恒星形成在这些活跃星系中可能是一种相对普遍的现象，并可能在星系球状成分的形成和演化中发挥了重要作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：研究结果支持先前发现，即外流内恒星形成在活跃星系中可能是相对普遍的现象，这可能对星系球状成分的形成和演化起到重要作用。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Properties of 12 galaxies observed by the X-shooter in the ESO programme 0103.B-0478(A) and 097.B-0918(A). Columns show: redshift, physical scale in kpc per arcsecond, logarithm of the infrared luminosity ( L IR = L ( 8 − 1000 μ L_{IR}=L(8-1000\,\mu m) in units of solar luminosity), average seeing during observations, and right ascension and declination (J2000). Coordinates, scales, and infrared luminosities for F13229-2934/NGC5135, NGC 7130, and IC 4518B are from arribas2008 . Coordinates for IRAS 20551-4250 and infrared luminosities for IRAS 20551-4250 and IRAS 13120-5453 are from SIMBAD and NED. Infrared luminosities for F22491-1808, F00509+1225, and F17207-0014 are from 2003AJ....126.1607S . Infrared luminosities for LEDA 166649, F21130-4446, and F23389+0300 are from NED. Infrared luminosity for NVSSJ151402+015737 (also known as IRAS F15116+0209) is estimated from WISE W4 band photometry. Physical scales are calculated from redshifts using Planck 2018 cosmology for galaxies not in arribas2008 . Coordinates for remaining galaxies are extracted from X-shooter FITS file headers. We could not thoroughly perform analysis and reach a conclusion on the last 5 galaxies in the table because of: (i) poor SNR due to limitations imposed by visibility or exposure time during observation (galaxy F17207-0014, IC 4518B and F23389+0300), (ii) outflow is not detected (galaxy F21130-4446) and (iii) stellar continuum cannot be fitted and caused difficulties in disentangling the galactic outflow components from the stellar continuum (stellar continuum of galaxy F00509+1225 is dominated by the broad-line region). Outflow disentanglement is discussed in Section 2.2 .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：ESO项目0103.B-0478(A)和097.B-0918(A)中X-shooter观测的12个星系的属性。列显示：红移、每角秒的物理尺度（kpc）、红外光度对数（L_IR = L(8–1000 μm)，以太阳光度为单位）、观测期间的平均视宁度，以及赤经和赤纬（J2000）。F13229-2934/NGC5135、NGC 7130和IC 4518B的坐标、尺度和红外光度来自arribas2008。IRAS 20551-4250的坐标以及IRAS 20551-4250和IRAS 13120-5453的红外光度来自SIMBAD和NED。F22491-1808、F00509+1225和F17207-0014的红外光度来自2003AJ....126.1607S。LEDA 166649、F21130-4446和F23389+0300的红外光度来自NED。NVSSJ151402+015737（也称为IRAS F15116+0209）的红外光度根据WISE W4波段测光估算。对于不在arribas2008中的星系，物理尺度使用Planck 2018宇宙学从红移计算得出。其余星系的坐标从X-shooter FITS文件头中提取。由于以下原因，我们未能对表中最后5个星系进行彻底分析并得出结论：(i) 观测期间受能见度或曝光时间限制导致信噪比低（星系F17207-0014、IC 4518B和F23389+0300），(ii) 未探测到外流（星系F21130-4446），(iii) 恒星连续谱无法拟合，导致难以从恒星连续谱中分离星系外流成分（星系F00509+1225的恒星连续谱由宽线区主导）。外流分离在第2.2节讨论。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Subsections of continuum-subtracted X-shooter spectra (black) of the galaxy IRAS 20551-4250, extracted from the central region around the relevant emission lines for BPT-diagnostics, displaying the decomposition by 4 Gaussian components (see legend) representing the narrow components associated with the gas in the galactic disk and the broad components tracing the outflows. For clarity of presentation, the best-fit stellar continuum is subtracted in this figure. However, the full spectral fit with ppxf was performed on the stellar continuum and emission lines simultaneously.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：星系IRAS 20551-4250的连续谱扣除后X-shooter光谱（黑色）子部分，提取自BPT诊断相关发射线周围中心区域，显示由4个高斯分量（见图例）分解的结果，分别代表与星系盘气体相关的窄分量和示踪外流的宽分量。为清晰展示，本图中减去了最佳拟合的恒星连续谱。然而，使用ppxf对恒星连续谱和发射线同时进行了完整光谱拟合。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : A typical case (4 out of 7 galaxies analysed) where outflows are in the AGN excitation region. The flux ratios of the individual components extracted at different apertures for galaxy NVSSJ151402+015737 are plotted on the [NII] (left), [SII] (middle) and [OI] (right) diagnostic diagrams. The velocity of each component is colour-coded, from red (more redshifted) to blue (more blueshifted). The symbols are proportional to the FWHM of the component, as indicated by the legend above. The black line contours indicate the distribution of galaxies and AGN (10, 30, 68, 85 and 95 percent) from the SDSS.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：外流位于AGN激发区域的典型情况（7个分析星系中的4个）。星系NVSSJ151402+015737在不同孔径下提取的单个分量的通量比绘制在[NII]（左）、[SII]（中）和[OI]（右）诊断图上。每个分量的速度用颜色编码，从红色（更红移）到蓝色（更蓝移）。符号大小与分量的FWHM成正比，如图例上方所示。黑色线轮廓表示SDSS中星系和AGN的分布（10%、30%、68%、85%和95%）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Same as Fig. 3 , for the galaxy IRAS 20551-4250, in which case most of the outflowing components are located in the star forming region of the diagram, especially in the [SII]-BPT and [OI]-BPT, which are less affected by metallicity and nitrogen enrichment dependence.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：与图3相同，但针对星系IRAS 20551-4250，其中大多数外流分量位于图的恒星形成区，尤其是在[SII]-BPT和[OI]-BPT中，这些区域受金属丰度和氮富集影响较小。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : The broad components (blue hatched) tend to have lower [SII] flux ratio, hence higher density than the narrow components (orange). The histogram shows 7 galaxies analysed.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：宽分量（蓝色阴影）倾向于具有较低的[SII]通量比，因此密度高于窄分量（橙色）。直方图显示7个分析星系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Ionisation parameter inferred from the F ​ ( [ OIII ] ​ λ ​ λ ​ 4959 , 5007 ​ Å ) F({[OIII]}\lambda\lambda 4959,5007\textup{\AA }) / F ​ ( [ OII ] ​ λ ​ λ ​ 3726 , 3729 ​ Å ) F({[OII]}\lambda\lambda 3726,3729\textup{\AA }) line ratio as a function of the R 23 R_{{23}} parameter. Circles represent kinematic components in the galaxies where outflows occupy the SF region of the BPT and VO diagrams, namely IRAS 20551-4250 (robust evidence; see Figures ˜ 1 , 2 and 4 ), IRAS 13120-5453 (tentative evidence; see Figures ˜ 10 , 11 and 12 ) and F13229-2934 (tentative evidence; see Figures ˜ 13 , 14 and 15 ). Outflows (large blue circles) share similar locations with normal star-forming regions (small red circles). This result argues strongly in favour of in situ stellar photoionisation by young stars formed inside the outflows, because in the alternative case where outflows are photoionised by external star formation the blue markers should lie much lower than the red markers. The black line contours indicate the distribution of galaxy population (30, 80 and 95 percent) from the SDSS. Most components lie within the 95 percent population contours. For those who do not, they are situated on the left hand side of the cluster, i.e. have lower log( R 23 R_{23} ) values and hence, higher metallicity. These components also have a higher range of uncertainties.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：由F([OIII]λλ4959,5007 Å)/F([OII]λλ3726,3729 Å)线比推断的电离参数作为R23参数的函数。圆圈代表外流占据BPT和VO图恒星形成区的星系中的运动学分量，即IRAS 20551-4250（可靠证据；见图1、2和4）、IRAS 13120-5453（初步证据；见图10、11和12）和F13229-2934（初步证据；见图13、14和15）。外流（大蓝色圆圈）与正常恒星形成区（小红色圆圈）位置相似。这一结果强烈支持外流内部由年轻恒星形成的原位恒星光电离，因为在替代情况（外流被外部恒星形成光电离）下，蓝色标记应位于红色标记下方更远处。黑色线轮廓表示SDSS中星系群的分布（30%、80%和95%）。大多数分量位于95%的群体轮廓内。对于不在其中的分量，它们位于星团左侧，即具有较低的log(R23)值，因此金属丰度更高。这些分量也具有更大的不确定性范围。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 致密气体核与其原恒星之间的联系是理解分子云中恒星形成的关键。本文通过后处理一个大规模整体坍缩团块中的恒星形成模拟，利用polaris计算尘埃辐射转移，并利用CASA生成合成ALMA数据，研究了通过1.3毫米ALMA图像的树状图分析所识别出的核的性质、持久性及其原恒星含量。通过将模拟中的汇点与原恒星对应，我们发现大多数树状图识别的核不包含任何原恒星，许多核是与沿供料纤维的团块流相关的瞬态特征。含有原恒星的核通常拥有少于4颗原恒星，且由于核的瞬态性和边界变化，原恒星质量与其母核质量之间没有强相关性。通过计算所有核的观测相关强度加权平均温度，我们发现即使在早期，核的温度分布也跨越数十开尔文，且其宽度随时间增加。最亮毫米核的1.3毫米峰值和积分强度并不随其中最大质量原恒星的增长而单调增加，这表明不能假设更亮的毫米源包含更大质量的原恒星。利用时间域，我们测试了被提议作为潜在演化指标的观测性质，发现只有区域的总1.3毫米通量密度、核内的总1.3毫米通量密度以及核的数量与时间表现出强且统计显著的相关性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：致密气体核通常是瞬态结构，不能简单通过毫米波亮度推断原恒星质量。大多数观测提出的演化指标缺乏统计显著性，只有少数整体参数能可靠指示演化阶段。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The column density of the cloud at T = 4.135 T=4.135 Myr, centred on the location of the most massive sink in the snapshot. The left panel shows the large scale filamentary structure of the cloud that creates overdense regions where sink particles form. The right panel shows a zoom view; the field of view shown corresponds to the yellow rectangle in the left panel. In the right panel, positions of sink particles with masses ≥ 0.02 ​ M ⊙ \geq 0.02M_{\odot} at the end of the simulation are overlaid, colour-coded by their current total mass.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：T=4.135 Myr时云团的柱密度，以快照中最大质量汇点的位置为中心。左图显示云团的大尺度纤维状结构，该结构形成了汇点粒子形成的过密区域。右图为放大视图；视场对应左图中的黄色矩形。右图中叠加了模拟结束时质量≥0.02 M⊙的汇点粒子的位置，颜色编码表示其当前总质量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Final synthetic ALMA 1.3 mm image of the snapshot shown in the right panel of Fig. 1 , after post-processing with POLARIS and CASA . The 1.3 1.3 mm dust emission is shown in colourscale, overlaid with markers showing the current masses of sink particles above 1 ​ M ⊙ 1M_{\odot} at the end of the simulation; the contours show cores identified by astrodendro (see Section 2.4 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：经POLARIS和CASA后处理后，图1右图所示快照的最终合成ALMA 1.3毫米图像。1.3毫米尘埃辐射以彩色标度显示，叠加标记表示模拟结束时质量大于1 M⊙的汇点粒子的当前质量；轮廓线显示了由astrodendro识别的核（见第2.4节）。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Snapshot statistics
figures.caption_zh: 表1：快照统计

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Synthetic ALMA 1.3 mm continuum images for each snapshot, centred on the position of the most massive sink and with the core boundaries identified with astrodendro (Section 2.4 , Table 2 ) overlaid in blue. The images shown have been corrected for the primary beam response; the colourscale and field of view are the same for all images and the scalebars assume D=2 kpc (Section 2.2 ). In each panel, the synthesised beam is shown at lower left and the time of the snapshot in Myr and number of identified cores are given at upper left.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：每个快照的合成ALMA 1.3毫米连续谱图像，以最大质量汇点的位置为中心，蓝色叠加了由astrodendro识别的核边界（第2.4节，表2）。显示的图像已校正主波束响应；所有图像的彩色标度和视场相同，比例尺假设D=2 kpc（第2.2节）。每个面板左下角显示合成波束，左上角给出快照时间（Myr）和识别的核数量。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Properties of cores extracted from synthetic ALMA 1.3 mm images.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：从合成ALMA 1.3毫米图像中提取的核的性质。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Synthetic ALMA 1.3 mm peak intensity (left panel) and integrated flux density (right panel) of the brightest mm core in each timestep (the core with the highest peak intensity), plotted against the equivalent stellar mass of the most massive sink in this core. The colour of each point indicates the total number of cores identified in the synthetic image of that snapshot (Table 1 , see also Figure 3 ). Once the equivalent stellar mass of the most massive sink reaches a few M ⊙ , it has little correlation with the mm peak intensity.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：每个时间步中最亮毫米核（峰值强度最高的核）的合成ALMA 1.3毫米峰值强度（左图）和积分通量密度（右图），与该核中最大质量汇点的等效恒星质量的关系。每个点的颜色表示该快照合成图像中识别的核总数（表1，另见图3）。一旦最大质量汇点的等效恒星质量达到几个M⊙，它与毫米峰值强度的相关性很小。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Number of cores identified with astrodendro within the 30% mosaic response (see Section 2.4 ) plotted against snapshot time. Points are colour coded by the equivalent stellar mass of the most massive sink within the brightest mm core. Note that this generally corresponds to the most massive sink in the simulation, with the notable exception of T=4.135 Myr, when the most massive sink in the simulation is not within the brightest mm core.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：在30%镶嵌响应内（见第2.4节）由astrodendro识别的核数量与快照时间的关系。点按最亮毫米核中最大质量汇点的等效恒星质量进行颜色编码。注意，这通常对应于模拟中最大质量的汇点，但T=4.135 Myr时例外，此时模拟中最大质量的汇点不在最亮毫米核内。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Synthetic 1.3 mm ALMA images (left) and Polaris column density maps (right) for representative examples of high-column density features in the simulation that do not correspond to extracted mm cores. All panels are labelled with the snapshot time and show core boundaries identified by astrodendro overlaid in blue contours. The synthesised beam is shown at lower-left of the ALMA images and selected compact features that do not correspond to extracted cores are highlighted with blue + + on the column density maps.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：模拟中不对应于提取的毫米核的高柱密度特征的典型示例的合成1.3毫米ALMA图像（左）和Polaris柱密度图（右）。所有面板均标有快照时间，蓝色轮廓线显示由astrodendro识别的核边界。ALMA图像左下角显示合成波束，柱密度图上用蓝色+标记了不对应于提取核的选定紧凑特征。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 围绕银河系运行的矮星系的特性对于检验我们星系形成模型以及各种宇宙学理论非常有用。最近测量银河系卫星矮星系质量的努力依赖于银河系盘和晕中恒星的运动和位置，这些恒星受到卫星星系经过的扰动。由于我们星系中存在许多已知过程会导致恒星出现观测到的不平衡状态，这些运动学方法受到仅识别特定卫星星系引起的扰动的固有困难的限制。我们提出了一种新方法，利用来自太阳附近毫秒脉冲星极其精确计时得出的直接瞬时加速度数据，来确定两个银河系卫星星系——大麦哲伦云和人马座矮椭球星系——的质量。当大麦哲伦云和人马座矮椭球星系绕银河系运行时，它们会导致盘结构产生波状扭曲，以及暗物质晕和重子盘质心的大尺度偏移。这两种效应导致太阳附近盘面上下出现不对称加速度，这在脉冲星加速度数据中观测到。值得注意的是，这种不对称性的幅度取决于轨道卫星的质量。我们分析了不同卫星质量的模拟网格。我们发现，大麦哲伦云在潮汐半径内（半径16.6千秒差距）当前包含的总（暗物质+重子）质量为4.1 ± 1.0 × 10^10太阳质量，而人马座矮椭球星系在半径5千秒差距内的质量为3.5 ± 2.4 × 10^8太阳质量。这些结果与先前对这些天体质量的测定总体一致且具有竞争力，但首次完全独立于任何恒星运动学数据。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该方法首次完全独立于恒星运动学数据，为测量银河系卫星星系质量提供了新的可靠途径，结果与先前测量一致且具有竞争力。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Panel (a): Simulation of the Milky Way, the LMC and the Sgr dwarf galaxy/tidal stream. The density of the dwarf galaxies and their stripped material have been enhanced compared to the host galaxy to make them more visible. The locations and velocities (shown as gray arrows, times a normalization factor) of the orbiting satellites match their observed present-day locations. Panel (b): The locations of the pulsar data compared to the Sun, plotted on top of the simulated vertical accelerations (shown as colored contours). The accelerations above the disk are stronger than the accelerations below the disk; near the midplane, this is shown by the “lopsided” contours on either side of the white horizontal line.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：面板(a)：银河系、大麦哲伦云和人马座矮星系/潮汐流的模拟。与主星系相比，矮星系及其剥离物质的密度被增强以使其更可见。轨道卫星的位置和速度（显示为灰色箭头，乘以归一化因子）与其观测到的当前位置相符。面板(b)：脉冲星数据相对于太阳的位置，叠加在模拟的垂直加速度上（显示为彩色等高线）。盘面上方的加速度强于盘面下方的加速度；在盘面附近，这由白色水平线两侧的“不对称”等高线显示。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Dwarf galaxy model parameters for the simulations used in this work.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本工作中使用的模拟的矮星系模型参数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The simulated and observed acceleration asymmetry. Panel (a) shows the vertical component of the line-of-sight acceleration ( a los , z a_{{los},z} ) for the best-fit simulation above and below the Solar position. The acceleration below the midplane has been mirrored to positive z z for easier comparison (dashed lines). This acceleration is shown at the beginning of the simulation (red), where the profile is identical above and below the midplane. At the end of the simulation, after the effects of the satellites have perturbed the galaxy, the acceleration profile is asymmetric, with larger magnitude (more negative) at positive z z than at the same distance from the midplane, but negative z z . This asymmetry can be visualized as the difference between the solid and dashed blue lines, and is plotted in panel (b). The acceleration asymmetry determined from the observed MW pulsar data is also plotted as a black dashed line in panel (b), and the 1σ \sigma and 2σ \sigma errors are shown as gray regions around the central value. The simulation agrees with the inferred acceleration asymmetry within this error region.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：模拟和观测到的加速度不对称性。面板(a)显示了最佳拟合模拟中太阳位置上方和下方的视线加速度垂直分量。为了便于比较，盘面下方的加速度已镜像到正z方向（虚线）。该加速度在模拟开始时（红色）显示，此时盘面上下方的轮廓相同。在模拟结束时，在卫星扰动星系之后，加速度轮廓不对称，在正z方向比在距盘面相同距离但负z方向处幅度更大（更负）。这种不对称性可以可视化为实线和虚线蓝色线之间的差异，并在面板(b)中绘制。从观测到的银河系脉冲星数据确定的加速度不对称性也在面板(b)中绘制为黑色虚线，1σ和2σ误差显示为中心值周围的灰色区域。模拟与推断的加速度不对称性在该误差区域内一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The vertical acceleration asymmetry at the location of the Sun for simulations with different masses of the LMC and Sgr dwarfs. Each column corresponds to a different mass of the LMC, and each row corresponds to a different mass of the Sgr dSph (see Table 3 ). Each panel shows the simulated acceleration asymmetry (acceleration above the disk minus acceleration below the disk) vs. distance from the midplane in blue, and the asymmetry inferred from the observed pulsar data as a dashed black line with 1σ \sigma error bars. The thin horizontal gray line corresponds to no asymmetry. The simulation that best recovered the MW asymmetry has a heavy LMC and a medium-sized Sgr.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：对于不同大麦哲伦云和人马座矮星系质量的模拟，太阳位置处的垂直加速度不对称性。每列对应不同的大麦哲伦云质量，每行对应不同的人马座矮椭球星系质量（见表3）。每个面板以蓝色显示模拟的加速度不对称性（盘面上方加速度减去盘面下方加速度）与距盘面距离的关系，并以黑色虚线显示从观测脉冲星数据推断的不对称性，附有1σ误差棒。细水平灰色线对应无不对称性。最佳恢复银河系不对称性的模拟具有一个大质量的大麦哲伦云和一个中等质量的人马座矮椭球星系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Mass profiles as a function of radius for the best-fit satellite models. Also shown are various literature values for the masses; bound and/or total masses are shown as horizontal lines, and masses enclosed within some radius are shown as points with error bars. Our determination of the LMC mass broadly agrees with previous measurements of the enclosed mass at various radii. Although our best-fit total mass is somewhat large compared to the literature values, note that the definition of “total mass” is generally not the same across studies, which can lead to systematic differences. Our best-fit Sgr mass is on the lower end of the literature values when comparing the bound mass of the satellite (mass enclosed within the vertical dashed line). Estimates for the total mass of Sgr (both present-day and original) are not shown here because they are far off the vertical scale of the plot (see Table 3 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：最佳拟合卫星模型的质量随半径变化的轮廓。还显示了各种文献中的质量值；束缚质量和/或总质量显示为水平线，某个半径内的质量显示为带误差棒的点。我们对大麦哲伦云质量的测定与先前在不同半径处对包围质量的测量大致一致。尽管我们的最佳拟合总质量与文献值相比有些偏大，但请注意，“总质量”的定义在不同研究中通常不同，这可能导致系统性差异。当比较卫星的束缚质量（垂直虚线内的质量）时，我们最佳拟合的人马座矮椭球星系质量处于文献值的较低端。此处未显示人马座矮椭球星系总质量（当前和原始）的估计值，因为它们远远超出图的垂直比例（见表3）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The vertical acceleration asymmetry across a face-on projection of the disk for simulations with different masses of the LMC and Sgr dwarfs. Columns and rows are the same as in Figure 3 . Each panel shows the simulated acceleration asymmetry (acceleration above the disk minus acceleration below the disk) as color, where positive asymmetry is shown in red, and negative asymmetry (like that observed at the Sun) is blue. The location of the Sun is shown as a gold star. The structure induced by the two satellites is complicated and nonlinear, although there are potentially patterns in the asymmetries along the same rows or columns.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：对于不同大麦哲伦云和人马座矮星系质量的模拟，盘面正面投影上的垂直加速度不对称性。列和行与图3相同。每个面板以颜色显示模拟的加速度不对称性（盘面上方加速度减去盘面下方加速度），其中正不对称性显示为红色，负不对称性（如在太阳处观测到的）显示为蓝色。太阳的位置显示为金色星形。两个卫星引起的结构复杂且非线性，尽管沿相同行或列可能存在不对称性的模式。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The vertical acceleration asymmetry across a face-on projection of the disk for simulations with different combinations of the LMC and Sgr dwarfs. The top row shows simulations with only the LMC, the middle row shows simulations with only Sgr, and the bottom row shows simulations with both dwarfs. The mass of each dwarf increases from left to right across columns. The location of the Sun is shown as a gold star. The effect of increasing a satellite’s mass is not linear, in that a larger mass does not correspond to stronger accelerations in identical locations, but rather it changes both the relative locations and magnitudes of the acceleration asymmetries across the disk. Also note that the accelerations do not add linearly; the accelerations observed in a simulation with only the LMC plus the accelerations from a Sgr-only simulation do not necessarily correspond to the accelerations observed in a simulation with both of those dwarfs, even if they have the same mass.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：对于不同大麦哲伦云和人马座矮星系组合的模拟，盘面正面投影上的垂直加速度不对称性。顶行显示仅包含大麦哲伦云的模拟，中间行显示仅包含人马座矮椭球星系的模拟，底行显示包含两个矮星系的模拟。每个矮星系的质量从左到右逐列增加。太阳的位置显示为金色星形。增加卫星质量的效果不是线性的，即更大的质量并不对应于相同位置更强的加速度，而是改变了盘面上加速度不对称性的相对位置和幅度。还要注意，加速度不是线性相加的；在仅包含大麦哲伦云的模拟中观测到的加速度加上仅包含人马座矮椭球星系的模拟中的加速度，不一定对应于包含这两个矮星系（即使质量相同）的模拟中观测到的加速度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Vertical disk structure in the best-fit simulation. All panels show a face-on projection of the disk, and the location of the Sun is shown as a golden star. Panel (a) shows the mean vertical acceleration across the disk. Panel (b) shows the vertical acceleration asymmetry across the disk, calculated as the difference in a los , z a_{{los},z} at z = 1 z=1 kpc and z = − 1 z=-1 kpc from the midplane. Panel (c) shows the mean height of the disk stars (i.e. the warp).
figures.caption_zh: 图7：最佳拟合模拟中的垂直盘结构。所有面板显示盘面的正面投影，太阳的位置显示为金色星形。面板(a)显示盘面上的平均垂直加速度。面板(b)显示盘面上的垂直加速度不对称性，计算为距盘面z=1千秒差距和z=-1千秒差距处视线加速度垂直分量的差值。面板(c)显示盘面恒星的平均高度（即翘曲）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 来自LITTLE THINGS巡天的24个矮不规则星系的恒星形成面密度（Sigma_SFR）与气体面密度及中平面压力相结合，以检验先前在旋涡星系中发现的关联。压力是气体层内盘面的重量，包括气体、恒星和暗物质，在矮不规则星系中通常主导盘面引力。我们将结果与M33的外部区域进行比较，该区域具有相似的局部性质但金属丰度略高，从而能够探测到CO。所有数据均卷积至HI波束，但为研究分辨率的影响，首先使用平均径向轮廓检查星系，然后使用具有1.5角秒像素和244 pc像素的星图。发现这些关联在24 pc至424 pc的分辨率范围内与分辨率无关。根据M33中H_2面密度与矮不规则星系中相同Sigma_SFR处的HI面密度比较，估计分子与原子面密度的平均比值为0.23±0.1。利用该比值，所有矮不规则星系的每个分子的平均恒星形成率大致相同，且比M33中的速率低2倍。矮不规则星系中的压力非常低，以至于CO本质上是一种致密气体示踪剂，在矮不规则星系的低金属丰度下具有与旋涡星系中HCN相同的面密度阈值。因此，矮不规则星系中的CO区域应具有强自引力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：矮不规则星系中恒星形成与气体密度、压力的关系与螺旋星系相似，但低金属丰度环境导致分子气体比例较低，CO成为致密气体示踪剂，这些区域应具有强自引力特性。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: The Galaxy Sample
figures.caption_zh: 表1：星系样本

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The HI KS relation (left) and Σ SFR − P \Sigma_{SFR}-P relation (right) for 24 dIrr galaxies (blue dots and blue fitted lines). The fits are given by Eqs. 9 and 10 . Also on the left are the Σ SFR − H 2 \Sigma_{SFR}-H_{2} relation for the outer part of M33 (cyan), for all annuli in M33 (red circles and fitting line), and for all gas in M33 (red crosses). The red dots are for WLM with a star formation rate from FUV (like the others), and with gas surface densities for just the CO mass in the star-forming region (left-hand dot), the dark gas in this region (central dot) and the total gas in this region (right-hand dot). WLM is shown by the red dot in the right-hand panel as well, along with the outer M33 fit in cyan and two models from kim24 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：24个矮不规则星系的HI KS关系（左）和Σ_SFR-P关系（右）（蓝色点和蓝色拟合线）。拟合由方程9和10给出。左侧还显示了M33外部区域的Σ_SFR-H_2关系（青色）、M33所有环的Σ_SFR-H_2关系（红色圆圈和拟合线）以及M33所有气体的Σ_SFR-H_2关系（红色十字）。红色点代表WLM，其恒星形成率来自FUV（与其他星系相同），气体面密度分别对应恒星形成区域中的CO质量（左侧点）、该区域中的暗气体（中心点）和该区域中的总气体（右侧点）。WLM在右侧面板中也由红点表示，同时还有青色表示的M33外部拟合和来自kim24的两个模型。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Histograms of the dark gas factors, defined to be the ratios of the derived dark gas surface densities to the observed HI surface densities, for each annulus in the dIrrs. On the left, they are calculated from the shift between the outer M33 Σ SFR − H 2 \Sigma_{SFR}-H_{2} relationship and the dIrr observations at the same Σ SFR \Sigma_{SFR} . On the right they are calculated by supplementing Σ g \Sigma_{g} in equation ( 8 ) until P P for the dIrrs equals P P for the outer part of M33 at the same Σ SFR \Sigma_{SFR} . Negative dark gas factors on the right are for dIrr observations at P P larger than the M33 pressure. The dark gas fractions from the KS relation are typical for dIrrs, derived by other methods, but some of the dark gas fractions from the Σ SFR − P \Sigma_{SFR}-P relation are higher.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：矮不规则星系每个环的暗气体因子直方图，定义为推导的暗气体面密度与观测的HI面密度之比。左侧，根据外部M33的Σ_SFR-H_2关系与相同Σ_SFR处矮不规则星系观测之间的偏移计算。右侧，通过补充方程（8）中的Σ_g，直到矮不规则星系的P等于相同Σ_SFR处M33外部区域的P来计算。右侧的负暗气体因子对应于P大于M33压力的矮不规则星系观测。来自KS关系的暗气体分数对于矮不规则星系是典型的，通过其他方法推导，但来自Σ_SFR-P关系的某些暗气体分数更高。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The average values for the pressure in the outer part of M33 (cyan line) and the dIrrs (blue curve), and for the terms in the pressure equation for the dIrrs (red, green, black lines), evaluated for Σ SFR \Sigma_{SFR} in units of M ⊙ M_{\odot} pc -2 Myr -1 between 10 − 3 10^{-3} and 10 − 4 10^{-4} . The pressure variations are relatively small, which is consistent with the good correlation between Σ SFR \Sigma_{SFR} and P P . High values of ρ DM \rho_{DM} are compensated by low values of Σ g \Sigma_{g} . The points on the far right represent values for the outer disk of M33 using the same color scheme. These points for M33 pressure are averages over outer disk pixels which have Σ S ​ F ​ R \Sigma_{SFR} in the same range as considered for dIrrs, while the cyan line for M33 pressure is the value from the fit to the Σ SFR − P \Sigma_{SFR}-P relation at log ⁡ Σ S ​ F ​ R = − 3.5 \log\Sigma_{SFR}=-3.5 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：M33外部区域（青色线）和矮不规则星系（蓝色曲线）的压力平均值，以及矮不规则星系压力方程中的各项（红色、绿色、黑色线），针对Σ_SFR在10^{-3}至10^{-4} M_sun pc^{-2} Myr^{-1}之间进行评估。压力变化相对较小，这与Σ_SFR和P之间的良好相关性一致。高的ρ_DM值由低的Σ_g值补偿。最右侧的点代表使用相同颜色方案的M33外盘值。这些M33压力点是外盘像素的平均值，这些像素的Σ_SFR与矮不规则星系考虑的范围相同，而M33压力的青色线来自log Σ_SFR = -3.5处Σ_SFR-P关系的拟合值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Pixel values in the HI KS relation for 24 dIrr galaxies: (left) 1.5 ′′ 1.5^{\prime\prime} pixels, (right) the same with 244 pc pixel values superposed in red. The black line is the molecular KS relation for the outer part of M33; the cyan lines are bivariate fits to the data with solid lines for the 1.5 ′′ 1.5^{\prime\prime} pixels and dashed lines for the 244 pc pixels; the orange segmented line is the azimuthally-averaged radial distribution from Figure 1 . Galaxies are ordered by increasing HI resolution size in pc, as indicated.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：24个矮不规则星系的HI KS关系像素值：（左）1.5角秒像素，（右）相同但叠加了244 pc像素值（红色）。黑线是M33外部区域的分子KS关系；青色线是数据的双变量拟合，实线对应1.5角秒像素，虚线对应244 pc像素；橙色分段线是图1中的方位角平均径向分布。星系按HI分辨率大小（以pc为单位）递增顺序排列，如图所示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Pixel values in the Σ SFR − P \Sigma_{SFR}-P relation usinf 1.5 ′′ 1.5^{\prime\prime} pixels (left) and 244 pc pixels superposed in red (right). The black line is the molecular KS relation for the outer part of M33; the cyan lines are bivariate fits to the data with solid lines for the 1.5 ′′ 1.5^{\prime\prime} pixels and dashed lines for the 244 pc pixels; the orange segmented line is the azimuthally-averaged radial distribution from Figure 1 . Galaxies are ordered by increasing HI resolution size in pc, as indicated.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：使用1.5角秒像素（左）和叠加244 pc像素（右）的Σ_SFR-P关系像素值。黑线是M33外部区域的分子KS关系；青色线是数据的双变量拟合，实线对应1.5角秒像素，虚线对应244 pc像素；橙色分段线是图1中的方位角平均径向分布。星系按HI分辨率大小（以pc为单位）递增顺序排列，如图所示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Slopes over the full range of Σ SFR \Sigma_{SFR} (left) and rms deviations around the correlation fits for Σ SFR \Sigma_{SFR} between 10 − 4 10^{-4} and 10 − 5 ​ M ⊙ 10^{-5}\;M_{\odot} pc -2 Myr -1 (right) for the KS (top) and Σ SFR − P \Sigma_{SFR}-P relations (bottom), with blue symbols using 1.5 ′′ 1.5^{\prime\prime} pixels and red symbols using 244 pc pixels.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：KS关系（上）和Σ_SFR-P关系（下）在Σ_SFR全范围内的斜率（左）以及Σ_SFR在10^{-4}至10^{-5} M_sun pc^{-2} Myr^{-1}之间相关拟合的均方根偏差（右），蓝色符号使用1.5角秒像素，红色符号使用244 pc像素。

The red points are at the positions of peak densities in Figures 4 and 5 . The normalization divides Σ SFR \Sigma_{SFR} and P P by Σ g \Sigma_{g} .

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们采用模型无关的方法，通过3x2点联合分析（包括星系透镜、星系成团及其交叉相关谱），在线性尺度以及扩展到非线性尺度上，对膨胀因子和增长因子进行了Fisher预测。为此，我们没有为物质功率谱（这些探测的主要成分）选择特定模型，而是通过参数化其组成部分（如膨胀因子和增长因子）以及标准晕模型和 excursion set 理论中的成分（分布在多个红移bin中），以及不同的偏差和非线性偏差建模函数来表达它。我们将该技术应用于Euclid、Rubin和SKA的公开规格参数，红移范围0.2 < z < 1.8，并表明可以由此获得膨胀因子E(z_i)和增长因子G(z_i)的模型无关约束。我们还展示了当从线性尺度的悲观截断过渡到更乐观的非线性设置时，每个红移壳层精度增益的变化；或者单独使用每个巡天与组合使用所有巡天之间的差异；或者固定与增加非线性建模中自由度数目的影响。我们发现，在最不可知的情况下，当同时结合三个巡天时，仍能达到对E(z_i)的百分量级高精度，而增长因子G(z_i)在相同设置下的约束强度弱一个数量级。我们还发现，对于这两个因子，当从线性尺度过渡到非线性尺度时，精度可提升一个数量级。我们得出结论，即使采用最不可知的方法，利用非线性尺度和未来巡天的组合能力，我们也能有效约束宇宙背景演化和结构形成的两个重要因子。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要的结论：即使采用最不可知论的方法，通过利用非线性尺度和未来巡天项目的组合能力，我们仍能有效约束宇宙背景演化和结构形成的两个重要因子。这种方法为模型无关的宇宙学研究提供了有前景的途径。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在过去十年中，天体化学发生了显著转变，重新聚焦于非热过程对分子星际介质的作用，特别是高能粒子（如宇宙射线粒子和快电子）及X射线辐射。这一转变在很大程度上是由于在抑制其形成的环境中（如冷致密气体中的前恒星核或星系中心的高能环境）观测到星际复杂有机分子（iCOMS）而引发的。与此同时，大量新的实验室研究探讨了高能辐射和电子对天体物理冰化学的影响，证明了这些辐射能够诱导复杂化学过程。近年来，理论模型也开始在气相和冰相中纳入新的宇宙射线驱动过程。在本综述中，我们将X射线辐射和高能粒子驱动的化学方面统一为“高能天体化学”，定义该术语并回顾其基本化学过程。最后，我们审视了高能天体化学发挥作用的各种实验室环境，并指出了未来需要解决的问题。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，高能天体化学是理解星际复杂有机分子形成的重要框架，特别是在传统热化学过程难以解释的环境中。未来需要进一步研究高能过程在星际化学中的具体作用机制。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 气相氧丰度（金属丰度）特性可通过发射线分析加以约束，对于研究星系演化历史具有重要意义。我们利用KMOS超深旋转速度巡天（KURVS）中43个红移z~1.5的恒星形成星系，分析了其电离气体的积分和空间分辨静止光学发射线特性。通过使用[NII]λ6584/Hα（N₂）、([OII]λλ3727,9+[OIII]λλ4959,5007)/Hβ（R23）以及首次在该红移下应用的[NII]λ6584/[OII]λλ3727,9（N₂O₂）指示剂，我们测量了气相金属丰度及其径向梯度。在约4千秒差距尺度上，当考虑每个星系中尘埃的空间分布（以尘埃消光径向梯度参数化）时，由N₂O₂和N₂测得的金属丰度梯度高度一致。我们报告了在z~1.5时近乎平坦的金属丰度梯度分布，其第50、16和84百分位数分别为0.01、-0.03和0.05 dex kpc⁻¹。这些发现与同期先前的观测研究和模拟结果吻合良好。我们将观测到的负金属丰度梯度归因于自调节系统的自然结果，而正梯度则可能源于潜在的星系喷泉和较高的并合率。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要总结：观测到的负金属丰度梯度是自调节系统的自然结果，正梯度可能源于星系喷泉和较高的并合率，为理解星系演化提供了重要线索。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 毫米/亚毫米波段的变异性通常归因于由盘介导的动力学吸积过程，然而，目前对这类变异性的探测仅限于邻近分子云中的低质量原恒星。近期观测也在高质量原恒星中发现了显著的（亚）毫米波段变异性，但已确认的案例稀少且缺乏系统性监测。本研究分析了阿塔卡马大型毫米/亚毫米波阵（ALMA）第6波段（1.3毫米）对22个大质量原星团的多历元连续谱观测数据，历元间隔从数小时到超过两年不等，并实现了约0.3角秒的一致角分辨率。这些数据使我们能够追踪更宽质量范围内原恒星的变异性，并研究一种与邻近分子云截然不同的环境。通过采用定制的处理流程进行数据降噪、图像对齐和相对流量校准，我们实现了高精度流量测量，并首次基于干涉数据以统计方式研究了大质量原星团中的毫米波变异性。应用astrodendro算法，我们识别出383个凝聚体并追踪其峰值强度的变化。标准差分析和差异图揭示了5个变源，对应的变源比例下限为1.3%。其中，I13111-6228尤为突出，它包含一个超致密H II区，其连续谱峰值强度在一年内增加了68%，不确定度为2%。这支持了大质量恒星形成中的爆发式吸积模型，表明该模型是大质量恒星形成的一条可行路径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：该研究证实了大质量原星团中存在毫米波变异性，支持大质量恒星形成中的爆发式吸积模型。I13111-6228的显著亮度变化为爆发式吸积提供了直接观测证据，表明这种机制可能是大质量恒星形成的重要途径。研究结果为理解大质量恒星形成的动力学过程提供了新的观测约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Processing workflow. Schematic overview of the four main processing steps adopted in this study. The process begins with data selection and calibration, including dataset cross-matching and ALMA pipeline calibration to prepare the data for further steps (Sect. II ). In the second step, imaging and self-calibration, we perform spectral Line flagging and self-calibration (Sect. III.1 ), followed by smoothing all epochs of each source to a common beam to produce consistent continuum images across epochs (Sect. III.2 ). In the third step, condensation extraction, involves aligning images across epochs, identifying compact condensations in both datasets, and applying a unified mask for consistent source extraction (Sect. IV.1 ). Finally, in flux comparison, we perform relative calibration (Sect. IV.2 ), track the peak intensity evolution of each condensation across epochs (Sect. IV.3 ), and evaluate variability using both the standard deviation method (Sect. IV.3.1 ) and the difference map analysis (Sect. IV.3.2 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：处理流程。本研究采用的四个主要处理步骤的示意图。流程始于数据选择与校准，包括数据集交叉匹配和ALMA管道校准，为后续步骤准备数据（第II节）。第二步，成像与自校准，我们进行谱线标记和自校准（第III.1节），然后将每个源的所有历元平滑至共同波束，以生成跨历元一致的连续谱图像（第III.2节）。第三步，凝聚体提取，涉及跨历元图像对齐、在两个数据集中识别致密凝聚体，并应用统一掩模进行一致的源提取（第IV.1节）。最后，在流量比较中，我们进行相对校准（第IV.2节），追踪每个凝聚体跨历元的峰值强度演化（第IV.3节），并使用标准差方法（第IV.3.1节）和差异图分析（第IV.3.2节）评估变异性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : ALMA Band 6 continuum images of I15520–5234 obtained from four epochs spanning over two years (with the observing dates indicated in the figure). The cyan dashed circle in each panel marks the 0.5 primary beam FWHM region of the MaMMOtH survey ( ∼ \sim 13.24 ″ \arcsec ), which is also used as the reference area for image alignment. Upper panels (a, b): MaMMOtH 1.3 mm continuum emission. Lower panels (c, d): QUARKS 1.3 mm continuum emission. For consistency, all contour levels in the four panels are defined using the rms noise level measured from the first-epoch image (2022 May 30), where σ rms = 1.23 ​ mJy ​ beam − 1 \sigma_{rms}=1.23~{mJy~beam^{-1}} . White contours show [5, 10, 20] × σ rms \times\sigma_{rms} , while gray contours show [25, 50, 80] × σ rms \times\sigma_{rms} . The synthesized beam of each epoch is shown in the lower-left corner of each panel, and a 0.05 pc scale bar is indicated in the lower-right corner.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：I15520–5234的ALMA第6波段连续谱图像，来自跨越两年多的四个历元（观测日期如图所示）。每个面板中的青色虚线圆圈标出了MaMMOtH巡天0.5倍主波束半高全宽区域（∼13.24″），该区域也用作图像对齐的参考区域。上方面板（a, b）：MaMMOtH 1.3毫米连续谱发射。下方面板（c, d）：QUARKS 1.3毫米连续谱发射。为保持一致性，四个面板中的所有等高线均使用第一历元图像（2022年5月30日）测量的均方根噪声水平定义，其中σ_rms = 1.23 mJy beam^{-1}。白色等高线显示[5, 10, 20] × σ_rms，灰色等高线显示[25, 50, 80] × σ_rms。每个历元的综合波束显示在各自面板的左下角，右下角标有0.05 pc比例尺。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Top: Cartoon illustrating the extraction of structures and their fluxes. Red and green contours represent condensations independently identified in the MaMMOtH and QUARKS surveys using the astrodendro algorithm. The union of these two sets defines a common mask, shown in yellow, which is consistently applied across all observing epochs. Bottom: Application to I15520–5234. (a) 1.3 mm continuum image before primary beam correction. The dashed black contours indicate levels of [10, 24, 48, 96] × σ rms \times\sigma_{rms} , where σ rms = 0.58 ​ mJy ​ beam − 1 \sigma_{rms}=0.58~{mJy~beam^{-1}} . Red and green contours trace condensations identified independently in the MaMMOtH and QUARKS datasets. (b–e) Continuum images after primary beam correction from 2022 May 30, 2022 August 09, 2024 June 02, and 2024 June 03. The yellow contour traces the union mask used to extract peak intensities for the flux comparison analysis in Sect. IV.3.1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：顶部：结构及其流量提取的示意图。红色和绿色等高线分别代表使用astrodendro算法在MaMMOtH和QUARKS巡天中独立识别的凝聚体。这两组轮廓的并集定义了一个公共掩模，以黄色显示，该掩模一致地应用于所有观测历元。底部：应用于I15520–5234。（a）主波束校正前的1.3毫米连续谱图像。黑色虚线等高线表示[10, 24, 48, 96] × σ_rms的水平，其中σ_rms = 0.58 mJy beam^{-1}。红色和绿色等高线分别追踪在MaMMOtH和QUARKS数据集中独立识别的凝聚体。（b–e）2022年5月30日、2022年8月9日、2024年6月2日和2024年6月3日主波束校正后的连续谱图像。黄色等高线追踪用于第IV.3.1节流量比较分析中提取峰值强度的并集掩模。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Normalized standard deviation of peak intensity ( SD / SD fid {SD}/{SD}_{{fid}} ) as a function of the time-averaged mean peak intensity for condensations across 22 protoclusters. Horizontal dashed lines indicate levels at 1, 3, and 5 times the fiducial expectation ( SD / SD fid = 1 , 3 , 5 {SD}/{SD}_{{fid}}=1,3,5 ). Sources exceeding the 5 times fiducial level are highlighted in red and flagged as candidate variables. The numbers in parentheses next to the source names indicate the condensation IDs, consistent with those listed in Table 1 and Table C1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：22个大质量原星团中凝聚体的峰值强度归一化标准差（SD/SD_fid）随时间平均峰值强度的变化。水平虚线表示1、3和5倍基准期望水平（SD/SD_fid = 1, 3, 5）。超过5倍基准水平的源以红色突出显示，并标记为候选变源。源名称后的括号内数字表示凝聚体ID，与表1和表C1中的一致。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们推导了更新的宇宙微波背景（CMB）对湮灭暗物质的约束，并给出了即将开展的CMB巡天的预测。我们表明，与普朗克边界相比，来自地面实验的最新温度、极化和透镜数据的加入仅带来微小改进（约10%），证实了灵敏度仍由大尺度E模极化主导。使用类似LiteBIRD的配置进行的预测表明，将低噪声、宽天区卫星在ℓ<200的数据与高分辨率地面观测相结合，几乎达到了宇宙方差极限，将边界改进了约60%，其中我们推导的95百分位极限为p_ann < 1.27×10^{-28} cm^3 s^{-1} GeV^{-1}。我们还考虑了在现实未来实验中加入B模极化的影响。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，未来CMB观测实验，特别是低噪声宽天区卫星与高分辨率地面观测的组合，有望显著提高湮灭暗物质的探测灵敏度，接近理论极限，为暗物质研究提供更严格的约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Top: Fractional impact of varying p ann p_{{ann}} on the EE and TT spectra. Outer shaded bands indicate cosmic variance + instrumental noise, and inner shaded bands indicate cosmic variance alone; both are computed for the highest value of p ann p_{{ann}} ( 1.0 × 10 − 27 ​ cm 3 ​ s − 1 ​ GeV − 1 1.0\times 10^{-27}\,{cm}^{3}\,{s}^{-1}\,{GeV}^{-1} ). Middle: Same as middle panel but for the TT power spectrum. Bottom: Forecasted 2 ​ σ 2\sigma upper limits on p ann p_{{ann}} for different experimental configurations and multipole ranges included in the Fisher analysis. Solid curves include TT+EE; dashed curves include EE-only. A Planck-like experiment with ℓ max = 2500 \ell_{\text{max}}=2500 is taken as a baseline (marked by star).

artifacts.abstract_zh: 卫星星系在致密环境中快速淬灭通常归因于冲压剥离等环境过程。然而，仅凭剥离无法完全解释许多卫星星系中致密恒星形成气体的移除，尤其是在其内部区域。最近的模型和间接观测表明，恒星形成驱动的外流可能在排出这些剩余气体中发挥关键作用，但此类反馈驱动的淬灭的直接证据仍然有限。本文报告了在室女座星系团卫星星系NGC 4064中发现电离气体外流，该星系已通过环境剥离失去了大部分冷气体。来自MAUVE巡天的MUSE观测揭示了一个由残余的中心集中恒星形成驱动的双极外流——尽管其当前恒星形成率因先前与星系团环境的相互作用而比恒星形成主序低约0.4 dex。外流的质量负载因子约为2，表明恒星反馈能够在比单独恒星形成消耗所需时间更短的时标上移除剩余气体。这些结果表明，即使是适度的中心集中恒星形成也能在剥离的卫星星系中驱动有效反馈，加速其演化最终阶段的淬灭过程。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：即使适度的中心集中恒星形成也能在剥离的卫星星系中驱动有效反馈，加速其演化最终阶段的淬灭过程。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们在线性扰动水平上对连续性方程提出了一种现象学修正，并使用CMB温度、极化和透镜势角功率谱、ISW-星系交叉功率谱以及DES巡天的3×2pt透镜和星系成团性组合进行了测试。我们研究了这种修正的两种参数化形式，两者均与一个新参数$A_c$成正比，该参数假设为时间常数或与尺度因子$a$成正比，以便在晚期更相关。我们发现，当$A_c$为常数时，DES和ISW数据与标准连续性方程一致，但当包含Planck数据时，出现了2-3σ的非零修正迹象。模型$A_c \propto a$导致了更强的张力。我们还测试了包含修改泊松方程和Weyl势的常见额外参数$μ$和$η$的影响。尽管$A_c$、$μ$和$η$是相关的，但当包含Planck数据时，或者在不包含Planck但$A_c \propto a$且仅允许$η$或$μ$变化时，我们仍然发现$A_c$非零。我们得出结论，在测试广义相对论的额外偏离时，应谨慎考虑连续性方程的违反。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要的翻译：连续性方程的违反在测试广义相对论的额外偏离时应谨慎考虑，观测数据对修正参数显示出一定的敏感性，特别是当包含Planck数据时。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: List of parameters and priors. We use either uniform ( 𝒰 ​ [ a , b ] {\cal U}[a,b] ) or Gaussian ( 𝒩 ( μ , σ ) ] {\cal N}(\mu,\sigma)] ) priors for all parameters. The Gaussian priors were used when we only consider Plk18 priors. Top: Cosmological and modified gravity parameters. Center: DES 3 × \times 2pt likelihood. Bottom: CMB × \times ISW likelihood.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：参数和先验列表。我们对所有参数使用均匀（𝒰[a,b]）或高斯（𝒩(μ,σ)）先验。高斯先验仅在我们考虑Plk18先验时使用。顶部：宇宙学和修正引力参数。中部：DES 3×2pt似然。底部：CMB×ISW似然。

We note that the inclusion of CMB T ​ T ​ T ​ E ​ E ​ E TTTEEE +lensing results in non-zero constraints for A c A_{c} above the 2σ \sigma confidence-level. The prior ranges for the different parameters follow Table 1 .

artifacts.abstract_zh: 近期观测表明，第谷超新星遗迹（SNR；SN 1572）正在向分子云空腔壁膨胀，该空腔壁使超新星遗迹减速并影响其多波段形态。为约束环境分子云的物理性质并搜寻被加热的气体，我们进行了JCMT $^{12}$CO $J$=3--2观测，并与之前的$^{12}$CO $J$=2--1、$^{12}$CO $J$=1--0和$^{13}$CO $J$=1--0数据进行了比较。我们展示了第谷方向的$^{12}$CO $J$=3--2图谱，并表明$^{12}$CO $J$=3--2的空间分布和谱线轮廓与低$J$ CO谱线相似。通过比较CO的多重跃迁和RADEX（非局部热力学平衡辐射传输代码）模型，我们约束了第谷周围分子气体的物理性质：北部云团的分子柱密度为$N({\rm H}_{2})=0.5$ -- $4.5\times 10^{22}$ cm$^{-2}$，而其他区域的$N({\rm H}_{2})=0.2$ -- $3.9\times10^{21}$ cm$^{-2}$；这些云团的动力学温度$T_{\rm k}$在9 -- 22 K范围内，体积密度$n({\rm H}_{2})$为20 -- $700$ cm$^{-3}$。我们还讨论了在如此年轻的超新星遗迹中寻找被激波加热的热分子气体的困难。我们估计被激波加热的分子层可能薄至0.003 pc，对应2.5 kpc距离处的$0.2''$，这比当前CO观测的角分辨率小两个数量级。因此，我们的分子观测在很大程度上对薄激波加热气体层不敏感；相反，它们探测到的是环境气体。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：当前观测主要探测的是环境分子气体，而非超新星激波加热的薄层热分子气体。激波加热的分子层太薄，超出了当前CO观测的分辨率极限，因此难以直接探测。研究结果为理解第谷超新星遗迹与分子云环境的相互作用提供了重要约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The 12 CO J J =3–2 velocity-averaged intensity maps with a step of 2 km ​ s − 1 \,{km}\,{s}^{-1} ranging from − 71 -71 km ​ s − 1 \,{km}\,{s}^{-1} to − 53 -53 km ​ s − 1 \,{km}\,{s}^{-1} , overlaid with contours of the Chandra X-ray map. To increase the signal-to-noise ratio, the maps use the smoothed data with an angular resolution of 30 ′′ and a pixel size of 15 ′′ 15^{\prime\prime} . Data with the intensity above 2 ​ σ 2\sigma are shown in the plot.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：$^{12}$CO $J$=3–2速度平均强度图，步长为2 km s$^{-1}$，范围从−71 km s$^{-1}$到−53 km s$^{-1}$，叠加了钱德拉X射线图的等值线。为提高信噪比，这些图使用了角分辨率为30″、像素大小为15″的平滑数据。图中显示了强度高于2σ的数据。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The main panel shows a grid map of the line profiles of 12 CO J J =3–2, 12 CO J J =2–1 and 12 CO J J =1–0 toward Tycho, overlaid with the Chandra hard X-ray flux in 4.1 – 6.1 keV. The black, yellow and red lines represent 12 CO J J =1–0, 12 CO J J =2–1 and 12 CO J J =3–2 line profiles, respectively. The zoomed-in panels illustrate spectra from selected regions “N”, “NE”, “SE”, “SW”, with 13 CO J J =1–0 spectra (blue lines) added. The solid lines are the spectra we observed while the dashed lines represent fit results using the Gaussian function. The gray shadows denote the velocity components we use to study molecular gas properties with RADEX.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：主面板显示了第谷方向$^{12}$CO $J$=3–2、$^{12}$CO $J$=2–1和$^{12}$CO $J$=1–0谱线轮廓的网格图，叠加了4.1–6.1 keV的钱德拉硬X射线通量。黑色、黄色和红色线分别代表$^{12}$CO $J$=1–0、$^{12}$CO $J$=2–1和$^{12}$CO $J$=3–2谱线轮廓。放大面板展示了选定区域“N”、“NE”、“SE”、“SW”的光谱，并添加了$^{13}$CO $J$=1–0光谱（蓝色线）。实线为我们观测到的光谱，虚线表示使用高斯函数拟合的结果。灰色阴影表示我们用于通过RADEX研究分子气体性质的速度分量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The left panel displays the intensity ratio maps of 12 CO J J =3–2 to 12 CO J J =2–1 from V LSR = − 71 ​ km ​ s − 1 V_{\scriptscriptstyleLSR}=-71~\,{km}\,{s}^{-1} to V LSR = − 52 ​ km ​ s − 1 V_{\scriptscriptstyleLSR}=-52~\,{km}\,{s}^{-1} , while the right panel shows the ratio maps of 12 CO J J =2–1 to 12 CO J J =1–0. The spatial resolutions of the two maps are 30 ′′ 30^{\prime\prime} and 55 ′′ 55^{\prime\prime} , respectively. The Chandra X-ray contours are overlaid. The red squares mark the four regions where we later calculate gas parameters using RADEX (see Table 1 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：左面板显示了从V$_{\rm LSR}$ = −71 km s$^{-1}$到V$_{\rm LSR}$ = −52 km s$^{-1}$的$^{12}$CO $J$=3–2与$^{12}$CO $J$=2–1的强度比图，右面板显示了$^{12}$CO $J$=2–1与$^{12}$CO $J$=1–0的比率图。两图的空间分辨率分别为30″和55″。叠加了钱德拉X射线等值线。红色方块标记了随后使用RADEX计算气体参数的四个区域（见表1）。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Line properties and the RADEX fit results for four regions (marked as red squares in Figure 3 ).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：四个区域（图3中红色方块标记）的谱线性质和RADEX拟合结果。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: MCMC corner plots based on multiple transitions of CO data and RADEX models. The dashed lines indicate the 0.16, 0.5, 0.84 quantiles of 1D PDFs.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：基于CO数据多重跃迁和RADEX模型的MCMC角点图。虚线表示一维概率密度函数的0.16、0.5、0.84分位数。

figures.caption_en: Figure A.1: The comparison between posterior distribution of line ratios in selected regions and the observed ones. The violin plots show the posterior distribution values from RADEX. The errorbars show the observed values.
figures.caption_zh: 图A.1：选定区域谱线比的后验分布与观测值的比较。小提琴图显示了来自RADEX的后验分布值。误差棒显示了观测值。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 恒星棒是盘状星系中的细长结构，能够施加力矩并引导气体向内流动，从而影响星系演化。虽然强棒已知能引发快速内流，但弱棒的影响仍不太确定。我们利用艾萨克·牛顿望远镜收集了来自星系动物园DESI的18个邻近星系（包括强棒、弱棒和无棒星系）的光谱数据。通过对Hα发射线拟合高斯轮廓，我们获得了等效宽度（EW）和电离气体速度弥散的空间分布。强棒星系展现出独特的三峰EW[Hα]结构，与气体向内汇聚一致。弱棒星系缺乏这种模式，表明内流有限。速度弥散分布进一步区分了棒的类型，强棒星系的值显著高于弱棒和无棒星系。这些结果表明，强棒驱动气体内流，而弱棒对气体动力学影响有限。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：强棒旋星系能有效驱动气体向内流动，而弱棒旋星系对气体动力学影响有限。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Top left: Example pPXF fit to the H α \alpha emission line for a strongly barred galaxy (SB3). The upper panel shows the flux-calibrated observed spectrum (maroon), the stellar continuum derived from MILES templates (pink), and the total model (yellow), while the lower panel shows the residuals between the data and the model. Top right: Kernel density estimates of the velocity dispersion distributions for no bar (maroon), weak bar (pink), and strong bar (yellow) galaxies. Densities are normalized by the number of data points in each subsample, and vertical dashed lines indicate the median velocity dispersion for each class. Bottom: Equivalent-width profiles of H α \alpha for strongly barred (left) and weakly barred (right) galaxies. Gray points with error bars show the individual EW[H α \alpha ] measurements along the bar as a function of normalized distance from the galaxy center. The colored curves indicate a three-point running median of the measurements. The vertical dashed line marks the bar center ( R = 0 R=0 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左上：对强棒星系（SB3）的Hα发射线进行的pPXF拟合示例。上方面板显示通量校准后的观测光谱（栗色）、来自MILES模板的恒星连续谱（粉色）以及总模型（黄色），下方面板显示数据与模型之间的残差。右上：无棒（栗色）、弱棒（粉色）和强棒（黄色）星系的速度弥散分布的核密度估计。密度按每个子样本的数据点数量归一化，垂直虚线表示每类的速度弥散中位数。下方：强棒（左）和弱棒（右）星系的Hα等效宽度轮廓。带误差棒的灰色点显示沿棒方向、相对于星系中心归一化距离的单个EW[Hα]测量值。彩色曲线表示测量值的三点滑动中位数。垂直虚线标记棒中心（R=0）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 氘分馏是研究前恒星核和原恒星核物理与化学演化的关键诊断指标，它与冷致密气体中的CO冻结密切相关。我们首次展示了英仙座分子云Barnard 5（B5）区域中氘分馏和CO耗尽的二维空间分布图，覆盖了一个无星核以及包含Class 0/I源IRAS 03445+3242的原恒星核。利用IRAM 30米望远镜对N₂H⁺(1–0)、N₂D⁺(1–0)、H¹³CO⁺(1–0)和DCO⁺(2–1)的观测，辅以C¹⁸O(2–1)数据，我们得到了柱密度、氘分馏和CO耗尽图。我们发现，从原恒星核到无星核，上述含氮和含碳物种的氘分馏均增加，在无星核中达到R_D^{N₂H⁺}=0.43±0.10和R_D^{HCO⁺}=0.09±0.02，而在原恒星核中分别为0.15±0.03和0.05±0.01。CO耗尽因子在同一过渡中从4.1±0.1上升到5.0±0.1。虽然嵌入的年轻恒星体减少了致密内部气体的氘化，但由HCO⁺示踪的较稀薄包层在我们的分辨率下仅受到轻微影响。我们的分析证实，CO冻结和原恒星的存在共同调控恒星形成区域的氘化学。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：研究证实CO冻结和原恒星的存在共同调控恒星形成区域的氘化学：嵌入的年轻恒星会减少致密内层气体的氘分馏，而HCO⁺示踪的较稀薄包层受影响较小。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告了旋转运动学Sunyaev-Zel'dovich (rkSZ)效应的首个稳健证据，该效应由宇宙微波背景（CMB）光子与旋转的星系团内气体发生汤姆逊散射产生。通过结合普朗克卫星的CMB强度和偏振测量数据以及斯隆数字巡天的光谱成员星系红移，在一个包含25个X射线交叉匹配、低红移（0.02<z<0.09）、大质量（10^13.9 ≲ M_500c/M_⊙ ≲ 10^14.6）星系团的样本中，我们探测到了一个与每个星系团估计旋转方向对齐的偶极rkSZ信号，以99.98%的置信度（3.6σ）排除了随机涨落。这一测量的显著性得益于若干新的方法论改进，用于从原始CMB涨落和噪声中分离rkSZ信号。信号的振幅和形状在定性上与最先进的流体动力学模拟的预测一致。这些结果建立了一种利用CMB数据探测星系团动力学状态的新工具。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：首次为rkSZ效应提供了稳健证据，建立了利用CMB数据探测星系团动力学状态的新工具，为研究星系团内部气体旋转开辟了新途径。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Top: oriented and weighted stack of filtered and cleaned Planck CMB temperature data on 25 galaxy clusters. The cutouts are rescaled in units of R 500 ​ c R_{500c} and aligned with the estimated cluster rotation direction, with the right side ( x ≥ 0 x\geq 0 ) rotating towards the observer, as indicated by the white arrow. A dipole signal is clearly visible along the expected rotation direction. Bottom: significance of the dipole estimated from the oriented stack (red line) compared with the noise distribution obtained by repeating the weighted stack 30,000 times at random locations. The measured dipole amplitude exceeds 99.98% of the random realizations, indicating strong evidence ( 3.6 ​ σ 3.6\sigma ) of cluster rotation. The black dashed line shows the best-fit Gaussian to the noise.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：顶部：对25个星系团的滤波和清洁后的普朗克CMB温度数据进行定向和加权叠加。剪切图像以R_500c为单位缩放，并与估计的星系团旋转方向对齐，右侧（x≥0）朝向观测者旋转，如白色箭头所示。沿预期旋转方向清晰可见一个偶极信号。底部：从定向叠加估计的偶极显著性（红线）与通过随机位置重复加权叠加30,000次获得的噪声分布比较。测量的偶极振幅超过了99.98%的随机实现，表明星系团旋转的强证据（3.6σ）。黑色虚线显示了对噪声的最佳拟合高斯分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Azimuthally-averaged rkSZ profile derived from our weighted stack of 25 clusters. The red curve shows a theoretical prediction based on a solid-body rotation model and the Battaglia [ Battaglia:2016xbi ] electron number density profile. We find significant evidence for a non-zero amplitude, A rkSZ = 1.05 ± 0.32 A_{rkSZ}=1.05\pm 0.32 . Note that the data points are highly correlated.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：从25个星系团的加权叠加导出的方位角平均rkSZ轮廓。红色曲线显示了基于刚体旋转模型和Battaglia [Battaglia:2016xbi]电子数密度轮廓的理论预测。我们发现非零振幅A_rkSZ=1.05±0.32的显著证据。注意数据点高度相关。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Masks and main CMB maps used in this work. The top-left panel shows the preprocessing mask used for inpainting the multi-frequency maps prior to component separation. It is constructed from the union of a Galactic plane mask and the Planck LFI and HFI point-source masks. The top right panel shows the analysis mask, defined as the union of the inpainting mask and the Planck polarization confidence mask, and subsequently apodized with a 30-arcminute NaMaster C2 apodization. The red shaded region indicates the subset of the SDSS footprint from which our cluster catalog is drawn. We use the union of this footprint and the analysis mask when performing random stacks when determining the significance of our measurements. The bottom-left shows the full-sky tSZ-deprojected blackbody temperature NILC map constructed from multi-frequency Planck intensity measurements with pyilc . The bottom-right panel shows the E-mode-cleaned tSZ-deprojected blackbody temperature NILC map, T ~ \tilde{T} , which we use for our fiducial analysis. As discussed in the text, the T ~ \tilde{T} map is constructed from maps that have already been masked to ensure numerical stability in the spherical-harmonic transforms.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：本工作中使用的掩模和主要CMB图。左上方面板显示了在成分分离前用于修复多频图的预处理掩模，由银河平面掩模和普朗克LFI和HFI点源掩模的并集构成。右上面板显示了分析掩模，定义为修复掩模和普朗克偏振置信掩模的并集，随后使用30角分的NaMaster C2进行锥化。红色阴影区域表示我们的星系团目录所来自的SDSS覆盖范围的子集。在确定测量显著性时，我们使用该覆盖范围和分析掩模的并集进行随机叠加。左下方面板显示了使用pyilc从多频普朗克强度测量构建的全天tSZ去投影黑体温度NILC图。右下方面板显示了E模清洁的tSZ去投影黑体温度NILC图T̃，我们将其用于基准分析。如文中所述，T̃图是从已掩模的图构建的，以确保球谐变换中的数值稳定性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Left: properties of the 13 cosine needlets used in our NILC maps, showing each filter’s peak multipole, real-space smoothing scale, and excluded Planck channels. Right: harmonic-space needlet filters h ℓ ( I ) h^{(I)}_{\ell} used in this work.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左侧：我们NILC图中使用的13个余弦needlet的性质，显示每个滤波器的峰值多极矩、实空间平滑尺度和排除的普朗克通道。右侧：本工作中使用的谐波空间needlet滤波器h_ℓ^(I)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Left: ratio of the power spectrum of the E-mode-subtracted NILC blackbody temperature map, T ~ \tilde{T} , to that of the raw NILC T T map. A cosmic-variance-limited E-mode survey could achieve significantly better variance reduction (black curve). Right: harmonic-space filter applied to remove large- and small-scale modes prior to oriented stacking.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：左侧：E模减除后的NILC黑体温度图T̃的功率谱与原始NILC T图功率谱的比值。受宇宙方差限制的E模巡天可以实现显著更好的方差减小（黑色曲线）。右侧：在定向叠加前用于去除大尺度和小尺度模式的谐波空间滤波器。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Comparison of the estimated dipole for different blackbody temperature maps. The top-left panel shows our fiducial analysis with 3.6 ​ σ 3.6\sigma evidence for a dipole. The orange-dashed curve shows the Gaussian fit to the distribution of randoms using the temperature map without E-mode subtraction, which has ∼ 6 % \sim 6\% larger noise than our E-mode subtracted map. The top-middle panel illustrates the impact of the harmonic-space filter (Eq. ( 7 )). Filtering the maps leads to a mild ( 0.2 ​ σ 0.2\sigma ) increase in the significance. The top-right panel illustrates that extending the harmonic-space filter to ℓ max = 3500 \ell_{max}=3500 , as opposed to ℓ max = 3000 \ell_{max}=3000 , has no impact on the results. The bottom panels illustrate the impact of subtracting E-modes. Stacking on a map without E-mode subtraction reduces the significance from 3.6 ​ σ 3.6\sigma to 3.0 ​ σ 3.0\sigma . The improvement due to the E-mode subtraction arises from two effects: (i) the lower noise in the E-mode subtracted maps and (ii) the presence of an insignificant ( 1.4 ​ σ 1.4\sigma ) dipole in the E-mode map that happens to lie in the opposite direction of the expected rkSZ signal, as shown in the bottom-right panel. Finally, the bottom middle panel shows a stack on the SMICA-noSZ map instead of our fiducial pyilc NILC map. The results are consistent with the pyilc analysis, albeit with slightly lower ( 0.2 ​ σ 0.2\sigma ) significance due to the higher noise in Planck PR3 compared to PR4.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：不同黑体温度图下估计偶极的比较。左上方面板显示了我们的基准分析，偶极证据为3.6σ。橙色虚线显示了使用未进行E模减除的温度图的随机分布的高斯拟合，其噪声比我们的E模减除图大约6%。上中方面板说明了谐波空间滤波器（公式(7)）的影响。对图进行滤波导致显著性轻微增加（0.2σ）。右上方面板说明将谐波空间滤波器扩展到ℓ_max=3500（而非ℓ_max=3000）对结果没有影响。下方面板说明了减除E模的影响。在未减除E模的图上叠加将显著性从3.6σ降低到3.0σ。E模减除带来的改进源于两个效应：(i) E模减除图中较低的噪声，以及(ii) E模图中存在一个不显著的（1.4σ）偶极，恰好位于预期rkSZ信号的相反方向，如右下方面板所示。最后，下中方面板显示了在SMICA-noSZ图上的叠加，而不是我们的基准pyilc NILC图。结果与pyilc分析一致，但由于普朗克PR3相比PR4噪声更高，显著性略低（0.2σ）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Impact of the thermal Sunyaev–Zel’dovich (tSZ) effect on the oriented stack. The first panel shows our fiducial stack, which explicitly deprojects the tSZ contribution to the NILC temperature map. The second panel shows the same analysis applied to a map without tSZ deprojection. While both stacks display a clear dipole, the map without tSZ deprojection contains residual tSZ contributions, which can be seen clearly by taking the difference between the two stacks (third panel). For reference, the final panel shows the oriented stack measured on a NILC Compton- y y (tSZ) map, in which no dipole is seen.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：热Sunyaev-Zel'dovich (tSZ)效应对定向叠加的影响。第一个面板显示了我们的基准叠加，明确去除了NILC温度图中的tSZ贡献。第二个面板显示了在未进行tSZ去投影的图上的相同分析。虽然两个叠加都显示清晰的偶极，但未进行tSZ去投影的图包含残余tSZ贡献，这可以通过两个叠加的差异（第三个面板）清晰看出。作为参考，最后一个面板显示了在NILC Compton-y (tSZ)图上测量的定向叠加，其中未看到偶极。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Impact of dust emission on the oriented stack. The first panel shows our fiducial stack, which includes the Planck 545 GHz channel. The middle panel shows the same analysis applied to a NILC map that does not include the Planck 545 GHz data. Including the 545 GHz channel has a negligible effect on both the stack and the dipole amplitude significance. The right panel shows an oriented stack on the Planck 545 GHz map. We find no evidence of a rotation-aligned dipole in the 545 GHz map. Note that the randoms distribution for the 545 GHz map is non-Gaussian due to the non-Gaussianity of the dust.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：尘埃发射对定向叠加的影响。第一个面板显示了我们的基准叠加，其中包括普朗克545 GHz通道。中间面板显示了在不包括普朗克545 GHz数据的NILC图上的相同分析。包括545 GHz通道对叠加和偶极振幅显著性影响可忽略。右面板显示了在普朗克545 GHz图上的定向叠加。我们在545 GHz图中未发现旋转对齐偶极的证据。注意，由于尘埃的非高斯性，545 GHz图的随机分布是非高斯的。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 研究流出气体运动学和几何结构的常用方法依赖于对积分光谱中的发射线和吸收线进行建模，这些方法缺乏物理动机，包括经验分位数或拟合多个高斯或沃伊特轮廓。此类方法并不总是与这些特征的物理解释一致，因此会遗漏关键的底层物理机制，甚至可能导致对观测结果的不准确解释。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了公开可用的Python代码OutLines，该代码提供了由不同环境中的外流产生的光谱发射线和吸收线轮廓的天体物理模型。OutLines代码考虑了速度场和密度分布参数化的差异，同时允许不同的外流几何结构，使其具有多功能性，适用于广泛的天体物理现象。我们通过使用该代码对H II区结、超级星团、星暴星系和活动星系核中的线轮廓进行建模，展示了OutLines的广泛适用性。在每种情况下，我们都说明了OutLines如何以改进我们科学理解的方式阐明关键的底层物理机制，并解决天文学中重要的未解问题，包括重子循环中的关键机制、H II区和星系的演化，甚至莱曼连续谱逃逸。随着WEAVE-LOFAR和4MOST/WAVES等大规模多路光谱巡天的上线，OutLines将成为关键资源，为前所未有的大样本星系提供探测反馈运动学的手段。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，OutLines将成为大规模多路光谱巡天（如WEAVE-LOFAR和4MOST/WAVES）的关键工具，为前所未有的大样本星系提供探测反馈运动学的手段。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Radial velocity fields included in OutLines and given by Equations 15 - 17 . Acceleration from rest at the base R 0 R_{0} of the wind ( x = 1 x=1 ) proceeds until the wind reachs the terminal velocity v ∞ v_{\infty} ( w ​ [ x ] = 1 w[x]=1 ). Velocity fields include the Pauldrach et al. ( 1986 ) β \beta law approximation to CAK theory (Castor et al. , 1975a ) (blue, Equation 15 ), the Steidel et al. ( 2010 ) power law acceleration (green, Equation 16 ), and the power law velocity field (purple, Equation 17 ). Dash length increases with increasing β \beta .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：OutLines中包含的径向速度场，由方程15-17给出。从风基座R₀（x=1）处的静止状态开始加速，直到风达到终端速度v∞（w[x]=1）。速度场包括CAK理论的Pauldrach等人（1986）β律近似（蓝色，方程15）、Steidel等人（2010）幂律加速（绿色，方程16）和幂律速度场（紫色，方程17）。虚线长度随β增加而增加。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Nebular emission ( top ) and resonant absorption ( bottom ) line profiles for each of the velocity fields included in OutLines assuming β = 1.5 \beta=1.5 (CAK theory), β = 1 \beta=1 (velocity power law), and β = 2 \beta=2 (acceleration power law) for the OutLines defaults.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：对于OutLines中包含的每个速度场，假设β=1.5（CAK理论）、β=1（速度幂律）和β=2（加速度幂律）的OutLines默认值，星云发射（上）和共振吸收（下）线轮廓。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Radial density profiles included in OutLines and given by Equations 19 - 28 . Top : Wind-like density profiles, including power law (‘PowerLaw’, purple, Eqn 19 ), double power law (‘DoublePowerLaw’, yellow, Eqn 21 ), and exponential (‘Exponential’, green, Eqn 20 ) distributions. Center : Pulse-like density profiles, including the normal (‘Normal’, blue, Eqn 22 ), log normal (‘LogNormal’, red, Eqn 23 ), fast-rise exponential decay (‘FRED’, orange, Eqn 24 ), and derivative of the logistic (‘DLogic’, indigo, Eqn 25 ) distributions, represent physical scenarios such as blast waves, expanding shells, and single burst events. Bottom : Ensembles of pulse-like profiles without (black solid, Eqn 27 ) and with (black dashed, Eqn 28 ) damping. These ensembles represent the resolved elements of a radially clumpy wind or a series of outflowing episodes.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：OutLines中包含的径向密度分布，由方程19-28给出。上：类风密度分布，包括幂律（‘PowerLaw’，紫色，方程19）、双幂律（‘DoublePowerLaw’，黄色，方程21）和指数（‘Exponential’，绿色，方程20）分布。中：类脉冲密度分布，包括正态（‘Normal’，蓝色，方程22）、对数正态（‘LogNormal’，红色，方程23）、快速上升指数衰减（‘FRED’，橙色，方程24）和逻辑斯蒂导数（‘DLogic’，靛蓝，方程25）分布，代表物理场景如爆炸波、膨胀壳和单次爆发事件。下：无阻尼（黑色实线，方程27）和有阻尼（黑色虚线，方程28）的类脉冲轮廓集合。这些集合代表径向团块风或一系列外流事件的分辨元素。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Nebular emission ( top ) and absorption ( bottom ) line profiles predicted by OutLines for fixed flux, column density, and velocity field for different density distributions assuming a spherical geometry. Colors matched to the corresponding profiles in Figure 3 .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：OutLines预测的星云发射（上）和吸收（下）线轮廓，对于固定通量、柱密度和速度场，不同密度分布，假设球对称几何。颜色与图3中相应轮廓匹配。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Nebular emission ( top ) and absorption ( bottom ) line profiles predicted by OutLines for an ensemble of expanding bubbles, shells, or other pulse-like episodes in cases of thick (orange, σ x = 0.5 \sigma_{x}=0.5 ) or thin (blue, σ x = 0.1 \sigma_{x}=0.1 ) widely-spaced shells and thin closely-spaced shells (green, x k = 0.2 x_{k}=0.2 ) with (dashed) and without (solid) damping to mimic the effects of dissipation. In all cases, density, column density, velocity field, and terminal velocity are fixed, and a spherical geometry is assumed.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：OutLines预测的星云发射（上）和吸收（下）线轮廓，针对膨胀气泡、壳层或其他类脉冲事件的集合，在厚（橙色，σx=0.5）或薄（蓝色，σx=0.1）宽间距壳层和薄密间距壳层（绿色，xk=0.2）的情况下，有（虚线）和无（实线）阻尼以模拟耗散效应。在所有情况下，密度、柱密度、速度场和终端速度固定，并假设球对称几何。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Velocity isocontours for the different velocity fields available in OutLines : the β \beta law approximation to CAK theory ( top ), an acceleration power law ( middle ), and a velocity power law ( bottom ). Colors indicate fixed observed velocities of v o ​ b ​ s / v ∞ = u = 0.1 v_{obs}/v_{\infty}=u=0.1 (yellow/green), 0.3 (orange/blue), and 0.5 (red/purple). Line styles indicate low (dotted), intermediate (solid), and high (dash-dotted) values of β \beta for each velocity field. Arrow indicates the direction towards the observer, with cool colors representing blue Doppler shifts and warm colors representing red Doppler shift.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：OutLines中不同速度场的速度等值线：CAK理论的β律近似（上）、加速度幂律（中）和速度幂律（下）。颜色表示固定的观测速度vobs/v∞=u=0.1（黄/绿）、0.3（橙/蓝）和0.5（红/紫）。线型表示每个速度场的β低值（点线）、中值（实线）和高值（点划线）。箭头指向观测者方向，冷色代表蓝移，暖色代表红移。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Spherically symmetric outflow presented in the text with a constant-velocity surface with a radius of u u . Black arrows indicate the motion of the outflow. Central circle indicates the launching source of the outflow. Filled grey region indicates line-emitting material while the hatched region indicated line-absorbing material. Colored arrows indicate the direction of light propagation towards the observer. Colored circles indicate different deprojected velocities w w which can contribute to a single observed velocity surface u u with values of u / w = 0.15 , 0.5 , 0.85 u/w=0.15,0.5,0.85 corresponding to yellow/green, orange/blue, and red/purple, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：文中介绍的球对称外流，具有半径为u的恒定速度表面。黑色箭头表示外流运动。中心圆表示外流的发射源。灰色填充区域表示线发射物质，阴影区域表示线吸收物质。彩色箭头表示光向观测者传播的方向。彩色圆表示不同的去投影速度w，这些速度可以贡献于单个观测速度表面u，u/w=0.15、0.5、0.85分别对应黄/绿、橙/蓝和红/紫。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Effect of aperture clipping on the observed line profile for a P Cygni line consisting of absorption and resonant emission with filling factor ϵ = 0.2 \epsilon=0.2 and escape fraction p r ​ e ​ s = 1 p_{res}=1 (left panel) and for nebular emission (right panel). For visualization, lines are normalized to the case of no aperture clipping ( w a = 1 w_{a}=1 ). Dotted black line in the left panel indicates pure absorption, demonstrating that infilling can still occur in the fully aperture-clipped limit but that only an absorption profile is observed (cf. Scarlata and Panagia, 2015 ) . Note that the effect of radiative trapping on the resonant line core decreases as w a w_{a} decreases.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：孔径裁剪对P Cygni线（由吸收和共振发射组成，填充因子ε=0.2，逃逸分数pres=1，左图）和星云发射（右图）观测线轮廓的影响。为便于可视化，线轮廓归一化到无孔径裁剪情况（wa=1）。左图中黑色虚线表示纯吸收，表明在完全孔径裁剪极限下仍可能发生填充，但仅观察到吸收轮廓（参见Scarlata和Panagia，2015）。注意，共振线核心的辐射俘获效应随wa减小而减小。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们分析了大量SDSS赛弗特星系光谱样本，根据窄/宽Hα成分对赛弗特1星系进行细分。在线比图中将其窄线与赛弗特2星系比较，发现强宽线赛弗特1.0和1.2星系的窄线大多与纯赛弗特2星系相同。相反，只有25-30%的弱宽线赛弗特1.8和1.9星系位于纯赛弗特2区域，其余落在复合恒星形成区。我们用一个简单模型解释这些赛弗特加恒星形成光谱，显示赛弗特1.9中85%的窄线来自HII区，而赛弗特1.0中88%的窄线来自与纯赛弗特2相同的窄线区。约6%的强和弱赛弗特1星系的窄线由LINER发射主导，而15%的中间赛弗特（1.5和1.6）如此。为确认赛弗特1活动星系核加恒星形成的组合，我们使用恒星吸收线比较其星族。Hδ强度显示LINER、纯赛弗特2以及宽线主导的赛弗特1具有老年星族。弱赛弗特1显示更强的Hδ吸收，表明更大比例的年轻恒星。赛弗特1.0和1.2中约三分之一的u波段光来自宽线区的混合巴耳末线和连续谱。窄线气体红化随宽线强度减弱而增加，从赛弗特1.0（0.13星等）到赛弗特1.9（0.40星等），再到赛弗特2和LINER（均为0.50星等）。我们的数据不支持赛弗特1和2统一的最简单版本，即两类活动星系核具有相同的窄线。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：研究结果表明赛弗特1和2星系并不遵循简单的统一模型，不同类型赛弗特1的窄线发射源存在显著差异。弱宽线赛弗特1星系中存在显著的恒星形成活动，而强宽线赛弗特1的窄线区与赛弗特2相似。窄线气体红化与宽线强度相关。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Classification of Galaxies Spectra
figures.caption_zh: 表1：星系光谱分类

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Top Two Rows show three examples of Seyfert 2 galaxies with the full spectra in blue and the fitted continuum in red. In the second row of spectra zoomed in on the H α \alpha /[NII] region, show that the reduction in χ 2 \chi^{2} when adding a fourth Gaussian to the emission line fit is not statistically significant. The bottom two rows show three examples of Seyfert 1 galaxies, with the 3-Gaussian fit shown in red and the (preferred) 4-Gaussian fit in blue. The reduction in χ 2 \chi^{2} is large enough to require the inclusion of broad components in their H α \alpha lines. Based on our quantitative comparison of narrow-to-broad-line H α \alpha components, these are classified as Seyfert 1.0, 1.2, and 1.6.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：上两行显示三个赛弗特2星系示例，蓝色为全光谱，红色为拟合连续谱。第二行光谱放大Hα/[NII]区域，显示在发射线拟合中添加第四个高斯时χ²的降低在统计上不显著。下两行显示三个赛弗特1星系示例，红色为三高斯拟合，蓝色为（更优的）四高斯拟合。χ²的降低足够大，要求在其Hα线中包含宽成分。基于我们对窄/宽Hα成分的定量比较，这些被分类为赛弗特1.0、1.2和1.6。
